```objective-c
        type text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // CYCLE NAME OVERRIDE FOR BACKFILLED CASES
    // ===========================================
    
    Cycle_Name_Adjusted = Table.AddColumn(
        CycleName_Added,
        "cycle_name_adjusted",
        each 
            if [Backfill_7Day] = true then
                let
                    Today = Date.From(DateTime.LocalNow()),
                    CurrentCycle = Table.SelectRows(
                        CycleCalendarTable,
                        each 
                            let
                                StartDate = Date.FromText([7_Day_Start]),
                                EndDate = Date.FromText([7_Day_End])
                            in Today >= StartDate and Today <= EndDate
                    ),
                    CurrentCycleName = if not Table.IsEmpty(CurrentCycle) then CurrentCycle{0}[Report_Name] else [cycle_name]
                in CurrentCycleName
            else [cycle_name],
        type text
    ),

    StartOfHour_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Cycle_Name_Adjusted, 
        "StartOfHour",
        each 
            try
                if [BestTimeValue] <> null then
                    let
                        Hour = Time.Hour([BestTimeValue]),
                        StartTime = #time(Hour, 0, 0)
                    in Time.ToText(StartTime, "hh:mm:ss")
                else "00:00:00"
            otherwise "00:00:00",
        type text
    ),

    TimeOfDay_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        StartOfHour_Added, 
        "TimeOfDay", 
        each 
            try
                if [BestTimeValue] <> null then
                    let
                        Hour = Time.Hour([BestTimeValue]),
                        Category = 
                            if Hour >= 4 and Hour < 8 then "Early Morning (04:00–07:59)"
                            else if Hour >= 8 and Hour < 12 then "Morning (08:00–11:59)"
                            else if Hour >= 12 and Hour < 16 then "Afternoon (12:00–15:59)"
                            else if Hour >= 16 and Hour < 20 then "Evening Peak (16:00–19:59)"
                            else if Hour >= 20 and Hour < 24 then "Night (20:00–23:59)"
                            else "Late Night (00:00–03:59)"
                    in Category
                else "Unknown Time"
            otherwise "Time_Category_Error",
        type text
    ),

    TimeOfDay_SortKey_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeOfDay_Added,
        "TimeOfDay_SortKey",
        each 
            let
                TimeOfDay = [TimeOfDay],
                SortKey = 
                    if TimeOfDay = "Late Night (00:00–03:59)" then 1
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Early Morning (04:00–07:59)" then 2
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Morning (08:00–11:59)" then 3
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Afternoon (12:00–15:59)" then 4
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Evening Peak (16:00–19:59)" then 5
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Night (20:00–23:59)" then 6
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Unknown Time" then 99
                    else 0
            in SortKey,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    AllIncidents_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeOfDay_SortKey_Added,
        "ALL_INCIDENTS",
        each
            [Incident Type_1]
            & (if [Incident Type_2] <> null then ", "&[Incident Type_2] else "")
            & (if [Incident Type_3] <> null then ", "&[Incident Type_3] else ""),
        type text
    ),

    CrimeCategory_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        AllIncidents_Added,
        "Crime_Category",
        each let
            L = Text.Upper([ALL_INCIDENTS] ?? ""),
            N = Text.Upper([Narrative] ?? "")
        in
            if Text.Contains(L, "MOTOR VEHICLE THEFT") and (Text.Contains(N, "THEFT OF HIS PROPERTY") or Text.Contains(N, "THEFT FROM MOTOR VEHICLE")) then "Burglary Auto"
            else if Text.Contains(L, "MOTOR VEHICLE THEFT") then "Motor Vehicle Theft"
            else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - AUTO"), Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - AUTO"), Text.Contains(L, "THEFT FROM MOTOR VEHICLE")}) then "Burglary Auto"
            else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - COMMERCIAL"), Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - COMMERCIAL"), Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - RESIDENCE"), Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - RESIDENCE")}) then "Burglary - Comm & Res"
            else if Text.Contains(L, "ROBBERY") then "Robbery"
            else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "SEXUAL"), Text.Contains(L, "RAPE")}) then "Sexual Offenses"
            else "Other",
        type text
    ),

    CleanIncidentTypes_Added = Table.TransformColumns(
        CrimeCategory_Added,
        {
            {"Incident Type_1", each if _<>null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_," - 2C") else _, type text},
            {"Incident Type_2", each if _<>null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_," - 2C") else _, type text},
            {"Incident Type_3", each if _<>null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_," - 2C") else _, type text}
        }
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // NORMALIZE "ATTEMPTED" BURGLARIES
    // ===========================================
    
    Incident_Type_1_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        CleanIncidentTypes_Added,
        "Incident_Type_1_Norm",
        each 
            if [Incident Type_1] <> null then
                Text.Replace([Incident Type_1], "Attempted Burglary", "Burglary")
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    
    Incident_Type_2_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Type_1_Norm_Added,
        "Incident_Type_2_Norm",
        each 
            if [Incident Type_2] <> null then
                Text.Replace([Incident Type_2], "Attempted Burglary", "Burglary")
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    
    Incident_Type_3_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Type_2_Norm_Added,
        "Incident_Type_3_Norm",
        each 
            if [Incident Type_3] <> null then
                Text.Replace([Incident Type_3], "Attempted Burglary", "Burglary")
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // NARRATIVE CLEANING
    // ===========================================
    
    Narrative_Cleaned = Table.TransformColumns(
        Incident_Type_3_Norm_Added,
        {{"Narrative", each 
            if _ = null or _ = "" then null
            else
                let
                    text = _,
                    step1 = Text.Replace(Text.Replace(Text.Replace(text, "#(cr)#(lf)", " "), "#(lf)", " "), "#(cr)", " "),
                    step2 = Text.Replace(Text.Replace(Text.Replace(step1, "    ", " "), "   ", " "), "  ", " "),
                    step3 = Text.Clean(step2),
                    step4 = Text.Trim(step3),
                    final = if step4 = "" then null else step4
                in final,
            type text
        }}
    ),
    
    // ===========================================
    // VEHICLE FORMATTING
    // ===========================================
    
    Vehicle_1_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Narrative_Cleaned,
        "Vehicle_1",
        each 
            let
                regState = if [#"Reg State 1"] <> null then Text.From([#"Reg State 1"]) else "",
                registration = if [#"Registration 1"] <> null then Text.From([#"Registration 1"]) else "",
                make = if [Make1] <> null then Text.From([Make1]) else "",
                model = if [Model1] <> null then Text.From([Model1]) else "",
                hasData = regState <> "" or registration <> "" or make <> "" or model <> ""
            in
                if hasData then
                    let
                        stateReg = 
                            if regState <> "" and registration <> "" then regState & " - " & registration
                            else if registration <> "" then registration
                            else if regState <> "" then regState
                            else "",
                        
                        makeModel = 
                            if make <> "" and model <> "" then make & "/" & model
                            else if make <> "" then make
                            else if model <> "" then model
                            else "",
                        
                        result = 
                            if stateReg <> "" and makeModel <> "" then stateReg & ", " & makeModel
                            else if stateReg <> "" then stateReg
                            else if makeModel <> "" then makeModel
                            else ""
                    in
                        if result = "" then null else Text.Upper(result)
                else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    
    Vehicle_2_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_1_Added,
        "Vehicle_2",
        each 
            let
                regState = if [#"Reg State 2"] <> null then Text.From([#"Reg State 2"]) else "",
                registration = if [#"Registration 2"] <> null then Text.From([#"Registration 2"]) else "",
                make = if [Make2] <> null then Text.From([Make2]) else "",
                model = if [Model2] <> null then Text.From([Model2]) else "",
                hasData = regState <> "" or registration <> "" or make <> "" or model <> ""
            in
                if hasData then
                    let
                        stateReg = 
                            if regState <> "" and registration <> "" then regState & " - " & registration
                            else if registration <> "" then registration
                            else if regState <> "" then regState
                            else "",
                        
                        makeModel = 
                            if make <> "" and model <> "" then make & "/" & model
                            else if make <> "" then make
                            else if model <> "" then model
                            else "",
                        
                        result = 
                            if stateReg <> "" and makeModel <> "" then stateReg & ", " & makeModel
                            else if stateReg <> "" then stateReg
                            else if makeModel <> "" then makeModel
                            else ""
                    in
                        if result = "" then null else Text.Upper(result)
                else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    
    Vehicle_Combined_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_2_Added,
        "Vehicle_1_and_Vehicle_2",
        each 
            if [Vehicle_1] <> null and [Vehicle_2] <> null then
                [Vehicle_1] & " | " & [Vehicle_2]
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // CLEAN ADDRESS (REMOVE CITY/STATE/ZIP)
    // ===========================================
    
    Clean_Address_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_Combined_Added,
        "Clean_Address",
        each 
            if [FullAddress] <> null and [FullAddress] <> "" then
                let
                    address = Text.Trim([FullAddress]),
                    cleaned = Text.BeforeDelimiter(address, ", Hackensack, NJ", {0, RelativePosition.FromStart})
                in
                    if cleaned <> "" then cleaned else address
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    CallTypeCategories = Csv.Document(File.Contents("C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\09_Reference\Classifications\CallTypes\CallType_Categories.csv")),
    CallTypeCategoriesTable = Table.PromoteHeaders(CallTypeCategories),
    
    CategoryType_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Clean_Address_Added,
        "Category_Type",
        each
            let
                IncidentToMatch = if [ALL_INCIDENTS] <> null and [ALL_INCIDENTS] <> "" then [ALL_INCIDENTS] else [Incident Type_1],
                MatchingCategory = 
                    if IncidentToMatch = null or IncidentToMatch = "" then "Unknown"
                    else
                        let
                            ExactMatch = Table.SelectRows(
                                CallTypeCategoriesTable,
                                each [Incident] = IncidentToMatch or [Incident_Norm] = IncidentToMatch
                            ),
                            PartialMatch = if Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) then
                                Table.SelectRows(
                                    CallTypeCategoriesTable,
                                    each Text.Contains(IncidentToMatch, [Incident]) or Text.Contains([Incident], IncidentToMatch)
                                )
                            else ExactMatch,
                            CategoryResult = 
                                if Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) and Table.IsEmpty(PartialMatch) then "Unknown"
                                else if not Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) then ExactMatch{0}[Category_Type]
                                else PartialMatch{0}[Category_Type]
                        in CategoryResult
            in MatchingCategory,
        type text
    ),
    
    ResponseType_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        CategoryType_Added,
        "Response_Type",
        each
            let
                IncidentToMatch = if [ALL_INCIDENTS] <> null and [ALL_INCIDENTS] <> "" then [ALL_INCIDENTS] else [Incident Type_1],
                MatchingResponse = 
                    if IncidentToMatch = null or IncidentToMatch = "" then "Unknown"
                    else
                        let
                            ExactMatch = Table.SelectRows(
                                CallTypeCategoriesTable,
                                each [Incident] = IncidentToMatch or [Incident_Norm] = IncidentToMatch
                            ),
                            PartialMatch = if Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) then
                                Table.SelectRows(
                                    CallTypeCategoriesTable,
                                    each Text.Contains(IncidentToMatch, [Incident]) or Text.Contains([Incident], IncidentToMatch)
                                )
                            else ExactMatch,
                            ResponseResult = 
                                if Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) and Table.IsEmpty(PartialMatch) then "Unknown"
                                else if not Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) then ExactMatch{0}[Response_Type]
                                else PartialMatch{0}[Response_Type]
                        in ResponseResult
            in MatchingResponse,
        type text
    ),

    TimeValidation_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        ResponseType_Added,
        "Time_Validation",
        each 
            let
                OriginalIncidentTime = [Incident Time],
                OriginalIncidentTimeBetween = [Incident Time_Between], 
                OriginalReportTime = [Report Time],
                CascadedTime = [BestTimeValue],
                TimeSource = [TimeSource],
                
                ValidationText = 
                    "Source: " & TimeSource & 
                    " | Original IT: " & (if OriginalIncidentTime <> null then Text.From(OriginalIncidentTime) else "null") &
                    " | Original ITB: " & (if OriginalIncidentTimeBetween <> null then Text.From(OriginalIncidentTimeBetween) else "null") &
                    " | Original RT: " & (if OriginalReportTime <> null then Text.From(OriginalReportTime) else "null") &
                    " | Cascaded: " & (if CascadedTime <> null then Time.ToText(CascadedTime) else "null")
            in ValidationText,
        type text
    ),

    FinalResult = TimeValidation_Added,

#"Sorted Rows" = Table.Sort(FinalResult, {{"Incident Date", Order.Ascending }, 
                                           {"Period", Order.Descending}, 
                                           {"Report Date", Order.Ascending}, 
                                           {
  "Report_Date", Order.Ascending
}
}),
#"Changed Type" =                                                              \
    Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Sorted Rows",                                 \
                               {{"Report Time", type time },                   \
                                 {"Incident Time_Between", type time },        \
                                  {"Incident Time", type time } }),
#"Sorted Rows1" = Table.Sort(#"Changed Type", {{"Report Date",                 \
                                                Order.Ascending } })
in
#"Sorted Rows1"
```

```objective-c
// 🕒 2025-10-07-16-45-00
// # SCRPA_Time_v2/All_Crimes_Query
// # Author: R. A. Carucci
// # Purpose: Complete RMS data processing with cascading time/date logic,
// backfill tracking, # narrative cleaning, vehicle formatting, Period sort key,
// and Attempted Burglary normalization

/*
============================================================
COMPLETE CASCADING TIME LOGIC WITH ATTEMPTED BURGLARY GROUPING
============================================================
Author: R. A. Carucci
Date: 2025-10-07
Purpose: Comprehensive RMS data processing with incident dating, backfill
tracking, narrative cleaning, vehicle formatting, Period sort key, and
normalization of Attempted Burglary offenses for SCRPA crime analysis.

ENHANCEMENTS:
- Report_Date tracking with cascading logic
- LagDays calculation for reporting delay analysis
- Backfill_7Day flag (cycle-aware, not rolling window)
- Narrative text cleaning (line breaks, whitespace normalization)
- Vehicle_1, Vehicle_2, Vehicle_1_and_Vehicle_2 formatting (uppercase)
- Period_SortKey for proper chart ordering (7-Day, 28-Day, YTD, Historical)
- Attempted Burglary normalization for visual grouping
- cycle_name_adjusted for backfilled cases
*/

let
    // ===========================================
    // IMPORT MOST RECENT EXCEL FILE DYNAMICALLY
    // ===========================================

    FolderPath = "C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\05_EXPORTS\_RMS\SCRPA",
    AllFiles = Folder.Files(FolderPath),
    XlsxFiles = Table.SelectRows(AllFiles, each Text.EndsWith([Name], ".xlsx", Comparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)),
    SortedFiles = Table.Sort(XlsxFiles, {{"Date modified", Order.Descending}}),
    LatestFilePath = SortedFiles{0}[Folder Path] & SortedFiles{0}[Name],
    Source = Excel.Workbook(File.Contents(LatestFilePath), true),
    FirstTable = Source{0}[Data],
    
    // ===========================================
    // ENHANCED TIME PROCESSING WITH INLINE CASCADING LOGIC
    // ===========================================
    
    BestTimeValueAdded = Table.AddColumn(
        FirstTable,
        "BestTimeValue", 
        each 
            let
                ParsedIncidentTime = 
                    if [Incident Time] = null or [Incident Time] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type time then [Incident Time]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type duration then try Time.From([Incident Time]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type text then
                        let
                            CleanText = Text.Trim([Incident Time]),
                            ParsedTime = 
                                try Time.FromText(CleanText)
                                otherwise try Time.FromText(CleanText & ":00")
                                otherwise try 
                                    let
                                        TimePattern = Text.AfterDelimiter(CleanText, " ", {0, RelativePosition.FromEnd}),
                                        ExtractedTime = if Text.Contains(TimePattern, ":") then Time.FromText(TimePattern) else null
                                    in ExtractedTime
                                otherwise null
                        in ParsedTime
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type datetime then Time.From([Incident Time])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type number then try Time.From([Incident Time]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedIncidentTimeBetween = 
                    if [Incident Time_Between] = null or [Incident Time_Between] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type time then [Incident Time_Between]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type duration then try Time.From([Incident Time_Between]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type text then
                        let
                            CleanText = Text.Trim([Incident Time_Between]),
                            ParsedTime = 
                                try Time.FromText(CleanText)
                                otherwise try Time.FromText(CleanText & ":00")
                                otherwise try 
                                    let
                                        TimePattern = Text.AfterDelimiter(CleanText, " ", {0, RelativePosition.FromEnd}),
                                        ExtractedTime = if Text.Contains(TimePattern, ":") then Time.FromText(TimePattern) else null
                                    in ExtractedTime
                                otherwise null
                        in ParsedTime
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type datetime then Time.From([Incident Time_Between])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type number then try Time.From([Incident Time_Between]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedReportTime = 
                    if [Report Time] = null or [Report Time] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type time then [Report Time]
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type duration then try Time.From([Report Time]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type text then
                        let
                            CleanText = Text.Trim([Report Time]),
                            ParsedTime = 
                                try Time.FromText(CleanText)
                                otherwise try Time.FromText(CleanText & ":00")
                                otherwise try 
                                    let
                                        TimePattern = Text.AfterDelimiter(CleanText, " ", {0, RelativePosition.FromEnd}),
                                        ExtractedTime = if Text.Contains(TimePattern, ":") then Time.FromText(TimePattern) else null
                                    in ExtractedTime
                                otherwise null
                        in ParsedTime
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type datetime then Time.From([Report Time])
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type number then try Time.From([Report Time]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                BestTime = 
                    if ParsedIncidentTime <> null then ParsedIncidentTime
                    else if ParsedIncidentTimeBetween <> null then ParsedIncidentTimeBetween
                    else if ParsedReportTime <> null then ParsedReportTime
                    else null
            in BestTime,
        type nullable time
    ),
    
    TimeSourceAdded = Table.AddColumn(
        BestTimeValueAdded,
        "TimeSource",
        each 
            let
                IncidentTimeParsed = 
                    if [Incident Time] = null or [Incident Time] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type time then [Incident Time]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type duration then try Time.From([Incident Time]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type text then try Time.FromText(Text.Trim([Incident Time])) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type datetime then Time.From([Incident Time])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type number then try Time.From([Incident Time]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                IncidentTimeBetweenParsed = 
                    if [Incident Time_Between] = null or [Incident Time_Between] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type time then [Incident Time_Between]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type duration then try Time.From([Incident Time_Between]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type text then try Time.FromText(Text.Trim([Incident Time_Between])) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type datetime then Time.From([Incident Time_Between])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type number then try Time.From([Incident Time_Between]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ReportTimeParsed = 
                    if [Report Time] = null or [Report Time] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type time then [Report Time]
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type duration then try Time.From([Report Time]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type text then try Time.FromText(Text.Trim([Report Time])) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type datetime then Time.From([Report Time])
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type number then try Time.From([Report Time]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                Source = 
                    if IncidentTimeParsed <> null then "Incident Time"
                    else if IncidentTimeBetweenParsed <> null then "Incident Time_Between"
                    else if ReportTimeParsed <> null then "Report Time"
                    else "None"
            in Source,
        type text
    ),

    Incident_Time_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeSourceAdded, 
        "Incident_Time", 
        each 
            try
                let
                    BestTime = [BestTimeValue],
                    TimeText = 
                        if BestTime <> null then
                            let
                                Hours = Time.Hour(BestTime),
                                Minutes = Time.Minute(BestTime),
                                Seconds = Time.Second(BestTime),
                                FormattedTime = 
                                    Text.PadStart(Text.From(Hours), 2, "0") & ":" &
                                    Text.PadStart(Text.From(Minutes), 2, "0") & ":" &
                                    Text.PadStart(Text.From(Seconds), 2, "0")
                            in FormattedTime
                        else "00:00:00"
                in TimeText
            otherwise "Time_Error",
        type text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // ENHANCED INCIDENT_DATE PROCESSING WITH CASCADING LOGIC
    // ===========================================
    
    Incident_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Time_Added, 
        "Incident_Date", 
        each 
            let
                ParsedIncidentDate = 
                    if [Incident Date] = null or [Incident Date] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type date then [Incident Date]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type datetime then Date.From([Incident Date])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Incident Date]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type number then try Date.From([Incident Date]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedIncidentDateBetween = 
                    if [Incident Date_Between] = null or [Incident Date_Between] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type date then [Incident Date_Between]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type datetime then Date.From([Incident Date_Between])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Incident Date_Between]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type number then try Date.From([Incident Date_Between]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedReportDate = 
                    if [Report Date] = null or [Report Date] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type date then [Report Date]
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type datetime then Date.From([Report Date])
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type number then try Date.From([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                BestDate = 
                    if ParsedIncidentDate <> null then ParsedIncidentDate
                    else if ParsedIncidentDateBetween <> null then ParsedIncidentDateBetween
                    else if ParsedReportDate <> null then ParsedReportDate
                    else null,
                
                DateText = 
                    if BestDate <> null then Date.ToText(BestDate, "MM/dd/yy")
                    else "Unknown"
            in DateText,
        type text
    ),

    Incident_Date_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Date_Added,
        "Incident_Date_Date",
        each 
            let
                ParsedIncidentDate = 
                    if [Incident Date] = null or [Incident Date] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type date then [Incident Date]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type datetime then Date.From([Incident Date])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Incident Date]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type number then try Date.From([Incident Date]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedIncidentDateBetween = 
                    if [Incident Date_Between] = null or [Incident Date_Between] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type date then [Incident Date_Between]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type datetime then Date.From([Incident Date_Between])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Incident Date_Between]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type number then try Date.From([Incident Date_Between]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedReportDate = 
                    if [Report Date] = null or [Report Date] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type date then [Report Date]
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type datetime then Date.From([Report Date])
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type number then try Date.From([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                BestDate = 
                    if ParsedIncidentDate <> null then ParsedIncidentDate
                    else if ParsedIncidentDateBetween <> null then ParsedIncidentDateBetween
                    else if ParsedReportDate <> null then ParsedReportDate
                    else null
            in BestDate,
        type date
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // REPORT DATE PROCESSING WITH CASCADING LOGIC
    // ===========================================
    
    Report_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Date_Date_Added,
        "Report_Date",
        each 
            let
                ParsedReportDate = 
                    if [Report Date] = null or [Report Date] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type date then [Report Date]
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type datetime then Date.From([Report Date])
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type number then try Date.From([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedEntryDate = 
                    if [EntryDate] = null or [EntryDate] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([EntryDate]) = type date then [EntryDate]
                    else if Value.Type([EntryDate]) = type datetime then Date.From([EntryDate])
                    else if Value.Type([EntryDate]) = type text then try Date.FromText([EntryDate]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([EntryDate]) = type number then try Date.From([EntryDate]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                BestReportDate = 
                    if ParsedReportDate <> null then ParsedReportDate
                    else if ParsedEntryDate <> null then ParsedEntryDate
                    else [Incident_Date_Date]
            in BestReportDate,
        type nullable date
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // REPORT DATE TEXT (FORMATTED MM/dd/yy)
    // ===========================================
    
    Report_Date_Text_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Report_Date_Added,
        "Report_Date_Text",
        each 
            if [Report_Date] <> null then
                Date.ToText([Report_Date], "MM/dd/yy")
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    
    // ===========================================
    // INCIDENT TO REPORT DAYS (QA METRIC - REPORTING DELAY)
    // ===========================================
    
    IncidentToReportDays_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Report_Date_Text_Added,
        "IncidentToReportDays",
        each 
            if [Report_Date] <> null and [Incident_Date_Date] <> null then
                Duration.Days([Report_Date] - [Incident_Date_Date])
            else null,
        Int64.Type
    ),
    
    // ===========================================
    // PERIOD BUCKETS
    // ===========================================
    
    Period_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        IncidentToReportDays_Added,
        "Period",
        each let d = Duration.Days(Date.From(DateTime.LocalNow()) - [Incident_Date_Date]) in
            if d <= 7 then "7-Day"
            else if d <= 28 then "28-Day"
            else if Date.Year([Incident_Date_Date]) = Date.Year(DateTime.LocalNow()) then "YTD"
            else "Historical",
        type text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // PERIOD SORT KEY
    // ===========================================
    
    Period_SortKey_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Period_Added,
        "Period_SortKey",
        each 
            if [Period] = "7-Day" then 1
            else if [Period] = "28-Day" then 2
            else if [Period] = "YTD" then 3
            else if [Period] = "Historical" then 4
            else 99,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // LOAD CYCLE CALENDAR (USED BY BACKFILL & CYCLE_NAME)
    // ===========================================
    
    CycleCalendar = Csv.Document(File.Contents("C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\09_Reference\Temporal\SCRPA_Cycle\7Day_28Day_Cycle_20250414.csv")),
    CycleCalendarTable0 = Table.PromoteHeaders(CycleCalendar),
    CycleCalendarTable = Table.TransformColumnTypes(CycleCalendarTable0,
        {{"7_Day_Start", type date},
         {"7_Day_End", type date},
         {"Report_Name", type text}}),

    // ===========================================
    // BACKFILL FLAG (CYCLE-AWARE)
    // ===========================================
    
    Backfill_Flag_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Period_SortKey_Added,
        "Backfill_7Day",
        each 
            let
                IncidentDate = [Incident_Date_Date],
                ReportDate = [Report_Date],
                
                // Find the current 7-Day cycle (where today falls within start/end dates)
                Today = Date.From(DateTime.LocalNow()),
                CurrentCycle = Table.SelectRows(
                    CycleCalendarTable,
                    each Today >= [7_Day_Start] and Today <= [7_Day_End]
                ),
                
                // Extract current cycle boundaries
                HasCurrentCycle = not Table.IsEmpty(CurrentCycle),
                CycleStartDate = if HasCurrentCycle then CurrentCycle{0}[7_Day_Start] else null,
                CycleEndDate = if HasCurrentCycle then CurrentCycle{0}[7_Day_End] else null,
                
                // Calculate previous cycle boundaries (7 days before current cycle)
                PreviousCycleStart = if HasCurrentCycle then CycleStartDate - #duration(7, 0, 0, 0) else null,
                PreviousCycleEnd = if HasCurrentCycle then CycleStartDate - #duration(1, 0, 0, 0) else null,
                
                // Enhanced backfill logic: Incident before current cycle, but reported within current OR previous cycle
                IsBackfill = 
                    if HasCurrentCycle and IncidentDate <> null and ReportDate <> null then
                        let
                            // Check if reported in current cycle
                            ReportedInCurrentCycle = (ReportDate >= CycleStartDate and ReportDate <= CycleEndDate),
                            
                            // Check if reported in previous cycle
                            ReportedInPreviousCycle = (ReportDate >= PreviousCycleStart and ReportDate <= PreviousCycleEnd),
                            
                            // Backfill if incident before current cycle AND reported in current or previous cycle
                            IsBackfillResult = (IncidentDate < CycleStartDate) and (ReportedInCurrentCycle or ReportedInPreviousCycle)
                        in IsBackfillResult
                    else false
            in IsBackfill,
        type logical
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // CYCLE_NAME (SCRPA CYCLE ASSIGNMENT)
    // ===========================================
    
    CycleName_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Backfill_Flag_Added,
        "cycle_name",
        each 
            let
                IncidentDate = [Incident_Date_Date],
                CycleResult = 
                    if IncidentDate = null then "Unknown"
                    else
                        let
                            MatchingCycles = Table.SelectRows(
                                CycleCalendarTable, 
                                each 
                                    let
                                        StartDate = Date.FromText([7_Day_Start]),
                                        EndDate = Date.FromText([7_Day_End])
                                    in IncidentDate >= StartDate and IncidentDate <= EndDate
                            ),
                            
                            CycleName = 
                                if Table.IsEmpty(MatchingCycles) then "Historical"
                                else MatchingCycles{0}[Report_Name]
                        in CycleName
            in CycleResult,
        type text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // CYCLE NAME OVERRIDE FOR BACKFILLED CASES
    // ===========================================
    
    Cycle_Name_Adjusted = Table.AddColumn(
        CycleName_Added,
        "cycle_name_adjusted",
        each 
            if [Backfill_7Day] = true then
                let
                    Today = Date.From(DateTime.LocalNow()),
                    CurrentCycle = Table.SelectRows(
                        CycleCalendarTable,
                        each Today >= [7_Day_Start] and Today <= [7_Day_End]
                    ),
                    CurrentCycleName = if not Table.IsEmpty(CurrentCycle) then CurrentCycle{0}[Report_Name] else [cycle_name]
                in CurrentCycleName
            else [cycle_name],
        type text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // IS LAG DAY & LAG DAYS (CYCLE-AWARE: DAYS INCIDENT PRECEDES CYCLE START)
    // ===========================================
    
    IsLagDay_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Cycle_Name_Adjusted,
        "IsLagDay",
        each 
            let
                IncidentDate = [Incident_Date_Date],
                ReportDate = [Report_Date]
            in
                if IncidentDate = null or ReportDate = null then false
                else
                    let
                        // Find the cycle that the Report Date falls into
                        ReportCycle = Table.SelectRows(
                            CycleCalendarTable,
                            each ReportDate >= [7_Day_Start] and ReportDate <= [7_Day_End]
                        ),
                        HasReportCycle = not Table.IsEmpty(ReportCycle),
                        CycleStartForReport = if HasReportCycle then ReportCycle{0}[7_Day_Start] else null,
                        // IsLagDay: true if incident date precedes cycle start
                        IsLagDayValue = CycleStartForReport <> null and IncidentDate < CycleStartForReport
                    in IsLagDayValue,
        type logical
    ),

    LagDays_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        IsLagDay_Added,
        "LagDays",
        each 
            let
                IncidentDate = [Incident_Date_Date],
                ReportDate = [Report_Date],
                IsLag = [IsLagDay]
            in
                if IncidentDate = null or ReportDate = null then null
                else if not IsLag then 0
                else
                    let
                        // Find the cycle that the Report Date falls into
                        ReportCycle = Table.SelectRows(
                            CycleCalendarTable,
                            each ReportDate >= [7_Day_Start] and ReportDate <= [7_Day_End]
                        ),
                        HasReportCycle = not Table.IsEmpty(ReportCycle),
                        CycleStartForReport = if HasReportCycle then ReportCycle{0}[7_Day_Start] else null,
                        // Calculate LagDays: days incident precedes cycle start (0 if not lagday)
                        LagDaysValue = if CycleStartForReport <> null then
                            Duration.Days(CycleStartForReport - IncidentDate) else 0
                    in LagDaysValue,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    StartOfHour_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        LagDays_Added, 
        "StartOfHour",
        each 
            try
                if [BestTimeValue] <> null then
                    let
                        Hour = Time.Hour([BestTimeValue]),
                        StartTime = #time(Hour, 0, 0)
                    in Time.ToText(StartTime, "hh:mm:ss")
                else "00:00:00"
            otherwise "00:00:00",
        type text
    ),

    TimeOfDay_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        StartOfHour_Added, 
        "TimeOfDay", 
        each 
            try
                if [BestTimeValue] <> null then
                    let
                        Hour = Time.Hour([BestTimeValue]),
                        Category = 
                            if Hour >= 4 and Hour < 8 then "Early Morning (04:00–07:59)"
                            else if Hour >= 8 and Hour < 12 then "Morning (08:00–11:59)"
                            else if Hour >= 12 and Hour < 16 then "Afternoon (12:00–15:59)"
                            else if Hour >= 16 and Hour < 20 then "Evening Peak (16:00–19:59)"
                            else if Hour >= 20 and Hour < 24 then "Night (20:00–23:59)"
                            else "Late Night (00:00–03:59)"
                    in Category
                else "Unknown Time"
            otherwise "Time_Category_Error",
        type text
    ),

    TimeOfDay_SortKey_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeOfDay_Added,
        "TimeOfDay_SortKey",
        each 
            let
                TimeOfDay = [TimeOfDay],
                SortKey = 
                    if TimeOfDay = "Late Night (00:00–03:59)" then 1
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Early Morning (04:00–07:59)" then 2
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Morning (08:00–11:59)" then 3
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Afternoon (12:00–15:59)" then 4
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Evening Peak (16:00–19:59)" then 5
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Night (20:00–23:59)" then 6
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Unknown Time" then 99
                    else 0
            in SortKey,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    AllIncidents_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeOfDay_SortKey_Added,
        "ALL_INCIDENTS",
        each
            [Incident Type_1]
            & (if [Incident Type_2] <> null then ", "&[Incident Type_2] else "")
            & (if [Incident Type_3] <> null then ", "&[Incident Type_3] else ""),
        type text
    ),

    CrimeCategory_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        AllIncidents_Added,
        "Crime_Category",
        each let
            L = Text.Upper([ALL_INCIDENTS] ?? ""),
            N = Text.Upper([Narrative] ?? "")
        in
            if Text.Contains(L, "MOTOR VEHICLE THEFT") and (Text.Contains(N, "THEFT OF HIS PROPERTY") or Text.Contains(N, "THEFT FROM MOTOR VEHICLE")) then "Burglary Auto"
            else if Text.Contains(L, "MOTOR VEHICLE THEFT") then "Motor Vehicle Theft"
            else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - AUTO"), Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - AUTO"), Text.Contains(L, "THEFT FROM MOTOR VEHICLE")}) then "Burglary Auto"
            else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - COMMERCIAL"), Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - COMMERCIAL"), Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - RESIDENCE"), Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - RESIDENCE")}) then "Burglary - Comm & Res"
            else if Text.Contains(L, "ROBBERY") then "Robbery"
            else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "SEXUAL"), Text.Contains(L, "RAPE")}) then "Sexual Offenses"
            else "Other",
        type text
    ),

    CleanIncidentTypes_Added = Table.TransformColumns(
        CrimeCategory_Added,
        {
            {"Incident Type_1", each if _<>null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_," - 2C") else _, type text},
            {"Incident Type_2", each if _<>null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_," - 2C") else _, type text},
            {"Incident Type_3", each if _<>null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_," - 2C") else _, type text}
        }
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // NORMALIZE "ATTEMPTED" BURGLARIES
    // ===========================================
    
    Incident_Type_1_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        CleanIncidentTypes_Added,
        "Incident_Type_1_Norm",
        each 
            if [Incident Type_1] <> null then
                Text.Replace([Incident Type_1], "Attempted Burglary", "Burglary")
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    
    Incident_Type_2_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Type_1_Norm_Added,
        "Incident_Type_2_Norm",
        each 
            if [Incident Type_2] <> null then
                Text.Replace([Incident Type_2], "Attempted Burglary", "Burglary")
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    
    Incident_Type_3_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Type_2_Norm_Added,
        "Incident_Type_3_Norm",
        each 
            if [Incident Type_3] <> null then
                Text.Replace([Incident Type_3], "Attempted Burglary", "Burglary")
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // NARRATIVE CLEANING
    // ===========================================
    
    Narrative_Cleaned = Table.TransformColumns(
        Incident_Type_3_Norm_Added,
        {{"Narrative", each 
            if _ = null or _ = "" then null
            else
                let
                    text = _,
                    step1 = Text.Replace(Text.Replace(Text.Replace(text, "#(cr)#(lf)", " "), "#(lf)", " "), "#(cr)", " "),
                    step2 = Text.Replace(Text.Replace(Text.Replace(step1, "    ", " "), "   ", " "), "  ", " "),
                    step3 = Text.Clean(step2),
                    step4 = Text.Trim(step3),
                    final = if step4 = "" then null else step4
                in final,
            type text
        }}
    ),
    
    // ===========================================
    // VEHICLE FORMATTING
    // ===========================================
    
    Vehicle_1_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Narrative_Cleaned,
        "Vehicle_1",
        each 
            let
                regState = if [#"Reg State 1"] <> null then Text.From([#"Reg State 1"]) else "",
                registration = if [#"Registration 1"] <> null then Text.From([#"Registration 1"]) else "",
                make = if [Make1] <> null then Text.From([Make1]) else "",
                model = if [Model1] <> null then Text.From([Model1]) else "",
                hasData = regState <> "" or registration <> "" or make <> "" or model <> ""
            in
                if hasData then
                    let
                        stateReg = 
                            if regState <> "" and registration <> "" then regState & " - " & registration
                            else if registration <> "" then registration
                            else if regState <> "" then regState
                            else "",
                        
                        makeModel = 
                            if make <> "" and model <> "" then make & "/" & model
                            else if make <> "" then make
                            else if model <> "" then model
                            else "",
                        
                        result = 
                            if stateReg <> "" and makeModel <> "" then stateReg & ", " & makeModel
                            else if stateReg <> "" then stateReg
                            else if makeModel <> "" then makeModel
                            else ""
                    in
                        if result = "" then null else Text.Upper(result)
                else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    
    Vehicle_2_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_1_Added,
        "Vehicle_2",
        each 
            let
                regState = if [#"Reg State 2"] <> null then Text.From([#"Reg State 2"]) else "",
                registration = if [#"Registration 2"] <> null then Text.From([#"Registration 2"]) else "",
                make = if [Make2] <> null then Text.From([Make2]) else "",
                model = if [Model2] <> null then Text.From([Model2]) else "",
                hasData = regState <> "" or registration <> "" or make <> "" or model <> ""
            in
                if hasData then
                    let
                        stateReg = 
                            if regState <> "" and registration <> "" then regState & " - " & registration
                            else if registration <> "" then registration
                            else if regState <> "" then regState
                            else "",
                        
                        makeModel = 
                            if make <> "" and model <> "" then make & "/" & model
                            else if make <> "" then make
                            else if model <> "" then model
                            else "",
                        
                        result = 
                            if stateReg <> "" and makeModel <> "" then stateReg & ", " & makeModel
                            else if stateReg <> "" then stateReg
                            else if makeModel <> "" then makeModel
                            else ""
                    in
                        if result = "" then null else Text.Upper(result)
                else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    
    Vehicle_Combined_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_2_Added,
        "Vehicle_1_and_Vehicle_2",
        each 
            if [Vehicle_1] <> null and [Vehicle_2] <> null then
                [Vehicle_1] & " | " & [Vehicle_2]
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // CLEAN ADDRESS (REMOVE CITY/STATE/ZIP)
    // ===========================================
    
    Clean_Address_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_Combined_Added,
        "Clean_Address",
        each 
            if [FullAddress] <> null and [FullAddress] <> "" then
                let
                    address = Text.Trim([FullAddress]),
                    cleaned = Text.BeforeDelimiter(address, ", Hackensack, NJ", {0, RelativePosition.FromStart})
                in
                    if cleaned <> "" then cleaned else address
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    CallTypeCategories = Csv.Document(File.Contents("C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\09_Reference\Classifications\CallTypes\CallType_Categories.csv")),
    CallTypeCategoriesTable = Table.PromoteHeaders(CallTypeCategories),
    
    CategoryType_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Clean_Address_Added,
        "Category_Type",
        each
            let
                IncidentToMatch = if [ALL_INCIDENTS] <> null and [ALL_INCIDENTS] <> "" then [ALL_INCIDENTS] else [Incident Type_1],
                MatchingCategory = 
                    if IncidentToMatch = null or IncidentToMatch = "" then "Unknown"
                    else
                        let
                            ExactMatch = Table.SelectRows(
                                CallTypeCategoriesTable,
                                each [Incident] = IncidentToMatch or [Incident_Norm] = IncidentToMatch
                            ),
                            PartialMatch = if Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) then
                                Table.SelectRows(
                                    CallTypeCategoriesTable,
                                    each Text.Contains(IncidentToMatch, [Incident]) or Text.Contains([Incident], IncidentToMatch)
                                )
                            else ExactMatch,
                            CategoryResult = 
                                if Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) and Table.IsEmpty(PartialMatch) then "Unknown"
                                else if not Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) then ExactMatch{0}[Category_Type]
                                else PartialMatch{0}[Category_Type]
                        in CategoryResult
            in MatchingCategory,
        type text
    ),
    
    ResponseType_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        CategoryType_Added,
        "Response_Type",
        each
            let
                IncidentToMatch = if [ALL_INCIDENTS] <> null and [ALL_INCIDENTS] <> "" then [ALL_INCIDENTS] else [Incident Type_1],
                MatchingResponse = 
                    if IncidentToMatch = null or IncidentToMatch = "" then "Unknown"
                    else
                        let
                            ExactMatch = Table.SelectRows(
                                CallTypeCategoriesTable,
                                each [Incident] = IncidentToMatch or [Incident_Norm] = IncidentToMatch
                            ),
                            PartialMatch = if Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) then
                                Table.SelectRows(
                                    CallTypeCategoriesTable,
                                    each Text.Contains(IncidentToMatch, [Incident]) or Text.Contains([Incident], IncidentToMatch)
                                )
                            else ExactMatch,
                            ResponseResult = 
                                if Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) and Table.IsEmpty(PartialMatch) then "Unknown"
                                else if not Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) then ExactMatch{0}[Response_Type]
                                else PartialMatch{0}[Response_Type]
                        in ResponseResult
            in MatchingResponse,
        type text
    ),

    TimeValidation_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        ResponseType_Added,
        "Time_Validation",
        each 
            let
                OriginalIncidentTime = [Incident Time],
                OriginalIncidentTimeBetween = [Incident Time_Between], 
                OriginalReportTime = [Report Time],
                CascadedTime = [BestTimeValue],
                TimeSource = [TimeSource],
                
                ValidationText = 
                    "Source: " & TimeSource & 
                    " | Original IT: " & (if OriginalIncidentTime <> null then Text.From(OriginalIncidentTime) else "null") &
                    " | Original ITB: " & (if OriginalIncidentTimeBetween <> null then Text.From(OriginalIncidentTimeBetween) else "null") &
                    " | Original RT: " & (if OriginalReportTime <> null then Text.From(OriginalReportTime) else "null") &
                    " | Cascaded: " & (if CascadedTime <> null then Time.ToText(CascadedTime) else "null")
            in ValidationText,
        type text
    ),

    FinalResult = TimeValidation_Added,

#"Sorted Rows" = Table.Sort(FinalResult, {{"Incident Date", Order.Ascending }, 
                                           {"Period", Order.Descending}, 
                                           {"Report Date", Order.Ascending}, 
                                           {
  "Report_Date", Order.Ascending
}
}),
#"Changed Type" =                                                              \
    Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Sorted Rows",                                 \
                               {{"Report Time", type time },                   \
                                 {"Incident Time_Between", type time },        \
                                  {"Incident Time", type time } }),
#"Sorted Rows1" = Table.Sort(#"Changed Type", {{"Report Date",                 \
                                                Order.Ascending } })
in
#"Sorted Rows1"
```

Fixing the cycle name calculation to use typed dates:


```objective-c
// 🕒 2025-10-07-16-45-00
// # SCRPA_Time_v2/All_Crimes_Query
// # Author: R. A. Carucci
// # Purpose: Complete RMS data processing with cascading time/date logic,
// backfill tracking, # narrative cleaning, vehicle formatting, Period sort key,
// and Attempted Burglary normalization

/*
============================================================
COMPLETE CASCADING TIME LOGIC WITH ATTEMPTED BURGLARY GROUPING
============================================================
Author: R. A. Carucci
Date: 2025-10-07
Purpose: Comprehensive RMS data processing with incident dating, backfill
tracking, narrative cleaning, vehicle formatting, Period sort key, and
normalization of Attempted Burglary offenses for SCRPA crime analysis.

ENHANCEMENTS:
- Report_Date tracking with cascading logic
- LagDays calculation for reporting delay analysis
- Backfill_7Day flag (cycle-aware, not rolling window)
- Narrative text cleaning (line breaks, whitespace normalization)
- Vehicle_1, Vehicle_2, Vehicle_1_and_Vehicle_2 formatting (uppercase)
- Period_SortKey for proper chart ordering (7-Day, 28-Day, YTD, Historical)
- Attempted Burglary normalization for visual grouping
- cycle_name_adjusted for backfilled cases
*/

let
    // ===========================================
    // IMPORT MOST RECENT EXCEL FILE DYNAMICALLY
    // ===========================================

    FolderPath = "C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\05_EXPORTS\_RMS\SCRPA",
    AllFiles = Folder.Files(FolderPath),
    XlsxFiles = Table.SelectRows(AllFiles, each Text.EndsWith([Name], ".xlsx", Comparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)),
    SortedFiles = Table.Sort(XlsxFiles, {{"Date modified", Order.Descending}}),
    LatestFilePath = SortedFiles{0}[Folder Path] & SortedFiles{0}[Name],
    Source = Excel.Workbook(File.Contents(LatestFilePath), true),
    FirstTable = Source{0}[Data],
    
    // ===========================================
    // ENHANCED TIME PROCESSING WITH INLINE CASCADING LOGIC
    // ===========================================
    
    BestTimeValueAdded = Table.AddColumn(
        FirstTable,
        "BestTimeValue", 
        each 
            let
                ParsedIncidentTime = 
                    if [Incident Time] = null or [Incident Time] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type time then [Incident Time]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type duration then try Time.From([Incident Time]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type text then
                        let
                            CleanText = Text.Trim([Incident Time]),
                            ParsedTime = 
                                try Time.FromText(CleanText)
                                otherwise try Time.FromText(CleanText & ":00")
                                otherwise try 
                                    let
                                        TimePattern = Text.AfterDelimiter(CleanText, " ", {0, RelativePosition.FromEnd}),
                                        ExtractedTime = if Text.Contains(TimePattern, ":") then Time.FromText(TimePattern) else null
                                    in ExtractedTime
                                otherwise null
                        in ParsedTime
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type datetime then Time.From([Incident Time])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type number then try Time.From([Incident Time]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedIncidentTimeBetween = 
                    if [Incident Time_Between] = null or [Incident Time_Between] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type time then [Incident Time_Between]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type duration then try Time.From([Incident Time_Between]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type text then
                        let
                            CleanText = Text.Trim([Incident Time_Between]),
                            ParsedTime = 
                                try Time.FromText(CleanText)
                                otherwise try Time.FromText(CleanText & ":00")
                                otherwise try 
                                    let
                                        TimePattern = Text.AfterDelimiter(CleanText, " ", {0, RelativePosition.FromEnd}),
                                        ExtractedTime = if Text.Contains(TimePattern, ":") then Time.FromText(TimePattern) else null
                                    in ExtractedTime
                                otherwise null
                        in ParsedTime
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type datetime then Time.From([Incident Time_Between])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type number then try Time.From([Incident Time_Between]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedReportTime = 
                    if [Report Time] = null or [Report Time] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type time then [Report Time]
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type duration then try Time.From([Report Time]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type text then
                        let
                            CleanText = Text.Trim([Report Time]),
                            ParsedTime = 
                                try Time.FromText(CleanText)
                                otherwise try Time.FromText(CleanText & ":00")
                                otherwise try 
                                    let
                                        TimePattern = Text.AfterDelimiter(CleanText, " ", {0, RelativePosition.FromEnd}),
                                        ExtractedTime = if Text.Contains(TimePattern, ":") then Time.FromText(TimePattern) else null
                                    in ExtractedTime
                                otherwise null
                        in ParsedTime
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type datetime then Time.From([Report Time])
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type number then try Time.From([Report Time]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                BestTime = 
                    if ParsedIncidentTime <> null then ParsedIncidentTime
                    else if ParsedIncidentTimeBetween <> null then ParsedIncidentTimeBetween
                    else if ParsedReportTime <> null then ParsedReportTime
                    else null
            in BestTime,
        type nullable time
    ),
    
    TimeSourceAdded = Table.AddColumn(
        BestTimeValueAdded,
        "TimeSource",
        each 
            let
                IncidentTimeParsed = 
                    if [Incident Time] = null or [Incident Time] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type time then [Incident Time]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type duration then try Time.From([Incident Time]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type text then try Time.FromText(Text.Trim([Incident Time])) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type datetime then Time.From([Incident Time])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type number then try Time.From([Incident Time]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                IncidentTimeBetweenParsed = 
                    if [Incident Time_Between] = null or [Incident Time_Between] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type time then [Incident Time_Between]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type duration then try Time.From([Incident Time_Between]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type text then try Time.FromText(Text.Trim([Incident Time_Between])) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type datetime then Time.From([Incident Time_Between])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type number then try Time.From([Incident Time_Between]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ReportTimeParsed = 
                    if [Report Time] = null or [Report Time] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type time then [Report Time]
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type duration then try Time.From([Report Time]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type text then try Time.FromText(Text.Trim([Report Time])) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type datetime then Time.From([Report Time])
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type number then try Time.From([Report Time]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                Source = 
                    if IncidentTimeParsed <> null then "Incident Time"
                    else if IncidentTimeBetweenParsed <> null then "Incident Time_Between"
                    else if ReportTimeParsed <> null then "Report Time"
                    else "None"
            in Source,
        type text
    ),

    Incident_Time_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeSourceAdded, 
        "Incident_Time", 
        each 
            try
                let
                    BestTime = [BestTimeValue],
                    TimeText = 
                        if BestTime <> null then
                            let
                                Hours = Time.Hour(BestTime),
                                Minutes = Time.Minute(BestTime),
                                Seconds = Time.Second(BestTime),
                                FormattedTime = 
                                    Text.PadStart(Text.From(Hours), 2, "0") & ":" &
                                    Text.PadStart(Text.From(Minutes), 2, "0") & ":" &
                                    Text.PadStart(Text.From(Seconds), 2, "0")
                            in FormattedTime
                        else "00:00:00"
                in TimeText
            otherwise "Time_Error",
        type text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // ENHANCED INCIDENT_DATE PROCESSING WITH CASCADING LOGIC
    // ===========================================
    
    Incident_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Time_Added, 
        "Incident_Date", 
        each 
            let
                ParsedIncidentDate = 
                    if [Incident Date] = null or [Incident Date] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type date then [Incident Date]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type datetime then Date.From([Incident Date])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Incident Date]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type number then try Date.From([Incident Date]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedIncidentDateBetween = 
                    if [Incident Date_Between] = null or [Incident Date_Between] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type date then [Incident Date_Between]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type datetime then Date.From([Incident Date_Between])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Incident Date_Between]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type number then try Date.From([Incident Date_Between]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedReportDate = 
                    if [Report Date] = null or [Report Date] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type date then [Report Date]
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type datetime then Date.From([Report Date])
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type number then try Date.From([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                BestDate = 
                    if ParsedIncidentDate <> null then ParsedIncidentDate
                    else if ParsedIncidentDateBetween <> null then ParsedIncidentDateBetween
                    else if ParsedReportDate <> null then ParsedReportDate
                    else null,
                
                DateText = 
                    if BestDate <> null then Date.ToText(BestDate, "MM/dd/yy")
                    else "Unknown"
            in DateText,
        type text
    ),

    Incident_Date_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Date_Added,
        "Incident_Date_Date",
        each 
            let
                ParsedIncidentDate = 
                    if [Incident Date] = null or [Incident Date] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type date then [Incident Date]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type datetime then Date.From([Incident Date])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Incident Date]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type number then try Date.From([Incident Date]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedIncidentDateBetween = 
                    if [Incident Date_Between] = null or [Incident Date_Between] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type date then [Incident Date_Between]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type datetime then Date.From([Incident Date_Between])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Incident Date_Between]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type number then try Date.From([Incident Date_Between]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedReportDate = 
                    if [Report Date] = null or [Report Date] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type date then [Report Date]
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type datetime then Date.From([Report Date])
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type number then try Date.From([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                BestDate = 
                    if ParsedIncidentDate <> null then ParsedIncidentDate
                    else if ParsedIncidentDateBetween <> null then ParsedIncidentDateBetween
                    else if ParsedReportDate <> null then ParsedReportDate
                    else null
            in BestDate,
        type date
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // REPORT DATE PROCESSING WITH CASCADING LOGIC
    // ===========================================
    
    Report_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Date_Date_Added,
        "Report_Date",
        each 
            let
                ParsedReportDate = 
                    if [Report Date] = null or [Report Date] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type date then [Report Date]
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type datetime then Date.From([Report Date])
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type number then try Date.From([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedEntryDate = 
                    if [EntryDate] = null or [EntryDate] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([EntryDate]) = type date then [EntryDate]
                    else if Value.Type([EntryDate]) = type datetime then Date.From([EntryDate])
                    else if Value.Type([EntryDate]) = type text then try Date.FromText([EntryDate]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([EntryDate]) = type number then try Date.From([EntryDate]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                BestReportDate = 
                    if ParsedReportDate <> null then ParsedReportDate
                    else if ParsedEntryDate <> null then ParsedEntryDate
                    else [Incident_Date_Date]
            in BestReportDate,
        type nullable date
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // REPORT DATE TEXT (FORMATTED MM/dd/yy)
    // ===========================================
    
    Report_Date_Text_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Report_Date_Added,
        "Report_Date_Text",
        each 
            if [Report_Date] <> null then
                Date.ToText([Report_Date], "MM/dd/yy")
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    
    // ===========================================
    // INCIDENT TO REPORT DAYS (QA METRIC - REPORTING DELAY)
    // ===========================================
    
    IncidentToReportDays_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Report_Date_Text_Added,
        "IncidentToReportDays",
        each 
            if [Report_Date] <> null and [Incident_Date_Date] <> null then
                Duration.Days([Report_Date] - [Incident_Date_Date])
            else null,
        Int64.Type
    ),
    
    // ===========================================
    // PERIOD BUCKETS
    // ===========================================
    
    Period_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        IncidentToReportDays_Added,
        "Period",
        each let d = Duration.Days(Date.From(DateTime.LocalNow()) - [Incident_Date_Date]) in
            if d <= 7 then "7-Day"
            else if d <= 28 then "28-Day"
            else if Date.Year([Incident_Date_Date]) = Date.Year(DateTime.LocalNow()) then "YTD"
            else "Historical",
        type text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // PERIOD SORT KEY
    // ===========================================
    
    Period_SortKey_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Period_Added,
        "Period_SortKey",
        each 
            if [Period] = "7-Day" then 1
            else if [Period] = "28-Day" then 2
            else if [Period] = "YTD" then 3
            else if [Period] = "Historical" then 4
            else 99,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // LOAD CYCLE CALENDAR (USED BY BACKFILL & CYCLE_NAME)
    // ===========================================
    
    CycleCalendar = Csv.Document(File.Contents("C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\09_Reference\Temporal\SCRPA_Cycle\7Day_28Day_Cycle_20250414.csv")),
    CycleCalendarTable0 = Table.PromoteHeaders(CycleCalendar),
    CycleCalendarTable = Table.TransformColumnTypes(CycleCalendarTable0,
        {{"7_Day_Start", type date},
         {"7_Day_End", type date},
         {"Report_Name", type text}}),

    // ===========================================
    // BACKFILL FLAG (CYCLE-AWARE)
    // ===========================================
    
    Backfill_Flag_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Period_SortKey_Added,
        "Backfill_7Day",
        each 
            let
                IncidentDate = [Incident_Date_Date],
                ReportDate = [Report_Date],
                
                // Find the current 7-Day cycle (where today falls within start/end dates)
                Today = Date.From(DateTime.LocalNow()),
```
