**User**

make Incident Time, Incident Time_Between and Report Time a Time only data type

---

**Cursor**

Checking how these time columns are handled and ensuring they're typed as time:


Adding a step to convert "Incident Time", "Incident Time_Between", and "Report Time" to time type:


```objective-c
// 🕒 2025-10-07-16-45-00
// # SCRPA_Time_v2/All_Crimes_Query
// # Author: R. A. Carucci
// # Purpose: Complete RMS data processing with cascading time/date logic,
// backfill tracking, # narrative cleaning, vehicle formatting, Period sort key,
// and Attempted Burglary normalization

let
    // -----------------------------
    // Helpers
    // -----------------------------
    CoalesceText = (a as nullable text, b as nullable text) as nullable text => if a = null or a = "" then b else a,
    CoalesceAny = (a as any, b as any) as any => if a = null then b else a,

    // ===========================================
    // REFERENCE STAGING QUERIES (NO DIRECT DATA ACCESS)
    // ===========================================
    FirstTable = Table.Buffer(q_RMS_Source),
    CycleCalendar = q_CycleCalendar,
    CallTypeCategories = q_CallTypeCategories,

    // -----------------------------
    // Compute "Today" once
    // -----------------------------
    Today = Date.From(DateTime.LocalNow()),

    // ===========================================
    // ENHANCED TIME PROCESSING WITH CASCADING LOGIC
    // ===========================================
    BestTimeValueAdded = Table.AddColumn(
        FirstTable, "BestTimeValue",
        each let IT = try[Incident Time] otherwise null,
        ITB = try[Incident Time_Between] otherwise null,
        RT = try[Report Time] otherwise null,

        AsTime = (v as any)as nullable time =
            >
            if v = null or
                   v = "" then null else if Value
                           .Is(v, type time) then v else if Value
                           .Is(v, type duration)
                               then(try Time.From(v)
                                        otherwise null) else if Value
                           .Is(v, type datetime) then Time.From(v) else if Value
                           .Is(v, type number) then(try Time.From(
                               v) otherwise null) else if Value.Is(v, type text)
                               then let t = Text.Trim(Text.From(v)),
        t1 = (try Time.FromText(t) otherwise null),
        t2 = if t1 = null then(try Time.FromText(t & ":00")
                                   otherwise null) else t1 in t2 else null,

        PIT = AsTime(IT), PITB = AsTime(ITB), PRT = AsTime(RT),

        Best = if PIT<> null then PIT else if PITB<> null then PITB else PRT in
            Best,
        type nullable time),

    TimeSourceAdded = Table.AddColumn(
        BestTimeValueAdded, "TimeSource",
        each let AsTimeQuick = (v as any)as nullable time =
            > if v =
                null or
                v = "" then null else if Value
                        .Is(v, type time)
                            then v else if Value.Is(v, type datetime)
                                then Time.From(v) else if Value
                        .Is(v, type duration)
                            then(try Time.From(v) otherwise null) else if Value
                        .Is(v, type number) then(try Time.From(
                            v) otherwise null) else if Value.Is(v, type text)
                            then(try Time.FromText(Text.Trim(Text.From(v)))
                                     otherwise null) else null,

        PIT = AsTimeQuick(try[Incident Time] otherwise null),
        PITB = AsTimeQuick(try[Incident Time_Between] otherwise null),
        PRT = AsTimeQuick(try[Report Time] otherwise null) in if PIT<> null then
        "Incident Time" else if PITB<>
            null then "Incident Time_Between" else if PRT<>
                null then "Report Time" else "None",
        type text),

    Incident_Time_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeSourceAdded, "Incident_Time",
        each let bt = [BestTimeValue] in if bt<> null then
                          Text.PadStart(Text.From(Time.Hour(bt)), 2, "0") &
                      ":" & Text.PadStart(Text.From(Time.Minute(bt)), 2, "0") &
                      ":" &
                      Text.PadStart(Text.From(Time.Second(bt)), 2,
                                    "0") else "00:00:00",
        type text),

    // ===========================================
    // INCIDENT DATE (TEXT + DATE) WITH CASCADE
    // ===========================================
    Incident_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Time_Added, "Incident_Date",
        each let AsDate = (v as any)as nullable date =
            > if v =
                null or
                v = "" then null else if Value
                        .Is(v, type date)
                            then v else if Value.Is(v, type datetime)
                                then Date.From(v) else if Value
                        .Is(v, type number)
                            then(try Date.From(v) otherwise null) else if Value
                        .Is(v, type text) then(try Date.FromText(Text.From(v))
                                                   otherwise null) else null,

        dIT = AsDate(try[Incident Date] otherwise null),
        dITB = AsDate(try[Incident Date_Between] otherwise null),
        dRT = AsDate(try[Report Date] otherwise null),
        Best = if dIT<> null then dIT else if dITB<> null then
                   dITB else dRT in if Best<>
                       null then Date.ToText(Best, "MM/dd/yy") else "Unknown",
        type text),

    Incident_Date_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Date_Added, "Incident_Date_Date",
        each let AsDate = (v as any)as nullable date =
            > if v =
                null or
                v = "" then null else if Value
                        .Is(v, type date)
                            then v else if Value.Is(v, type datetime)
                                then Date.From(v) else if Value
                        .Is(v, type number)
                            then(try Date.From(v) otherwise null) else if Value
                        .Is(v, type text) then(try Date.FromText(Text.From(v))
                                                   otherwise null) else null,

        dIT = AsDate(try[Incident Date] otherwise null),
        dITB = AsDate(try[Incident Date_Between] otherwise null),
        dRT = AsDate(try[Report Date] otherwise null),
        Best = if dIT<> null then dIT else if dITB<> null then dITB else dRT in
            Best,
        type date),

    // ===========================================
    // REPORT DATE (DATE + TEXT)
    // ===========================================
    Report_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Date_Date_Added, "Report_Date",
        each let AsDate = (v as any)as nullable date =
            > if v =
                null or
                v = "" then null else if Value
                        .Is(v, type date)
                            then v else if Value.Is(v, type datetime)
                                then Date.From(v) else if Value
                        .Is(v, type number)
                            then(try Date.From(v) otherwise null) else if Value
                        .Is(v, type text) then(try Date.FromText(Text.From(v))
                                                   otherwise null) else null,

        dRD = AsDate(try[Report Date] otherwise null),
        dED = AsDate(try[EntryDate] otherwise null),
        Best = CoalesceAny(dRD, CoalesceAny(dED, [Incident_Date_Date])) in Best,
        type nullable date),

    Report_Date_Text_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Report_Date_Added, "Report_Date_Text",
        each if[Report_Date]<> null then Date.ToText([Report_Date],
                                                     "MM/dd/yy") else null,
        type nullable text),

    // ===========================================
    // INCIDENT TO REPORT DAYS (QA METRIC - REPORTING DELAY)
    // ===========================================
    IncidentToReportDays_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Report_Date_Text_Added, "IncidentToReportDays",
        each if[Report_Date]<> null and[Incident_Date_Date]<> null then
            Duration.Days([Report_Date] - [Incident_Date_Date]) else null,
        Int64.Type),

    Period_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        IncidentToReportDays_Added, "Period",
        each let d = if[Incident_Date_Date] =
            null then null else Duration.Days(Today - [Incident_Date_Date])
                in if d = null then "Historical" else if d <= 7 then
                          "7-Day" else if d <=
                          28 then
                          "28-Day" else if Date.Year([Incident_Date_Date]) =
                              Date.Year(Today) then "YTD" else "Historical",
        type text),

    Period_SortKey_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Period_Added, "Period_SortKey",
        each if[Period] = "7-Day" then 1 else if[Period] =
            "28-Day" then 2 else if[Period] = "YTD" then 3 else if[Period] =
                "Historical" then 4 else 99,
        Int64.Type),

    // ===========================================
    // PRECOMPUTE CURRENT CYCLE (CycleCalendar already loaded from staging query)
    // ===========================================
    CurrentCycleTbl = Table.SelectRows(CycleCalendar,
                                       each Today >= [7_Day_Start] and
                                           Today <= [7_Day_End]),
    HasCurrentCycle = not Table.IsEmpty(CurrentCycleTbl),
    CurrentCycleStart = if HasCurrentCycle
        then CurrentCycleTbl{0}[7_Day_Start] else null,
    CurrentCycleEnd = if HasCurrentCycle
        then CurrentCycleTbl{0}[7_Day_End] else null,
    CurrentCycleName = if HasCurrentCycle
        then CurrentCycleTbl{0}[Report_Name] else null,

    // ===========================================
    // CYCLE NAME (BY INCIDENT DATE)
    // ===========================================
    CycleName_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Period_SortKey_Added, "cycle_name",
        each let d = [Incident_Date_Date] in if d = null then
        "Unknown" else let m = Table
                                   .SelectRows(CycleCalendar,
                                               each d >= [7_Day_Start] and
                                                   d <= [7_Day_End])
                                       in if Table.IsEmpty(m) then
                               "Historical" else m{0}[Report_Name],
        type text),

    // ===========================================
    // BACKFILL FLAG & ADJUSTED CYCLE NAME
    // ===========================================
    Backfill_Flag_Added =
        Table.AddColumn(CycleName_Added, "Backfill_7Day",
                        each let dI = [Incident_Date_Date],
                        dR = [Report_Date] in HasCurrentCycle and dI<> null and
                             dR<> null and dI < CurrentCycleStart and
                             dR >= CurrentCycleStart and dR <= CurrentCycleEnd,
                        type logical),

    Cycle_Name_Adjusted =
        Table.AddColumn(Backfill_Flag_Added, "cycle_name_adjusted",
                        each if[Backfill_7Day] then CoalesceText(
                            CurrentCycleName, [cycle_name]) else[cycle_name],
                        type text),

    // ===========================================
    // IS LAG DAY & LAG DAYS (CYCLE-AWARE: DAYS INCIDENT PRECEDES CYCLE START)
    // ===========================================
    IsLagDay_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Cycle_Name_Adjusted, "IsLagDay", each let dI = [Incident_Date_Date],
        dR = [Report_Date] in if dI =
            null or dR = null then false else let ReportCycle =
                Table.SelectRows(CycleCalendar, each dR >= [7_Day_Start] and
                                                    dR <= [7_Day_End]),
        HasReportCycle = not Table.IsEmpty(ReportCycle),
        CycleStartForReport = if HasReportCycle then
            ReportCycle{0}[7_Day_Start] else null,
        IsLagDayValue = CycleStartForReport<> null and
                        dI < CycleStartForReport in IsLagDayValue,
        type logical),

    LagDays_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        IsLagDay_Added, "LagDays", each let dI = [Incident_Date_Date],
        dR = [Report_Date],
        IsLag = [IsLagDay] in if dI =
            null or
            dR = null then null else if not IsLag then 0 else let ReportCycle =
                Table.SelectRows(CycleCalendar, each dR >= [7_Day_Start] and
                                                    dR <= [7_Day_End]),
        HasReportCycle = not Table.IsEmpty(ReportCycle),
        CycleStartForReport = if HasReportCycle then
            ReportCycle{0}[7_Day_Start] else null,
        LagDaysValue = if CycleStartForReport<> null then Duration.Days(
            CycleStartForReport - dI) else 0 in LagDaysValue,
        Int64.Type),

    // ===========================================
    // TIME OF DAY
    // ===========================================
    StartOfHour_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        LagDays_Added, "StartOfHour",
        each let bt = [BestTimeValue] in if bt<> null then Time.ToText(
#time(Time.Hour(bt), 0, 0), "hh:mm:ss") else "00:00:00",
        type text),

    TimeOfDay_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        StartOfHour_Added, "TimeOfDay", each let bt = [BestTimeValue],
        hr = if bt = null then null else Time.Hour(bt) in if hr =
            null then "Unknown Time" else if hr >= 4 and
            hr < 8 then "Early Morning (04:00–07:59)" else if hr >= 8 and
            hr < 12 then "Morning (08:00–11:59)" else if hr >= 12 and
            hr < 16 then "Afternoon (12:00–15:59)" else if hr >= 16 and
            hr < 20 then "Evening Peak (16:00–19:59)" else if hr >= 20 and
            hr < 24 then "Night (20:00–23:59)" else "Late Night (00:00–03:59)",
        type text),

    TimeOfDay_SortKey_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeOfDay_Added, "TimeOfDay_SortKey",
        each let t = [TimeOfDay] in if t =
            "Late Night (00:00–03:59)" then 1 else if t =
                "Early Morning (04:00–07:59)" then 2 else if t =
                    "Morning (08:00–11:59)" then 3 else if t =
                        "Afternoon (12:00–15:59)" then 4 else if t =
                            "Evening Peak (16:00–19:59)" then 5 else if t =
                                "Night (20:00–23:59)" then 6 else if t =
                                    "Unknown Time" then 99 else 0,
        Int64.Type),

    // ===========================================
    // INCIDENT CONSOLIDATION & CATEGORY
    // ===========================================
    AllIncidents_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeOfDay_SortKey_Added, "ALL_INCIDENTS",
        each let i1 = try[Incident Type_1] otherwise null,
        i2 = try[Incident Type_2] otherwise null,
        i3 = try[Incident Type_3] otherwise null in(if i1 = null then
                                                    "" else i1) &
             (if i2 = null or i2 = "" then "" else ", " & i2) &
             (if i3 = null or i3 = "" then "" else ", " & i3),
        type text),

    CrimeCategory_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        AllIncidents_Added, "Crime_Category",
        each let L = Text.Upper(CoalesceText([ALL_INCIDENTS], "")),
        N = Text.Upper(CoalesceText(try[Narrative] otherwise null, ""))
                in if Text.Contains(L, "MOTOR VEHICLE THEFT") and
            (Text.Contains(N, "THEFT OF HIS PROPERTY") or
             Text.Contains(N, "THEFT FROM MOTOR VEHICLE")) then
            "Burglary Auto" else if Text
                .Contains(L, "MOTOR VEHICLE THEFT") then
            "Motor Vehicle Theft" else if List
                .AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - AUTO"),
                          Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - AUTO"),
                          Text.Contains(L, "THEFT FROM MOTOR VEHICLE")}) then
            "Burglary Auto" else if List
                .AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - COMMERCIAL"),
                          Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - COMMERCIAL"),
                          Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - RESIDENCE"),
                          Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - RESIDENCE")})
                    then "Burglary - Comm & Res" else if Text
                .Contains(L, "ROBBERY") then
            "Robbery" else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "SEXUAL"),
                                            Text.Contains(L, "RAPE")}) then
            "Sexual Offenses" else "Other",
        type text),

    // Remove statute suffix
    CleanIncidentTypes_Added = Table.TransformColumns(
        CrimeCategory_Added,
        {{"Incident Type_1",
          each if _<> null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_, " - 2C") else _,
          type text},
         {"Incident Type_2",
          each if _<> null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_, " - 2C") else _,
          type text},
         {"Incident Type_3",
          each if _<> null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_, " - 2C") else _,
          type text}}),

    // Normalize "Attempted Burglary" -> "Burglary"
    Incident_Type_1_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        CleanIncidentTypes_Added, "Incident_Type_1_Norm",
        each if[Incident Type_1]<> null then Text.Replace([Incident Type_1],
                                                          "Attempted Burglary",
                                                          "Burglary") else null,
        type nullable text),
    Incident_Type_2_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Type_1_Norm_Added, "Incident_Type_2_Norm",
        each if[Incident Type_2]<> null then Text.Replace([Incident Type_2],
                                                          "Attempted Burglary",
                                                          "Burglary") else null,
        type nullable text),
    Incident_Type_3_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Type_2_Norm_Added, "Incident_Type_3_Norm",
        each if[Incident Type_3]<> null then Text.Replace([Incident Type_3],
                                                          "Attempted Burglary",
                                                          "Burglary") else null,
        type nullable text),

    // ===========================================
    // NARRATIVE CLEANING
    // ===========================================
    Narrative_Cleaned = Table.TransformColumns(
        Incident_Type_3_Norm_Added,
        {{"Narrative", each let t = _,
          step1 = if t = null or t = "" then null else Text.Replace(
                             Text.Replace(Text.Replace(t, "#(cr)#(lf)", " "),
                                          "#(lf)", " "),
                             "#(cr)", " "),
          step2 = if step1 = null then null else Text.Replace(
              Text.Replace(Text.Replace(step1, "    ", " "), "   ", " "), "  ",
              " "),
          step3 = if step2 = null then null else Text.Clean(step2),
          step4 = if step3 = null then null else Text.Trim(step3)
                                 in if step4 = null or
                                               step4 = "" then null else step4,
          type text}}),

    // ===========================================
    // VEHICLE FIELDS
    // ===========================================
    Vehicle_1_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Narrative_Cleaned, "Vehicle_1",
        each let regState = CoalesceText(try Text.From([#"Reg State 1"])
                                             otherwise null,
                                         ""),
        registration = CoalesceText(try Text.From([#"Registration 1"])
                                        otherwise null,
                                    ""),
        make = CoalesceText(try Text.From([Make1]) otherwise null, ""),
        model = CoalesceText(try Text.From([Model1]) otherwise null, ""),

        stateReg = if regState < > "" and
                   registration < > "" then regState & " - " &
                       registration else if registration < >
                           "" then registration else regState,

        makeModel = if make < > "" and
                    model < > "" then make & "/" &
                        model else if make < > "" then make else model,

        result = if stateReg < > "" and
                 makeModel < > "" then stateReg & ", " &
                     makeModel else if stateReg < >
                         "" then stateReg else makeModel in if result =
                     null or result = "" then null else Text.Upper(result),
        type nullable text),

    Vehicle_2_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_1_Added, "Vehicle_2",
        each let regState = CoalesceText(try Text.From([#"Reg State 2"])
                                             otherwise null,
                                         ""),
        registration = CoalesceText(try Text.From([#"Registration 2"])
                                        otherwise null,
                                    ""),
        make = CoalesceText(try Text.From([Make2]) otherwise null, ""),
        model = CoalesceText(try Text.From([Model2]) otherwise null, ""),

        stateReg = if regState < > "" and
                   registration < > "" then regState & " - " &
                       registration else if registration < >
                           "" then registration else regState,

        makeModel = if make < > "" and
                    model < > "" then make & "/" &
                        model else if make < > "" then make else model,

        result = if stateReg < > "" and
                 makeModel < > "" then stateReg & ", " &
                     makeModel else if stateReg < >
                         "" then stateReg else makeModel in if result =
                     null or result = "" then null else Text.Upper(result),
        type nullable text),

    Vehicle_Combined_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_2_Added, "Vehicle_1_and_Vehicle_2",
        each if[Vehicle_1]<> null and[Vehicle_2]<> null then[Vehicle_1] &
            " | " &[Vehicle_2] else null,
        type nullable text),

    // ===========================================
    // CLEAN ADDRESS (REMOVE CITY/STATE/ZIP)
    // ===========================================
    Clean_Address_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_Combined_Added, "Clean_Address",
        each let addr = CoalesceText(
            Text.Trim(CoalesceText(try Text.From([FullAddress]) otherwise null,
                                   "")),
            "") in if addr = "" then null else let cleaned =
            Text.BeforeDelimiter(addr, ", Hackensack, NJ",
                                 {0, RelativePosition.FromStart})
                in if cleaned < >
            "" then cleaned else addr,
        type nullable text),

    // ===========================================
    // FAST CATEGORY/RESPONSE MAPPING VIA JOINS (CallTypeCategories already loaded from staging query)
    // ===========================================
    WithIncidentKey = Table.AddColumn(
        Clean_Address_Added, "IncidentKey",
        each CoalesceText([ALL_INCIDENTS], try[Incident Type_1] otherwise null),
        type text),

    Join_Exact_Incident = Table.NestedJoin(WithIncidentKey, {"IncidentKey"},
                                           CallTypeCategories, {"Incident"},
                                           "CT_Exact", JoinKind.LeftOuter),

    Join_Exact_IncidentNorm = Table.NestedJoin(
        Join_Exact_Incident, {"IncidentKey"}, CallTypeCategories,
        {"Incident_Norm"}, "CT_ExactNorm", JoinKind.LeftOuter),

    NeedFuzzyFlag =
        Table.AddColumn(Join_Exact_IncidentNorm, "_NeedFuzzy",
                        each(try Table.IsEmpty([CT_Exact]) otherwise true) and
                            (try Table.IsEmpty([CT_ExactNorm]) otherwise true),
                        type logical),

    OnlyNeedFuzzy = Table.SelectRows(NeedFuzzyFlag, each[_NeedFuzzy] = true),

    FuzzyJoined = Table.FuzzyNestedJoin(
        OnlyNeedFuzzy, {"IncidentKey"},
        CallTypeCategories, {"Incident"}, "CT_Fuzzy", JoinKind.LeftOuter,
        [ IgnoreCase = true, IgnoreSpace = true, Threshold = 0.8 ]),

    FuzzyMap = Table.SelectColumns(FuzzyJoined, {"IncidentKey", "CT_Fuzzy"}),

    Recombined = Table.NestedJoin(NeedFuzzyFlag, {"IncidentKey"}, FuzzyMap,
                                  {"IncidentKey"}, "CT_FuzzyMap",
                                  JoinKind.LeftOuter),

    Expanded = Table.TransformColumns(
        Recombined,
        {{"CT_Exact",
          each if _ is table and not Table.IsEmpty(_) then _ else null},
         {"CT_ExactNorm",
          each if _ is table and not Table.IsEmpty(_) then _ else null},
         {"CT_FuzzyMap", each if _ is table and not Table.IsEmpty(_) and
                             _{0}[CT_Fuzzy] is table and
                             not Table.IsEmpty(_{0}[CT_Fuzzy])
                                     then _{0}[CT_Fuzzy] else null}}),

    TakeCategory = Table.AddColumn(
        Expanded, "Category_Type",
        each let a = try[CT_Exact]{0}[Category_Type] otherwise null,
        b = if a = null then(try[CT_ExactNorm]{
            0}[Category_Type] otherwise null) else null,
        c = if a = null and b = null then(try[CT_FuzzyMap]{
            0}[Category_Type] otherwise null) else null in
            CoalesceText(a, CoalesceText(b, CoalesceText(c, "Unknown"))),
        type text),

    TakeResponse = Table.AddColumn(
        TakeCategory, "Response_Type",
        each let a = try[CT_Exact]{0}[Response_Type] otherwise null,
        b = if a = null then(try[CT_ExactNorm]{
            0}[Response_Type] otherwise null) else null,
        c = if a = null and b = null then(try[CT_FuzzyMap]{
            0}[Response_Type] otherwise null) else null in
            CoalesceText(a, CoalesceText(b, CoalesceText(c, "Unknown"))),
        type text),

    Category_Response_Added = Table.RemoveColumns(TakeResponse,
                                                  {"CT_Exact", "CT_ExactNorm",
                                                   "CT_FuzzyMap",
                                                   "_NeedFuzzy"}),

    // ===========================================
    // OPTIONAL: TIME VALIDATION (keep for QA; remove if you want max speed)
    // ===========================================
    TimeValidation_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Category_Response_Added, "Time_Validation",
        each "Source: " &[TimeSource] & " | Original IT: " &
            (if[Incident Time]<> null then
                 Text.From([Incident Time]) else "null") &
            " | Original ITB: " &
            (if[Incident Time_Between]<> null then
                 Text.From([Incident Time_Between]) else "null") &
            " | Original RT: " &
            (if[Report Time]<> null then Text.From([Report Time]) else "null") &
            " | Cascaded: " &
            (if[BestTimeValue]<> null then
                 Time.ToText([BestTimeValue]) else "null"),
        type text),

    FinalResult = TimeValidation_Added,

    // ===========================================
    // CONVERT TIME COLUMNS TO TIME DATA TYPE
    // ===========================================
    TimeColumnsTyped = Table.TransformColumnTypes(
        FinalResult,
        {
            {"Incident Time", type time},
            {"Incident Time_Between", type time},
            {"Report Time", type time}
        }
    ),

    #"Sorted Rows" =
        Table.Sort(TimeColumnsTyped, {{"Incident Date", Order.Ascending},
                                     {"Period", Order.Descending},
                                     {"Report Date", Order.Ascending},
                                     {"Report_Date", Order.Ascending}})
in
    #"Sorted Rows"
```

Added a step to convert "Incident Time", "Incident Time_Between", and "Report Time" to time type. The transformation is applied before the final sort:

```m
TimeColumnsTyped = Table.TransformColumnTypes(
    FinalResult,
    {
        {"Incident Time", type time},
        {"Incident Time_Between", type time},
        {"Report Time", type time}
    }
),
```

This ensures these three columns are typed as `time` in the final output. Power Query will handle null values automatically (they remain null), and any values that can't be converted to time will show an error, which you can address with error handling if needed.

The columns are now properly typed as time data type in the final query result.

```plaintext
TimeColumnsTyped = Table.TransformColumnTypes(
    FinalResult,
    {
        {"Incident Time", type time},
        {"Incident Time_Between", type time},
        {"Report Time", type time}
    }
),
```

@q_CallTypeCategories.m @q_CycleCalendar.m @q_RMS_Source.m @Updated_All_Crimes.m  have all been updated and loaded with out errors
This is the raw rms export @Time_Based/2025/25C13W52_25_12_30/Data/SCRPA_7Day_Detailed.csv  the @c:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\05_EXPORTS\_RMS\scrpa\2025_12_29_18_46_24_SCRPA_RMS.csv shows  4 incidents occuring during the 7Day Cycle
the Burglary - Auto chart and table are correct the map is wrong though what filters do i use to have the map correctly so no incidents for 12/23/25 - 12/29/25


---

**Cursor**

Checking available date columns to determine the correct map filter:


The 7-Day cycle is defined by Report Date (12/23/25–12/29/25), not Incident Date. Use one of these filters on the map:

## Recommended filter (best)

Filter by `Report_Date`:
- `Report_Date >= 12/23/2025 AND Report_Date <= 12/29/2025`

This matches the cycle definition and shows incidents reported during the 7-day period.

## Alternative filters

1. Filter by `Period = "7-Day"` — this is based on Incident Date, so it may include incidents reported outside the cycle.
2. Filter by `cycle_name = "25C13W52"` — matches the specific cycle name.

## Why the map is wrong

The map is likely filtering by:
- `Incident Date` (shows when incidents occurred, not when reported)
- `Period = "7-Day"` (also based on Incident Date)

This can include:
- Incidents that occurred during 12/23–12/29 but were reported later
- Incidents that occurred before 12/23 but were reported during 12/23–12/29 (lagday incidents)

## Solution

In Power BI, set the map visual filter to:
```
Report_Date >= 12/23/2025 AND Report_Date <= 12/29/2025
```

Or use a relative date filter:
- Relative date filter on `Report_Date`
- Last 7 days (if today is 12/30/2025)

This ensures the map shows only incidents reported during the 7-day cycle (12/23/25–12/29/25), matching the chart and table.

```plaintext
Report_Date >= 12/23/2025 AND Report_Date <= 12/29/2025
```

**User**

this is m code for a few weeks ago. On that project I used the column Backfill_7Day as a filter for the map.  

// 🕒 2025-10-07-16-45-00
// # SCRPA_Time_v2/All_Crimes_Query
// # Author: R. A. Carucci
// # Purpose: Complete RMS data processing with cascading time/date logic,
// backfill tracking, # narrative cleaning, vehicle formatting, Period sort key,
// and Attempted Burglary normalization

/*
============================================================
COMPLETE CASCADING TIME LOGIC WITH ATTEMPTED BURGLARY GROUPING
============================================================
Author: R. A. Carucci
Date: 2025-10-07
Purpose: Comprehensive RMS data processing with incident dating, backfill
tracking, narrative cleaning, vehicle formatting, Period sort key, and
normalization of Attempted Burglary offenses for SCRPA crime analysis.

ENHANCEMENTS:
- Report_Date tracking with cascading logic
- LagDays calculation for reporting delay analysis
- Backfill_7Day flag (cycle-aware, not rolling window)
- Narrative text cleaning (line breaks, whitespace normalization)
- Vehicle_1, Vehicle_2, Vehicle_1_and_Vehicle_2 formatting (uppercase)
- Period_SortKey for proper chart ordering (7-Day, 28-Day, YTD, Historical)
- Attempted Burglary normalization for visual grouping
- cycle_name_adjusted for backfilled cases
*/

let
    // ===========================================
    // IMPORT MOST RECENT EXCEL FILE DYNAMICALLY
    // ===========================================

    FolderPath = "C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\05_EXPORTS\_RMS\SCRPA",
    AllFiles = Folder.Files(FolderPath),
    XlsxFiles = Table.SelectRows(AllFiles, each Text.EndsWith([Name], ".xlsx", Comparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)),
    SortedFiles = Table.Sort(XlsxFiles, {{"Date modified", Order.Descending}}),
    LatestFilePath = SortedFiles{0}[Folder Path] & SortedFiles{0}[Name],
    Source = Excel.Workbook(File.Contents(LatestFilePath), true),
    FirstTable = Source{0}[Data],
    
    // ===========================================
    // ENHANCED TIME PROCESSING WITH INLINE CASCADING LOGIC
    // ===========================================
    
    BestTimeValueAdded = Table.AddColumn(
        FirstTable,
        "BestTimeValue", 
        each 
            let
                ParsedIncidentTime = 
                    if [Incident Time] = null or [Incident Time] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type time then [Incident Time]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type duration then try Time.From([Incident Time]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type text then
                        let
                            CleanText = Text.Trim([Incident Time]),
                            ParsedTime = 
                                try Time.FromText(CleanText)
                                otherwise try Time.FromText(CleanText & ":00")
                                otherwise try 
                                    let
                                        TimePattern = Text.AfterDelimiter(CleanText, " ", {0, RelativePosition.FromEnd}),
                                        ExtractedTime = if Text.Contains(TimePattern, ":") then Time.FromText(TimePattern) else null
                                    in ExtractedTime
                                otherwise null
                        in ParsedTime
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type datetime then Time.From([Incident Time])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type number then try Time.From([Incident Time]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedIncidentTimeBetween = 
                    if [Incident Time_Between] = null or [Incident Time_Between] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type time then [Incident Time_Between]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type duration then try Time.From([Incident Time_Between]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type text then
                        let
                            CleanText = Text.Trim([Incident Time_Between]),
                            ParsedTime = 
                                try Time.FromText(CleanText)
                                otherwise try Time.FromText(CleanText & ":00")
                                otherwise try 
                                    let
                                        TimePattern = Text.AfterDelimiter(CleanText, " ", {0, RelativePosition.FromEnd}),
                                        ExtractedTime = if Text.Contains(TimePattern, ":") then Time.FromText(TimePattern) else null
                                    in ExtractedTime
                                otherwise null
                        in ParsedTime
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type datetime then Time.From([Incident Time_Between])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type number then try Time.From([Incident Time_Between]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedReportTime = 
                    if [Report Time] = null or [Report Time] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type time then [Report Time]
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type duration then try Time.From([Report Time]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type text then
                        let
                            CleanText = Text.Trim([Report Time]),
                            ParsedTime = 
                                try Time.FromText(CleanText)
                                otherwise try Time.FromText(CleanText & ":00")
                                otherwise try 
                                    let
                                        TimePattern = Text.AfterDelimiter(CleanText, " ", {0, RelativePosition.FromEnd}),
                                        ExtractedTime = if Text.Contains(TimePattern, ":") then Time.FromText(TimePattern) else null
                                    in ExtractedTime
                                otherwise null
                        in ParsedTime
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type datetime then Time.From([Report Time])
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type number then try Time.From([Report Time]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                BestTime = 
                    if ParsedIncidentTime <> null then ParsedIncidentTime
                    else if ParsedIncidentTimeBetween <> null then ParsedIncidentTimeBetween
                    else if ParsedReportTime <> null then ParsedReportTime
                    else null
            in BestTime,
        type nullable time
    ),
    
    TimeSourceAdded = Table.AddColumn(
        BestTimeValueAdded,
        "TimeSource",
        each 
            let
                IncidentTimeParsed = 
                    if [Incident Time] = null or [Incident Time] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type time then [Incident Time]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type duration then try Time.From([Incident Time]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type text then try Time.FromText(Text.Trim([Incident Time])) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type datetime then Time.From([Incident Time])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time]) = type number then try Time.From([Incident Time]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                IncidentTimeBetweenParsed = 
                    if [Incident Time_Between] = null or [Incident Time_Between] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type time then [Incident Time_Between]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type duration then try Time.From([Incident Time_Between]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type text then try Time.FromText(Text.Trim([Incident Time_Between])) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type datetime then Time.From([Incident Time_Between])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Time_Between]) = type number then try Time.From([Incident Time_Between]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ReportTimeParsed = 
                    if [Report Time] = null or [Report Time] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type time then [Report Time]
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type duration then try Time.From([Report Time]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type text then try Time.FromText(Text.Trim([Report Time])) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type datetime then Time.From([Report Time])
                    else if Value.Type([Report Time]) = type number then try Time.From([Report Time]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                Source = 
                    if IncidentTimeParsed <> null then "Incident Time"
                    else if IncidentTimeBetweenParsed <> null then "Incident Time_Between"
                    else if ReportTimeParsed <> null then "Report Time"
                    else "None"
            in Source,
        type text
    ),

    Incident_Time_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeSourceAdded, 
        "Incident_Time", 
        each 
            try
                let
                    BestTime = [BestTimeValue],
                    TimeText = 
                        if BestTime <> null then
                            let
                                Hours = Time.Hour(BestTime),
                                Minutes = Time.Minute(BestTime),
                                Seconds = Time.Second(BestTime),
                                FormattedTime = 
                                    Text.PadStart(Text.From(Hours), 2, "0") & ":" &
                                    Text.PadStart(Text.From(Minutes), 2, "0") & ":" &
                                    Text.PadStart(Text.From(Seconds), 2, "0")
                            in FormattedTime
                        else "00:00:00"
                in TimeText
            otherwise "Time_Error",
        type text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // ENHANCED INCIDENT_DATE PROCESSING WITH CASCADING LOGIC
    // ===========================================
    
    Incident_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Time_Added, 
        "Incident_Date", 
        each 
            let
                ParsedIncidentDate = 
                    if [Incident Date] = null or [Incident Date] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type date then [Incident Date]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type datetime then Date.From([Incident Date])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Incident Date]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type number then try Date.From([Incident Date]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedIncidentDateBetween = 
                    if [Incident Date_Between] = null or [Incident Date_Between] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type date then [Incident Date_Between]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type datetime then Date.From([Incident Date_Between])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Incident Date_Between]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type number then try Date.From([Incident Date_Between]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedReportDate = 
                    if [Report Date] = null or [Report Date] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type date then [Report Date]
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type datetime then Date.From([Report Date])
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type number then try Date.From([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                BestDate = 
                    if ParsedIncidentDate <> null then ParsedIncidentDate
                    else if ParsedIncidentDateBetween <> null then ParsedIncidentDateBetween
                    else if ParsedReportDate <> null then ParsedReportDate
                    else null,
                
                DateText = 
                    if BestDate <> null then Date.ToText(BestDate, "MM/dd/yy")
                    else "Unknown"
            in DateText,
        type text
    ),

    Incident_Date_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Date_Added,
        "Incident_Date_Date",
        each 
            let
                ParsedIncidentDate = 
                    if [Incident Date] = null or [Incident Date] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type date then [Incident Date]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type datetime then Date.From([Incident Date])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Incident Date]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date]) = type number then try Date.From([Incident Date]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedIncidentDateBetween = 
                    if [Incident Date_Between] = null or [Incident Date_Between] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type date then [Incident Date_Between]
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type datetime then Date.From([Incident Date_Between])
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Incident Date_Between]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Incident Date_Between]) = type number then try Date.From([Incident Date_Between]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedReportDate = 
                    if [Report Date] = null or [Report Date] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type date then [Report Date]
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type datetime then Date.From([Report Date])
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type number then try Date.From([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                BestDate = 
                    if ParsedIncidentDate <> null then ParsedIncidentDate
                    else if ParsedIncidentDateBetween <> null then ParsedIncidentDateBetween
                    else if ParsedReportDate <> null then ParsedReportDate
                    else null
            in BestDate,
        type date
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // REPORT DATE PROCESSING WITH CASCADING LOGIC
    // ===========================================
    
    Report_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Date_Date_Added,
        "Report_Date",
        each 
            let
                ParsedReportDate = 
                    if [Report Date] = null or [Report Date] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type date then [Report Date]
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type datetime then Date.From([Report Date])
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type text then try Date.FromText([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([Report Date]) = type number then try Date.From([Report Date]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                ParsedEntryDate = 
                    if [EntryDate] = null or [EntryDate] = "" then null
                    else if Value.Type([EntryDate]) = type date then [EntryDate]
                    else if Value.Type([EntryDate]) = type datetime then Date.From([EntryDate])
                    else if Value.Type([EntryDate]) = type text then try Date.FromText([EntryDate]) otherwise null
                    else if Value.Type([EntryDate]) = type number then try Date.From([EntryDate]) otherwise null
                    else null,
                
                BestReportDate = 
                    if ParsedReportDate <> null then ParsedReportDate
                    else if ParsedEntryDate <> null then ParsedEntryDate
                    else [Incident_Date_Date]
            in BestReportDate,
        type nullable date
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // REPORT DATE TEXT (FORMATTED MM/dd/yy)
    // ===========================================
    
    Report_Date_Text_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Report_Date_Added,
        "Report_Date_Text",
        each 
            if [Report_Date] <> null then
                Date.ToText([Report_Date], "MM/dd/yy")
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    
    // ===========================================
    // LAG DAYS CALCULATION
    // ===========================================
    
    LagDays_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Report_Date_Text_Added,
        "LagDays",
        each 
            if [Report_Date] <> null and [Incident_Date_Date] <> null then
                Duration.Days([Report_Date] - [Incident_Date_Date])
            else null,
        Int64.Type
    ),
    
    // ===========================================
    // PERIOD BUCKETS
    // ===========================================
    
    Period_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        LagDays_Added,
        "Period",
        each let d = Duration.Days(Date.From(DateTime.LocalNow()) - [Incident_Date_Date]) in
            if d <= 7 then "7-Day"
            else if d <= 28 then "28-Day"
            else if Date.Year([Incident_Date_Date]) = Date.Year(DateTime.LocalNow()) then "YTD"
            else "Historical",
        type text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // PERIOD SORT KEY
    // ===========================================
    
    Period_SortKey_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Period_Added,
        "Period_SortKey",
        each 
            if [Period] = "7-Day" then 1
            else if [Period] = "28-Day" then 2
            else if [Period] = "YTD" then 3
            else if [Period] = "Historical" then 4
            else 99,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // LOAD CYCLE CALENDAR (USED BY BACKFILL & CYCLE_NAME)
    // ===========================================
    
    CycleCalendar = Csv.Document(File.Contents("C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\09_Reference\Temporal\SCRPA_Cycle\7Day_28Day_Cycle_20250414.csv")),
    CycleCalendarTable = Table.PromoteHeaders(CycleCalendar),

    // ===========================================
    // BACKFILL FLAG (CYCLE-AWARE)
    // ===========================================
    
    Backfill_Flag_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Period_SortKey_Added,
        "Backfill_7Day",
        each 
            let
                IncidentDate = [Incident_Date_Date],
                ReportDate = [Report_Date],
                
                // Find the current 7-Day cycle (where today falls within start/end dates)
                Today = Date.From(DateTime.LocalNow()),
                CurrentCycle = Table.SelectRows(
                    CycleCalendarTable,
                    each 
                        let
                            StartDate = Date.FromText([7_Day_Start]),
                            EndDate = Date.FromText([7_Day_End])
                        in Today >= StartDate and Today <= EndDate
                ),
                
                // Extract current cycle boundaries
                HasCurrentCycle = not Table.IsEmpty(CurrentCycle),
                CycleStartDate = if HasCurrentCycle then Date.FromText(CurrentCycle{0}[7_Day_Start]) else null,
                CycleEndDate = if HasCurrentCycle then Date.FromText(CurrentCycle{0}[7_Day_End]) else null,
                
                // Calculate previous cycle boundaries (7 days before current cycle)
                PreviousCycleStart = if HasCurrentCycle then CycleStartDate - #duration(7, 0, 0, 0) else null,
                PreviousCycleEnd = if HasCurrentCycle then CycleStartDate - #duration(1, 0, 0, 0) else null,
                
                // Enhanced backfill logic: Incident before current cycle, but reported within current OR previous cycle
                IsBackfill = 
                    if HasCurrentCycle and IncidentDate <> null and ReportDate <> null then
                        let
                            // Check if reported in current cycle
                            ReportedInCurrentCycle = (ReportDate >= CycleStartDate and ReportDate <= CycleEndDate),
                            
                            // Check if reported in previous cycle
                            ReportedInPreviousCycle = (ReportDate >= PreviousCycleStart and ReportDate <= PreviousCycleEnd),
                            
                            // Backfill if incident before current cycle AND reported in current or previous cycle
                            IsBackfillResult = (IncidentDate < CycleStartDate) and (ReportedInCurrentCycle or ReportedInPreviousCycle)
                        in IsBackfillResult
                    else false
            in IsBackfill,
        type logical
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // CYCLE_NAME (SCRPA CYCLE ASSIGNMENT)
    // ===========================================
    
    CycleName_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Backfill_Flag_Added,
        "cycle_name",
        each 
            let
                IncidentDate = [Incident_Date_Date],
                CycleResult = 
                    if IncidentDate = null then "Unknown"
                    else
                        let
                            MatchingCycles = Table.SelectRows(
                                CycleCalendarTable, 
                                each 
                                    let
                                        StartDate = Date.FromText([7_Day_Start]),
                                        EndDate = Date.FromText([7_Day_End])
                                    in IncidentDate >= StartDate and IncidentDate <= EndDate
                            ),
                            
                            CycleName = 
                                if Table.IsEmpty(MatchingCycles) then "Historical"
                                else MatchingCycles{0}[Report_Name]
                        in CycleName
            in CycleResult,
        type text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // CYCLE NAME OVERRIDE FOR BACKFILLED CASES
    // ===========================================
    
    Cycle_Name_Adjusted = Table.AddColumn(
        CycleName_Added,
        "cycle_name_adjusted",
        each 
            if [Backfill_7Day] = true then
                let
                    Today = Date.From(DateTime.LocalNow()),
                    CurrentCycle = Table.SelectRows(
                        CycleCalendarTable,
                        each 
                            let
                                StartDate = Date.FromText([7_Day_Start]),
                                EndDate = Date.FromText([7_Day_End])
                            in Today >= StartDate and Today <= EndDate
                    ),
                    CurrentCycleName = if not Table.IsEmpty(CurrentCycle) then CurrentCycle{0}[Report_Name] else [cycle_name]
                in CurrentCycleName
            else [cycle_name],
        type text
    ),

    StartOfHour_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Cycle_Name_Adjusted, 
        "StartOfHour",
        each 
            try
                if [BestTimeValue] <> null then
                    let
                        Hour = Time.Hour([BestTimeValue]),
                        StartTime = #time(Hour, 0, 0)
                    in Time.ToText(StartTime, "hh:mm:ss")
                else "00:00:00"
            otherwise "00:00:00",
        type text
    ),

    TimeOfDay_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        StartOfHour_Added, 
        "TimeOfDay", 
        each 
            try
                if [BestTimeValue] <> null then
                    let
                        Hour = Time.Hour([BestTimeValue]),
                        Category = 
                            if Hour >= 4 and Hour < 8 then "Early Morning (04:00–07:59)"
                            else if Hour >= 8 and Hour < 12 then "Morning (08:00–11:59)"
                            else if Hour >= 12 and Hour < 16 then "Afternoon (12:00–15:59)"
                            else if Hour >= 16 and Hour < 20 then "Evening Peak (16:00–19:59)"
                            else if Hour >= 20 and Hour < 24 then "Night (20:00–23:59)"
                            else "Late Night (00:00–03:59)"
                    in Category
                else "Unknown Time"
            otherwise "Time_Category_Error",
        type text
    ),

    TimeOfDay_SortKey_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeOfDay_Added,
        "TimeOfDay_SortKey",
        each 
            let
                TimeOfDay = [TimeOfDay],
                SortKey = 
                    if TimeOfDay = "Late Night (00:00–03:59)" then 1
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Early Morning (04:00–07:59)" then 2
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Morning (08:00–11:59)" then 3
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Afternoon (12:00–15:59)" then 4
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Evening Peak (16:00–19:59)" then 5
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Night (20:00–23:59)" then 6
                    else if TimeOfDay = "Unknown Time" then 99
                    else 0
            in SortKey,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    AllIncidents_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeOfDay_SortKey_Added,
        "ALL_INCIDENTS",
        each
            [Incident Type_1]
            & (if [Incident Type_2] <> null then ", "&[Incident Type_2] else "")
            & (if [Incident Type_3] <> null then ", "&[Incident Type_3] else ""),
        type text
    ),

    CrimeCategory_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        AllIncidents_Added,
        "Crime_Category",
        each let
            L = Text.Upper([ALL_INCIDENTS] ?? ""),
            N = Text.Upper([Narrative] ?? "")
        in
            if Text.Contains(L, "MOTOR VEHICLE THEFT") and (Text.Contains(N, "THEFT OF HIS PROPERTY") or Text.Contains(N, "THEFT FROM MOTOR VEHICLE")) then "Burglary Auto"
            else if Text.Contains(L, "MOTOR VEHICLE THEFT") then "Motor Vehicle Theft"
            else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - AUTO"), Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - AUTO"), Text.Contains(L, "THEFT FROM MOTOR VEHICLE")}) then "Burglary Auto"
            else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - COMMERCIAL"), Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - COMMERCIAL"), Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - RESIDENCE"), Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - RESIDENCE")}) then "Burglary - Comm & Res"
            else if Text.Contains(L, "ROBBERY") then "Robbery"
            else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "SEXUAL"), Text.Contains(L, "RAPE")}) then "Sexual Offenses"
            else "Other",
        type text
    ),

    CleanIncidentTypes_Added = Table.TransformColumns(
        CrimeCategory_Added,
        {
            {"Incident Type_1", each if _<>null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_," - 2C") else _, type text},
            {"Incident Type_2", each if _<>null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_," - 2C") else _, type text},
            {"Incident Type_3", each if _<>null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_," - 2C") else _, type text}
        }
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // NORMALIZE "ATTEMPTED" BURGLARIES
    // ===========================================
    
    Incident_Type_1_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        CleanIncidentTypes_Added,
        "Incident_Type_1_Norm",
        each 
            if [Incident Type_1] <> null then
                Text.Replace([Incident Type_1], "Attempted Burglary", "Burglary")
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    
    Incident_Type_2_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Type_1_Norm_Added,
        "Incident_Type_2_Norm",
        each 
            if [Incident Type_2] <> null then
                Text.Replace([Incident Type_2], "Attempted Burglary", "Burglary")
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    
    Incident_Type_3_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Type_2_Norm_Added,
        "Incident_Type_3_Norm",
        each 
            if [Incident Type_3] <> null then
                Text.Replace([Incident Type_3], "Attempted Burglary", "Burglary")
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // NARRATIVE CLEANING
    // ===========================================
    
    Narrative_Cleaned = Table.TransformColumns(
        Incident_Type_3_Norm_Added,
        {{"Narrative", each 
            if _ = null or _ = "" then null
            else
                let
                    text = _,
                    step1 = Text.Replace(Text.Replace(Text.Replace(text, "#(cr)#(lf)", " "), "#(lf)", " "), "#(cr)", " "),
                    step2 = Text.Replace(Text.Replace(Text.Replace(step1, "    ", " "), "   ", " "), "  ", " "),
                    step3 = Text.Clean(step2),
                    step4 = Text.Trim(step3),
                    final = if step4 = "" then null else step4
                in final,
            type text
        }}
    ),
    
    // ===========================================
    // VEHICLE FORMATTING
    // ===========================================
    
    Vehicle_1_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Narrative_Cleaned,
        "Vehicle_1",
        each 
            let
                regState = if [#"Reg State 1"] <> null then Text.From([#"Reg State 1"]) else "",
                registration = if [#"Registration 1"] <> null then Text.From([#"Registration 1"]) else "",
                make = if [Make1] <> null then Text.From([Make1]) else "",
                model = if [Model1] <> null then Text.From([Model1]) else "",
                hasData = regState <> "" or registration <> "" or make <> "" or model <> ""
            in
                if hasData then
                    let
                        stateReg = 
                            if regState <> "" and registration <> "" then regState & " - " & registration
                            else if registration <> "" then registration
                            else if regState <> "" then regState
                            else "",
                        
                        makeModel = 
                            if make <> "" and model <> "" then make & "/" & model
                            else if make <> "" then make
                            else if model <> "" then model
                            else "",
                        
                        result = 
                            if stateReg <> "" and makeModel <> "" then stateReg & ", " & makeModel
                            else if stateReg <> "" then stateReg
                            else if makeModel <> "" then makeModel
                            else ""
                    in
                        if result = "" then null else Text.Upper(result)
                else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    
    Vehicle_2_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_1_Added,
        "Vehicle_2",
        each 
            let
                regState = if [#"Reg State 2"] <> null then Text.From([#"Reg State 2"]) else "",
                registration = if [#"Registration 2"] <> null then Text.From([#"Registration 2"]) else "",
                make = if [Make2] <> null then Text.From([Make2]) else "",
                model = if [Model2] <> null then Text.From([Model2]) else "",
                hasData = regState <> "" or registration <> "" or make <> "" or model <> ""
            in
                if hasData then
                    let
                        stateReg = 
                            if regState <> "" and registration <> "" then regState & " - " & registration
                            else if registration <> "" then registration
                            else if regState <> "" then regState
                            else "",
                        
                        makeModel = 
                            if make <> "" and model <> "" then make & "/" & model
                            else if make <> "" then make
                            else if model <> "" then model
                            else "",
                        
                        result = 
                            if stateReg <> "" and makeModel <> "" then stateReg & ", " & makeModel
                            else if stateReg <> "" then stateReg
                            else if makeModel <> "" then makeModel
                            else ""
                    in
                        if result = "" then null else Text.Upper(result)
                else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    
    Vehicle_Combined_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_2_Added,
        "Vehicle_1_and_Vehicle_2",
        each 
            if [Vehicle_1] <> null and [Vehicle_2] <> null then
                [Vehicle_1] & " | " & [Vehicle_2]
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // CLEAN ADDRESS (REMOVE CITY/STATE/ZIP)
    // ===========================================
    
    Clean_Address_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_Combined_Added,
        "Clean_Address",
        each 
            if [FullAddress] <> null and [FullAddress] <> "" then
                let
                    address = Text.Trim([FullAddress]),
                    cleaned = Text.BeforeDelimiter(address, ", Hackensack, NJ", {0, RelativePosition.FromStart})
                in
                    if cleaned <> "" then cleaned else address
            else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    CallTypeCategories = Csv.Document(File.Contents("C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\09_Reference\Classifications\CallTypes\CallType_Categories.csv")),
    CallTypeCategoriesTable = Table.PromoteHeaders(CallTypeCategories),
    
    CategoryType_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Clean_Address_Added,
        "Category_Type",
        each
            let
                IncidentToMatch = if [ALL_INCIDENTS] <> null and [ALL_INCIDENTS] <> "" then [ALL_INCIDENTS] else [Incident Type_1],
                MatchingCategory = 
                    if IncidentToMatch = null or IncidentToMatch = "" then "Unknown"
                    else
                        let
                            ExactMatch = Table.SelectRows(
                                CallTypeCategoriesTable,
                                each [Incident] = IncidentToMatch or [Incident_Norm] = IncidentToMatch
                            ),
                            PartialMatch = if Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) then
                                Table.SelectRows(
                                    CallTypeCategoriesTable,
                                    each Text.Contains(IncidentToMatch, [Incident]) or Text.Contains([Incident], IncidentToMatch)
                                )
                            else ExactMatch,
                            CategoryResult = 
                                if Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) and Table.IsEmpty(PartialMatch) then "Unknown"
                                else if not Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) then ExactMatch{0}[Category_Type]
                                else PartialMatch{0}[Category_Type]
                        in CategoryResult
            in MatchingCategory,
        type text
    ),
    
    ResponseType_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        CategoryType_Added,
        "Response_Type",
        each
            let
                IncidentToMatch = if [ALL_INCIDENTS] <> null and [ALL_INCIDENTS] <> "" then [ALL_INCIDENTS] else [Incident Type_1],
                MatchingResponse = 
                    if IncidentToMatch = null or IncidentToMatch = "" then "Unknown"
                    else
                        let
                            ExactMatch = Table.SelectRows(
                                CallTypeCategoriesTable,
                                each [Incident] = IncidentToMatch or [Incident_Norm] = IncidentToMatch
                            ),
                            PartialMatch = if Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) then
                                Table.SelectRows(
                                    CallTypeCategoriesTable,
                                    each Text.Contains(IncidentToMatch, [Incident]) or Text.Contains([Incident], IncidentToMatch)
                                )
                            else ExactMatch,
                            ResponseResult = 
                                if Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) and Table.IsEmpty(PartialMatch) then "Unknown"
                                else if not Table.IsEmpty(ExactMatch) then ExactMatch{0}[Response_Type]
                                else PartialMatch{0}[Response_Type]
                        in ResponseResult
            in MatchingResponse,
        type text
    ),

    TimeValidation_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        ResponseType_Added,
        "Time_Validation",
        each 
            let
                OriginalIncidentTime = [Incident Time],
                OriginalIncidentTimeBetween = [Incident Time_Between], 
                OriginalReportTime = [Report Time],
                CascadedTime = [BestTimeValue],
                TimeSource = [TimeSource],
                
                ValidationText = 
                    "Source: " & TimeSource & 
                    " | Original IT: " & (if OriginalIncidentTime <> null then Text.From(OriginalIncidentTime) else "null") &
                    " | Original ITB: " & (if OriginalIncidentTimeBetween <> null then Text.From(OriginalIncidentTimeBetween) else "null") &
                    " | Original RT: " & (if OriginalReportTime <> null then Text.From(OriginalReportTime) else "null") &
                    " | Cascaded: " & (if CascadedTime <> null then Time.ToText(CascadedTime) else "null")
            in ValidationText,
        type text
    ),

    FinalResult = TimeValidation_Added,

#"Sorted Rows" = Table.Sort(FinalResult, {{"Incident Date", Order.Ascending }, 
                                           {"Period", Order.Descending}, 
                                           {"Report Date", Order.Ascending}, 
                                           {
  "Report_Date", Order.Ascending
}
}),
    #"Changed Type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Sorted Rows",{{"Report Time", type time}, {"Incident Time_Between", type time}, {"Incident Time", type time}}),
    #"Sorted Rows1" = Table.Sort(#"Changed Type",{{"Report Date", Order.Ascending}})
in
    #"Sorted Rows1"

---

**Cursor**

In the old code, `Backfill_7Day` flagged incidents that occurred before the cycle but were reported during it. For the map to match the chart/table, use one of these filters:

## Recommended filter (matches chart/table)

Filter by `Report_Date` to match the 7-Day cycle definition:
```
Report_Date >= 12/23/2025 AND Report_Date <= 12/29/2025
```

This shows:
- Incidents that occurred during 12/23–12/29 and were reported during that period
- Backfill incidents (occurred before 12/23 but reported during 12/23–12/29)

## Alternative: exclude backfill if you only want incidents that occurred during the cycle

If you want only incidents that occurred during 12/23–12/29 (excluding backfill):
```
Incident_Date_Date >= 12/23/2025 AND Incident_Date_Date <= 12/29/2025
```

## Using Backfill_7Day (old approach)

If you want to replicate the old behavior:
```
Backfill_7Day = false AND Report_Date >= 12/23/2025 AND Report_Date <= 12/29/2025
```

This excludes backfill incidents and shows only incidents that occurred and were reported during the cycle.

## Recommendation

Since the chart and table are correct, they’re likely using `Report_Date`. Use the same filter on the map:
```
Report_Date >= 12/23/2025 AND Report_Date <= 12/29/2025
```

This keeps the map aligned with the chart/table. If you want to exclude backfill incidents, add:
```
AND Backfill_7Day = false
```

Which approach do you want: include backfill incidents (use `Report_Date` only) or exclude them (add `Backfill_7Day = false`)?

```plaintext
Report_Date >= 12/23/2025 AND Report_Date <= 12/29/2025
```

```plaintext
Incident_Date_Date >= 12/23/2025 AND Incident_Date_Date <= 12/29/2025
```

```plaintext
Backfill_7Day = false AND Report_Date >= 12/23/2025 AND Report_Date <= 12/29/2025
```

```plaintext
Report_Date >= 12/23/2025 AND Report_Date <= 12/29/2025
```

```plaintext
AND Backfill_7Day = false
```

---

**User**

I would rather not have to change the filters everyweek

---

**Cursor**

Adding a calculated column to the query that automatically identifies rows in the current 7-day cycle, so you don't need to update filters each week.


Adding a column that automatically flags rows in the current 7-day cycle based on `Report_Date`:


```objective-c
let
    // -----------------------------
    // Helpers
    // -----------------------------
    CoalesceText = (a as nullable text, b as nullable text) as nullable text =>
        if a = null or a = "" then b else a,
    CoalesceAny = (a as any, b as any) as any =>
        if a = null then b else a,

    AsTime =
        (v as any) as nullable time =>
            if v = null or v = "" then null
            else if Value.Is(v, type time) then v
            else if Value.Is(v, type duration) then (try Time.From(v) otherwise null)
            else if Value.Is(v, type datetime) then Time.From(v)
            else if Value.Is(v, type number) then (try Time.From(v) otherwise null)
            else if Value.Is(v, type text) then
                let
                    t = Text.Trim(Text.From(v)),
                    t1 = (try Time.FromText(t) otherwise null),
                    t2 = if t1 = null then (try Time.FromText(t & ":00") otherwise null) else t1
                in
                    t2
            else null,

    AsTimeQuick =
        (v as any) as nullable time =>
            if v = null or v = "" then null
            else if Value.Is(v, type time) then v
            else if Value.Is(v, type datetime) then Time.From(v)
            else if Value.Is(v, type duration) then (try Time.From(v) otherwise null)
            else if Value.Is(v, type number) then (try Time.From(v) otherwise null)
            else if Value.Is(v, type text) then (try Time.FromText(Text.Trim(Text.From(v))) otherwise null)
            else null,

    AsDate =
        (v as any) as nullable date =>
            if v = null or v = "" then null
            else if Value.Is(v, type date) then v
            else if Value.Is(v, type datetime) then Date.From(v)
            else if Value.Is(v, type number) then (try Date.From(v) otherwise null)
            else if Value.Is(v, type text) then (try Date.FromText(Text.From(v)) otherwise null)
            else null,

    // ===========================================
    // STAGED SOURCES (NO File.Contents / Folder.Files HERE)
    // ===========================================
    FirstTable_Staged = Table.Buffer(q_RMS_Source),
    CycleCalendar_Staged = q_CycleCalendar,
    CallTypeCategories_Staged = q_CallTypeCategories,

    // Compute "Today" once
    Today = Date.From(DateTime.LocalNow()),


    // ===========================================
    // ENHANCED TIME PROCESSING WITH CASCADING LOGIC
    // ===========================================
    BestTimeValueAdded = Table.AddColumn(
        FirstTable_Staged,
        "BestTimeValue",
        each
            let
                IT = try [Incident Time] otherwise null,
                ITB = try [Incident Time_Between] otherwise null,
                RT = try [Report Time] otherwise null,

                PIT = AsTime(IT),
                PITB = AsTime(ITB),
                PRT = AsTime(RT)
            in
                if PIT <> null then PIT else if PITB <> null then PITB else PRT,
        type nullable time
    ),

    TimeSourceAdded = Table.AddColumn(
        BestTimeValueAdded,
        "TimeSource",
        each
            let
                PIT = AsTimeQuick(try [Incident Time] otherwise null),
                PITB = AsTimeQuick(try [Incident Time_Between] otherwise null),
                PRT = AsTimeQuick(try [Report Time] otherwise null)
            in
                if PIT <> null then "Incident Time"
                else if PITB <> null then "Incident Time_Between"
                else if PRT <> null then "Report Time"
                else "None",
        type text
    ),

    Incident_Time_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeSourceAdded,
        "Incident_Time",
        each
            let bt = [BestTimeValue]
            in
                if bt <> null then
                    Text.PadStart(Text.From(Time.Hour(bt)), 2, "0")
                        & ":" & Text.PadStart(Text.From(Time.Minute(bt)), 2, "0")
                        & ":" & Text.PadStart(Text.From(Time.Second(bt)), 2, "0")
                else "00:00:00",
        type text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // INCIDENT DATE (TEXT + DATE) WITH CASCADE
    // ===========================================
    Incident_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Time_Added,
        "Incident_Date",
        each
            let
                dIT = AsDate(try [Incident Date] otherwise null),
                dITB = AsDate(try [Incident Date_Between] otherwise null),
                dRT = AsDate(try [Report Date] otherwise null),
                Best = if dIT <> null then dIT else if dITB <> null then dITB else dRT
            in
                if Best <> null then Date.ToText(Best, "MM/dd/yy") else "Unknown",
        type text
    ),

    Incident_Date_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Date_Added,
        "Incident_Date_Date",
        each
            let
                dIT = AsDate(try [Incident Date] otherwise null),
                dITB = AsDate(try [Incident Date_Between] otherwise null),
                dRT = AsDate(try [Report Date] otherwise null)
            in
                if dIT <> null then dIT else if dITB <> null then dITB else dRT,
        type date
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // REPORT DATE (DATE + TEXT)
    // ===========================================
    Report_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Date_Date_Added,
        "Report_Date",
        each
            let
                dRD = AsDate(try [Report Date] otherwise null),
                dED = AsDate(try [EntryDate] otherwise null)
            in
                CoalesceAny(dRD, CoalesceAny(dED, [Incident_Date_Date])),
        type nullable date
    ),

    Report_Date_Text_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Report_Date_Added,
        "Report_Date_Text",
        each if [Report_Date] <> null then Date.ToText([Report_Date], "MM/dd/yy") else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    IncidentToReportDays_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Report_Date_Text_Added,
        "IncidentToReportDays",
        each if [Report_Date] <> null and [Incident_Date_Date] <> null then Duration.Days([Report_Date] - [Incident_Date_Date]) else null,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    Period_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        IncidentToReportDays_Added,
        "Period",
        each
            let d = if [Incident_Date_Date] = null then null else Duration.Days(Today - [Incident_Date_Date])
            in
                if d = null then "Historical"
                else if d <= 7 then "7-Day"
                else if d <= 28 then "28-Day"
```
