  .bullets{{margin:0; padding-left:18px;}}
  .bullets li{{margin:2px 0;}}
  .muted{{color:var(--muted);}}
  table{{
    width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; margin-top:8px; font-size: var(--base);
    page-break-inside: avoid;
  }}
  th,td{{border:1px solid var(--rule); padding:6px 8px; text-align:left;}}
  th{{background:#f3f4f6; color:var(--ink); font-weight:700;}}
  tfoot td{{font-weight:700;}}
  .footer{{
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
    margin-top:12px; font-size:var(--small); color:var(--muted);
  }}
  /* Print: force single page if content fits; avoid orphans/widows */
  @media print{{
    @page {{ size: A4; margin: 10mm; }}
    body{{ background:#fff; }}
    .page{{ box-shadow:none; padding:0; }}
    .case-card, .section {{ page-break-inside: avoid; }}
    a[href]:after{{ content:""; }} /* remove URL prints */
  }}
</style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="page">
    <h1>Strategic Crime Reduction Briefing - Patrol Captain</h1>
    <div class="meta">
      <div><b>Cycle:</b> {cycle_id}</div>
      <div><b>Range:</b> {range_start} - {range_end}</div>
      <div><b>Version:</b> 1.5</div>
      <div><b>Prepared by:</b> P.O. R. A. Carucci</div>
      <div><b>Submitted to:</b> Captain Smith</div>
      <div><b>Date Generated:</b> {generated_date_str}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="divider"></div>

    <!-- SECTIONS: I. Burglary - Auto, II. MV Theft, III. Robbery, IV. Sexual Offenses, V. Burglary - Commercial, VI. Burglary - Residence -->
    
    <!-- Each section follows this pattern. Duplicate case-card divs for each case in that category: -->
    <div class="section">
      <div class="section-title">I. Burglary - Auto</div>
      <div class="case-card">
        <div class="case-head">Case {{CaseNumber}} | {{MM/DD/YY HH:mm}} | {{IncidentType}} - {{Statute}}</div>
        <ul class="bullets">
          <li><b>Location:</b> {{FullAddress}} ({{Context}})</li>
          <li><b>Grid/Zone:</b> {{Grid}} / {{Zone}}</li>
          <li><b>Parking Location:</b> {{ParkingLocation}} (extract from Narrative: phrases like "parked in the parking lot", "parked on the street", "unassigned parking stall on the 4th level of the garage", "driveway", "street", "lot", "garage", "business")</li>
          <li><b>Victim Vehicle:</b> {{VictimVehicleMake}} {{VictimVehicleModel}} ({{Plate}}, {{PlateState}})</li>
          <li><b>Point of Entry:</b> {{PointOfEntry}} (extract from Narrative: door, window, bed cover, etc.)</li>
          <li><b>Means of Entry:</b> {{MeansOfEntry}} (extract from Narrative: forced, unlocked, broken, etc.)</li>
          <li><b>Suspect Description:</b> {{SuspectDesc}} (use "Data Incomplete" if blank)</li>
          <li><b>Suspect Vehicle:</b> {{SuspectVehicle}} (use "Unknown" if blank)</li>
          <li><b>Loss Items:</b> {{LossItems}} (extract from Narrative; use "No reported loss" if blank)</li>
          <li><b>Loss Total:</b> {{LossTotal}} (calculate by summing all individual loss items; use "$0.00" if missing)</li>
          <li><b>Status:</b> {{Status}}</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <!-- Repeat case-card div for each case in this category -->
    </div>

    <div class="section">
      <div class="section-title">II. Motor Vehicle Theft</div>
      <div class="case-card">
        <div class="case-head">Case {{CaseNumber}} | {{MM/DD/YY HH:mm}} | Motor Vehicle Theft - {{Statute}}</div>
        <ul class="bullets">
          <li><b>Location:</b> {{FullAddress}}</li>
          <li><b>Grid/Zone:</b> {{Grid}} / {{Zone}}</li>
          <li><b>Parking Location:</b> {{ParkingLocation}} (extract from Narrative: phrases like "parked in the parking lot", "parked on the street", "unassigned parking stall on the 4th level of the garage", "driveway", "street", "lot", "garage", "business")</li>
          <li><b>Victim Vehicle:</b> {{VictimVehicleMake}} {{VictimVehicleModel}} ({{Plate}}, {{PlateState}})</li>
          <li><b>Suspect Description:</b> {{SuspectDesc}} (use "Data Incomplete" if blank)</li>
          <li><b>Suspect Vehicle (used for theft):</b> {{SuspectVehicle}} (use "Unknown" if blank)</li>
          <li><b>Method:</b> {{Method}} (extract from Narrative: how vehicle was taken)</li>
          <li><b>Loss Total:</b> {{LossTotal}} (calculate by summing all individual loss items; use "$0.00" if missing)</li>
          <li><b>Status:</b> {{Status}}</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <!-- Repeat case-card div for each case in this category -->
    </div>

    <div class="section">
      <div class="section-title">III. Robbery</div>
      <div class="case-card">
        <div class="case-head">Case {{CaseNumber}} | {{MM/DD/YY HH:mm}} | {{Subtype}} - {{Statute}}</div>
        <ul class="bullets">
          <li><b>Location:</b> {{FullAddress}} ({{Context}})</li>
          <li><b>Grid/Zone:</b> {{Grid}} / {{Zone}}</li>
          <li><b>Suspect Description:</b> {{SuspectDesc}} (use "Data Incomplete" if blank)</li>
          <li><b>Suspect Vehicle:</b> {{SuspectVehicle}} (use "Unknown" if blank)</li>
          <li><b>Loss Items:</b> {{LossItems}} (extract from Narrative; use "No reported loss" if blank)</li>
          <li><b>Loss Total:</b> {{LossTotal}} (calculate by summing all individual loss items; use "$0.00" if missing)</li>
          <li><b>Status:</b> {{Status}}</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <!-- Repeat case-card div for each case in this category -->
    </div>

    <div class="section">
      <div class="section-title">IV. Sexual Offenses</div>
      <div class="case-card">
        <div class="case-head">Case {{CaseNumber}} | {{MM/DD/YY HH:mm}} | {{Subtype}} - {{Statute}}</div>
        <ul class="bullets">
          <li><b>Location:</b> {{FullAddress}} ({{Context}})</li>
          <li><b>Grid/Zone:</b> {{Grid}} / {{Zone}}</li>
          <li><b>Victim:</b> {{VictimSex}}, {{VictimAdultJuvenile}} (extract from Narrative)</li>
          <li><b>Suspect:</b> Relationship to victim and age group (adult or juvenile), extract from Narrative. Example: "known family associate, adult male"</li>
          <li><b>Allegation:</b> {{Allegation}}</li>
          <li><b>Status:</b> {{Status}}</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <!-- Repeat case-card div for each case in this category -->
    </div>

    <div class="section">
      <div class="section-title">V. Burglary - Commercial</div>
      <div class="case-card">
        <div class="case-head">Case {{CaseNumber}} | {{MM/DD/YY HH:mm}} | {{IncidentType}} - {{Statute}}</div>
        <ul class="bullets">
          <li><b>Location:</b> {{FullAddress}}</li>
          <li><b>Grid/Zone:</b> {{Grid}} / {{Zone}}</li>
          <li><b>Point of Entry:</b> {{PointOfEntry}} (extract from Narrative: door, window, bed cover, etc.)</li>
          <li><b>Means of Entry:</b> {{MeansOfEntry}} (extract from Narrative: forced, unlocked, broken, etc.)</li>
          <li><b>Suspect Description:</b> {{SuspectDesc}} (use "Data Incomplete" if blank)</li>
          <li><b>Suspect Vehicle:</b> {{SuspectVehicle}} (use "Unknown" if blank)</li>
          <li><b>Loss Items:</b> {{LossItems}} (extract from Narrative; use "No reported loss" if blank)</li>
          <li><b>Loss Total:</b> {{LossTotal}} (calculate by summing all individual loss items; use "$0.00" if missing)</li>
          <li><b>Status:</b> {{Status}}</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <!-- Repeat case-card div for each case in this category -->
    </div>

    <div class="section">
      <div class="section-title">VI. Burglary - Residence</div>
      <div class="case-card">
        <div class="case-head">Case {{CaseNumber}} | {{MM/DD/YY HH:mm}} | {{IncidentType}} - {{Statute}}</div>
        <ul class="bullets">
          <li><b>Location:</b> {{FullAddress}}</li>
          <li><b>Grid/Zone:</b> {{Grid}} / {{Zone}}</li>
          <li><b>Point of Entry:</b> {{PointOfEntry}} (extract from Narrative: door, window, bed cover, etc.)</li>
          <li><b>Means of Entry:</b> {{MeansOfEntry}} (extract from Narrative: forced, unlocked, broken, etc.)</li>
          <li><b>Suspect Description:</b> {{SuspectDesc}} (use "Data Incomplete" if blank)</li>
          <li><b>Suspect Vehicle:</b> {{SuspectVehicle}} (use "Unknown" if blank)</li>
          <li><b>Loss Items:</b> {{LossItems}} (extract from Narrative; use "No reported loss" if blank)</li>
          <li><b>Loss Total:</b> {{LossTotal}} (calculate by summing all individual loss items; use "$0.00" if missing)</li>
          <li><b>Status:</b> {{Status}}</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <!-- Repeat case-card div for each case in this category -->
    </div>

    <!-- Key Takeaways Section -->
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div class="section-title">Key Takeaways</div>
    <ul class="bullets">
      <li>Total cases by type (summarize from all sections)</li>
      <li>Most common entry method (for burglaries)</li>
      <li>Hot-spots (zones/grids with most activity)</li>
      <li>Peak times/days</li>
    </ul>

    <!-- Summary Table -->
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <div class="section-title">Summary</div>
    <table aria-label="Summary Table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Case #</th>
          <th>Cycle</th>
          <th>Type</th>
          <th>Date/Time</th>
          <th>Loss Total</th>
          <th>Status</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <!-- One row per case, sorted chronologically -->
        <tr>
          <td>{{CaseNumber}}</td>
          <td>{cycle_id}</td>
          <td>{{IncidentType}}</td>
          <td>{{MM/DD/YY HH:mm}}</td>
          <td>{{LossTotal}}</td>
          <td>{{Status}}</td>
        </tr>
        <!-- Repeat for each case -->
      </tbody>
    </table>

    <div class="footer">
      <div>HPD | SSOCC | SCRPA Report | Cycle: {cycle_id}</div>
      <div>Generated: {generated_date_str}</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</body>
</html>
"""
            f.write(html_template)
            f.write("```\n\n")
            
            # Formatting Requirements
            f.write("### Formatting Requirements\n\n")
            f.write("* **Font:** DIN\n")
            f.write("* **Color for Titles/Headers:** HEX `#0d233c`\n")
            f.write("* **Page Layout:** Aim for **single page** output suitable for PDF inclusion.\n\n")
            f.write("* **Header block:** title, Cycle ID, date range, Prepared by, Submitted to, Version.\n\n")
            f.write("* **Section numbering:** Use Roman numerals (I, II, III, IV, V, VI).\n\n")
            f.write("* **Case header line format:** `Case {#} | {MM/DD/YY HH:mm} | {Incident Type} - {Statute}`.\n\n")
            f.write("* **Grid/Zone format:** `H4 / 8` or `F3 / 6`.\n\n")
            f.write("* **Parking Location label:** Present for MV Theft and Burglary - Auto.\n\n")
            f.write("* **Victim Vehicle:** Include make, model, and plate with state.\n\n")
            f.write("* **Explicit \"Data Incomplete\":** Where any field is blank.\n\n")
            f.write("* **Method field:** For MV Theft; Point/Means of Entry for burglaries.\n\n")
            f.write("* **Status:** Accepts combos like `Active/Administratively Closed`.\n\n")
            f.write("* **Summary table columns:** Case #, Cycle, Type, Date/Time, Loss Total, Status.\n\n")
            f.write("* **Footer:** \"HPD | SSOCC | SCRPA Report | Cycle: {Cycle}\" and Generated date.\n\n")
            f.write("* **Single-page layout:** Avoid page breaks inside cards or the table.\n\n")
            f.write("---\n\n")
            
            # CSV Column Mapping
            f.write("### CSV Column Mapping\n\n")
            f.write("The CSV file contains the following columns. Use them as follows:\n\n")
            f.write("**Direct Use (Pre-processed):**\n")
            f.write("- `CaseNumber` → Use directly\n")
            f.write("- `IncidentDateTime` → Format as MM/DD/YY HH:mm\n")
            f.write("- `IncidentType` → Use for case categorization\n")
            f.write("- `Subtype` → Use for specific incident type\n")
            f.write("- `Statute` → Include in case header\n")
            f.write("- `FullAddress` → Use for Location field\n")
            f.write("- `Grid` → Format as Grid/Zone (e.g., \"H4 / 8\")\n")
            f.write("- `Zone` → Format as Grid/Zone (e.g., \"H4 / 8\")\n")
            f.write("- `VictimVehicleMake` → Combine with Model and Plate\n")
            f.write("- `VictimVehicleModel` → Combine with Make and Plate\n")
            f.write("- `Plate` → Include with state\n")
            f.write("- `PlateState` → Include with plate\n")
            f.write("- `LossTotal` → Calculate by summing all individual loss item values from the Narrative.\n")
            f.write("  If individual loss items are extracted, add their values together to get the total.\n")
            f.write("  If LossTotal is provided in CSV, verify it matches the sum of individual items.\n")
            f.write("- `Status` → Use directly\n")
            f.write("- `CycleID` → Use in header and footer\n")
            f.write("- `RangeStart` → Use in header\n")
            f.write("- `RangeEnd` → Use in header\n\n")
            f.write("**Extract from Narrative (AI Processing Required):**\n")
            f.write("- `SuspectDesc` → Parse from Narrative column\n")
            f.write("- `SuspectVehicle` → Parse from Narrative column\n")
            f.write("- `LossItems` → Parse specific items and values from Narrative\n")
            f.write("- `Method` → Extract method of theft (for MV Theft)\n")
            f.write("- `PointOfEntry` → Extract entry point (for burglaries)\n")
            f.write("- `MeansOfEntry` → Extract how entry was made (for burglaries)\n")
            f.write("- `Allegation` → Extract nature of offense (for sexual offenses)\n")
            f.write("- `VictimSex` → Extract from Narrative\n")
            f.write("- `VictimAdultJuvenile` → Extract from Narrative\n")
            f.write("- `ParkingLocation` → Extract context (driveway, street, lot, etc.)\n")
            f.write("- `Context` → Extract location context\n\n")
            f.write("---\n\n")
            
            # Data Processing Instructions
            f.write("### Data Processing Instructions\n\n")
            f.write("**From the CSV file, extract and process:**\n\n")
            f.write("1. **Parse Narrative column** to extract:\n")
            f.write("   - Suspect descriptions (clothing, physical traits, age, race, gender)\n")
            f.write("   - Suspect vehicles (type, color, make/model if mentioned)\n")
            f.write("   - Loss items (specific items stolen and their values)\n")
            f.write("     **IMPORTANT**: Calculate Loss Total by summing all individual loss item values.\n")
            f.write("   - Methods of entry (for burglaries)\n")
            f.write("   - Point of entry (door, window, etc.)\n")
            f.write("   - Means of entry (forced, unlocked, etc.)\n")
            f.write("   - Allegations (for sexual offenses)\n")
            f.write("   - Victim details (gender, adult/juvenile, relationship)\n")
            f.write("   - Parking/location context (driveway, street, lot, garage, business)\n\n")
            f.write("2. **Use pre-processed columns** directly:\n")
            f.write("   - CaseNumber, IncidentDateTime, IncidentType, Statute\n")
            f.write("   - FullAddress, Grid, Zone\n")
            f.write("   - VictimVehicleMake, VictimVehicleModel, Plate, PlateState\n")
            f.write("   - LossTotal, Status, Officer, Squad, Detective\n")
            f.write("   - CycleID, RangeStart, RangeEnd\n\n")
            f.write("3. **Format dates** as MM/DD/YY HH:mm\n\n")
            f.write("4. **Format money** with commas and two decimals: $1,024.00\n")
            f.write("   **Loss Total Calculation**: Loss Total must be calculated by adding the sum of all individual loss items.\n")
            f.write("   Extract individual loss items and their values from the Narrative, then sum them to get the total.\n\n")
            f.write("5. **Sort chronologically** within each section (oldest to newest)\n\n")
            f.write("6. **Handle missing data**: Use \"Data Incomplete\" for blank suspect descriptions, ")
            f.write("\"Unknown\" for missing vehicles, \"$0.00\" for missing loss values\n\n")
            f.write("---\n\n")
            
            # Key Takeaways Section
            f.write("### Key Takeaways\n\n")
            f.write("At the end, include a **Key Takeaways** section with:\n\n")
            f.write("* Total cases by type\n")
            f.write("* Most common entry method (for burglaries)\n")
            f.write("* Hot-spots (zones/grids with most activity)\n")
            f.write("* Peak times/days\n\n")
            f.write("---\n\n")
            
            # Final Instructions
            f.write("## Final Instructions\n\n")
            f.write("1. **Read the CSV file** I've uploaded\n")
            f.write("2. **Process all cases** according to the instructions above\n")
            f.write("3. **Generate HTML** using the template structure provided\n")
            f.write("4. **Organize by category** (I-VI) with Roman numerals\n")
            f.write("5. **Sort chronologically** within each section\n")
            f.write("6. **Extract from Narrative** all missing details\n")
            f.write("7. **Create summary table** with all cases\n")
            f.write("8. **Add Key Takeaways** section\n")
            f.write("9. **Output complete HTML** ready for PDF conversion\n\n")
            f.write("**Important:** Use the exact HTML template structure provided above. ")
            f.write("Replace all placeholders with actual data from the CSV. ")
            f.write("Flag any missing data as \"Data Incomplete\". ")
            f.write("Ensure the output fits on a single page when printed.\n\n")
            f.write("---\n\n")
            f.write(f"**CSV File**: `{os.path.basename(csv_filename)}`\n")
            f.write(f"**Total Cases**: {total_cases}\n")
            f.write(f"**Cycle**: {cycle_id}\n")
            f.write(f"**Date Range**: {range_start} to {range_end}\n")
        
        print(f"✅ ChatGPT prompt file created: {os.path.basename(prompt_file)}")
        return prompt_file
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️  Could not create ChatGPT prompt file: {e}")
        import traceback
        traceback.print_exc()
        return None

def create_instructions_file(output_folder, csv_filename):
    """Create basic instruction file (legacy, kept for backward compatibility)"""
    try:
        instructions_file = os.path.join(output_folder, "BRIEFING_INSTRUCTIONS.txt")
        
        with open(instructions_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write("=" * 60 + "\n")
            f.write("SCRPA BRIEFING GENERATION INSTRUCTIONS\n")
            f.write("=" * 60 + "\n\n")
            f.write(f"Generated: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}\n\n")
            f.write("STEP 1: Upload CSV to ChatGPT\n")
            f.write(f"File: {os.path.basename(csv_filename)}\n\n")
            f.write("STEP 2: Use the ChatGPT Prompt File\n")
            f.write("Open CHATGPT_BRIEFING_PROMPT.md and copy the entire prompt.\n")
            f.write("Paste it into ChatGPT after uploading the CSV.\n\n")
            f.write("STEP 3: ChatGPT Will Generate HTML\n")
            f.write("ChatGPT will process the CSV and generate a complete HTML briefing\n")
            f.write("matching the template structure provided in the prompt.\n\n")
            f.write("OUTPUT:\n")
            f.write("ChatGPT will return a complete HTML file ready for PDF conversion.\n")
            f.write("=" * 60 + "\n")
        
        print(f"✅ Instructions file created: {os.path.basename(instructions_file)}")
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️  Could not create instructions file: {e}")

def main():
    """Main execution"""
    print("🚀 Starting SCRPA Briefing CSV Preparation\n")
    
    # Step 1: Find latest 7-day CSV
    csv_path = find_latest_7day_csv()
    if not csv_path:
        print("\n❌ Cannot proceed without 7-day CSV file")
        safe_input("\nPress Enter to exit...")
        return False
    
    # Step 2: Get cycle information
    print("\n📅 Loading cycle information...")
    # Check for REPORT_DATE environment variable (set by automation batch file)
    report_date_str = os.environ.get('REPORT_DATE', None)
    if report_date_str:
        print(f"   Using Report Date from environment: {report_date_str}")
        try:
            report_date_obj = datetime.strptime(report_date_str, "%m/%d/%Y")
            cycle_info = get_cycle_info_from_calendar(report_date_obj)
        except ValueError:
            print(f"   ⚠️  Invalid REPORT_DATE format: {report_date_str}, using today's date")
            cycle_info = get_current_cycle_info()
    else:
        cycle_info = get_current_cycle_info()
    
    # Step 3: Transform CSV
    print("\n🔄 Transforming CSV to briefing format...")
    briefing_df = transform_to_briefing_format(csv_path, cycle_info)
    
    if briefing_df is None:
        print("\n❌ Transformation failed")
        safe_input("\nPress Enter to exit...")
        return False
    
    # Step 4: Save briefing CSV
    print("\n💾 Saving briefing CSV...")
    output_file = save_briefing_csv(briefing_df, OUTPUT_FOLDER)
    
    if not output_file:
        print("\n❌ Failed to save CSV")
        safe_input("\nPress Enter to exit...")
        return False
    
    # Step 5: Create ChatGPT prompt file
    print("\n📝 Creating ChatGPT prompt file...")
    prompt_file = create_chatgpt_prompt_file(OUTPUT_FOLDER, output_file, briefing_df, cycle_info)
    
    # Step 6: Create basic instructions file
    print("\n📝 Creating instructions file...")
    create_instructions_file(OUTPUT_FOLDER, output_file)
    
    # Success summary
    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("✅ SUCCESS - BRIEFING CSV READY FOR CHATGPT")
    print("=" * 60)
    print(f"\n📂 Output Location: {OUTPUT_FOLDER}")
    print(f"📄 CSV File: {os.path.basename(output_file)}")
    print(f"📋 ChatGPT Prompt: CHATGPT_BRIEFING_PROMPT.md")
    print(f"📋 Instructions: BRIEFING_INSTRUCTIONS.txt")
    print("\n🤖 Next Steps:")
    print("   1. Upload the CSV file to ChatGPT")
    print("   2. Open CHATGPT_BRIEFING_PROMPT.md")
    print("   3. Copy the entire prompt and paste it into ChatGPT")
    print("   4. ChatGPT will generate the HTML briefing")
    print("   5. Save the HTML output and convert to PDF")
    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    
    safe_input("\nPress Enter to exit...")
    return True

if __name__ == "__main__":
    try:
        success = main()
        sys.exit(0 if success else 1)
    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        print("\n\n❌ Interrupted by user")
        sys.exit(1)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"\n❌ Unexpected error: {e}")
        import traceback
        traceback.print_exc()
        safe_input("\nPress Enter to exit...")
        sys.exit(1)





```

Checking for syntax errors:


## The Problem

The `prepare_briefing_csv.py` script was not filtering incidents by Report Date. It loaded the CSV and transformed it, but included all incidents regardless of whether their Report Date fell within the cycle range (12/23-12/29).

This caused incidents with Report Date 12/22 (before the cycle start) to be included in the briefing, even though the cycle is 12/23-12/29.

## The Fix

Added filtering logic in `transform_to_briefing_format()` that:

1. Filters by Report Date: After loading the CSV, the script now filters to only include incidents where `Report Date` is between `cycle_info['range_start']` and `cycle_info['range_end']`.
2. Reports exclusions: The script prints how many incidents were excluded if any fall outside the cycle range.
3. Zone formatting: Also fixed Zone formatting to convert decimal values (8.0) to integers (8).

## What Changed

**File**: `C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\02_ETL_Scripts\SCRPA\2025_12_23_scrpa_edit\prepare_briefing_csv.py`

**Lines 232-260**: Added filtering logic that:
- Parses the cycle start and end dates
- Converts Report Date column to date type
- Filters dataframe: `df = df[(df['Report Date'] >= cycle_start) & (df['Report Date'] <= cycle_end)]`
- Reports how many incidents were excluded

**Lines 240-245**: Fixed Zone formatting to convert decimals to integers

## Next Steps

1. Re-run the briefing preparation script — it will now filter out incidents with Report Date 12/22
2. The briefing should only include incidents with Report Date between 12/23 and 12/29
3. The ChatGPT prompt will only contain the correct incidents

The script will now correctly filter incidents to match your cycle definition, ensuring only incidents reported during the 7-day cycle are included in the briefing.

Checking what the batch file does and where the .pbix file is copied from:


Checking where the .pbix file is copied from:


No. The .pbix copied to the new folder comes from the template at `15_Templates\Base_Report.pbix`, which won't include the updated M code.

The M code we updated is in standalone `.m` files in `16_Reports\SCRPA\`:
- `all_crimes.m`
- `q_RMS_Source.m`
- `q_CycleCalendar.m`
- `q_CallTypeCategories.m`

These are separate from the .pbix. The .pbix stores queries internally, so the template needs to be updated.

## To Update the Template .pbix File:

1. Open the template in Power BI Desktop:
   ```
   C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\15_Templates\Base_Report.pbix
   ```

2. Update the queries:
   - Replace `All_Crimes` (or `Updated_All_Crimes`) with the M code from `all_crimes.m`
   - Add/update the staging queries:
     - `q_RMS_Source` (from `q_RMS_Source.m`)
     - `q_CycleCalendar` (from `q_CycleCalendar.m`)
     - `q_CallTypeCategories` (from `q_CallTypeCategories.m`)

3. Save the template — this updates `Base_Report.pbix` with the new M code.

4. Run the batch file — the copied .pbix will include the updated queries.

Alternatively, update the queries in the copied .pbix after the batch file runs, but updating the template ensures all future copies include the fixes.

I'll analyze the Burglary chart discrepancy and identify the filtering logic issue causing incorrect incident counts.## 🔍 **ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS**

**Current Cycle:** C13W51 (12/23/25 - 12/29/25, Report Due 12/30/25)

**The Problem:**
Your Burglary chart shows **2 incidents** in the 7-Day period (green bars), but you only have **1 reportable incident** (Case 25-113076) which is a **BACKFILL case** that should appear ONLY in the lagday table, NOT in the period chart.

**Why This Happens:**

1. **Incident Details:**
   - Case Number: 25-113076
   - Incident Date: **12/20/25** (BEFORE current cycle start of 12/23/25)
   - Report Date: **12/28/25** (WITHIN current cycle 12/23-12/29)
   - Lag Days: **3 days**
   - Status: **BACKFILL** (occurred before cycle, reported during cycle)

2. **Power BI Period Logic Flaw:**
   - Your M Code calculates "Period" based on `Report_Date` proximity to "Today"
   - Current logic: `if Report_Date within last 7 days from Today → "7-Day"`
   - This INCORRECTLY includes backfill cases in the 7-Day chart

3. **Correct Logic Should Be:**
   - Only incidents where `Incident_Date` falls within cycle boundaries (12/23-12/29) should appear in 7-Day charts
   - Incidents where `Incident_Date < Cycle_Start` AND `Report_Date` within cycle = BACKFILL (lagday table only)

## 📊 **VALIDATION ANALYSIS**

Let me check your actual data to confirm the discrepancy:## ✅ **CONFIRMED: DATA VALIDATION RESULTS**

**Critical Finding:**
Your 7-Day chart shows **2 Burglary incidents**, but **BOTH are BACKFILL cases** that should **ONLY** appear in the lagday table:

| Case | Incident Date | Report Date | Lag Days | Type | Status |
|------|--------------|-------------|----------|------|--------|
| **25-111319** | 12/21/25 | 12/23/25 | 2 | Burglary-Auto | ❌ BACKFILL |
| **25-113076** | 12/20/25 | 12/28/25 | 8 | Burglary-Residence | ❌ BACKFILL |

**Correct Counts:**
- ✅ 7-Day chart should show: **0 incidents**
- ⚠️ Lagday table should show: **2 incidents**

---

## 🔧 **THE FIX: M Code Correction**

Your current M Code uses **Report_Date** for period classification. It should use **Incident_Date** with cycle boundaries.

**Current (INCORRECT) Logic:**
```m
Period_Added = Table.AddColumn(
    ...,
    "Period",
    each 
        let
            d = Duration.Days(DateTime.LocalNow() - [Report_Date])  // ❌ WRONG
        in
            if d <= 7 then "7-Day"
            else if d <= 28 then "28-Day"
            ...
```

**Fixed Logic:**
```m
Period_Added = Table.AddColumn(
    Period_SortKey_Added,
    "Period",
    each 
        let
            IncidentDate = [Incident_Date_Date],
            
            // Get current cycle from calendar
            Today = Date.From(DateTime.LocalNow()),
            CurrentCycle = Table.SelectRows(
                CycleCalendarTable,
                each 
                    let
                        StartDate = Date.FromText([7_Day_Start]),
                        EndDate = Date.FromText([7_Day_End])
                    in Today >= StartDate and Today <= EndDate
            ),
            
            // Extract cycle boundaries
            HasCurrentCycle = not Table.IsEmpty(CurrentCycle),
            Cycle7DayStart = if HasCurrentCycle then Date.FromText(CurrentCycle{0}[7_Day_Start]) else null,
            Cycle7DayEnd = if HasCurrentCycle then Date.FromText(CurrentCycle{0}[7_Day_End]) else null,
            Cycle28DayStart = if HasCurrentCycle then Date.FromText(CurrentCycle{0}[28_Day_Start]) else null,
            Cycle28DayEnd = if HasCurrentCycle then Date.FromText(CurrentCycle{0}[28_Day_End]) else null,
            
            // Period based on INCIDENT DATE vs CYCLE BOUNDARIES
            Period = 
                if IncidentDate = null then "Historical"
                else if HasCurrentCycle then
                    if IncidentDate >= Cycle7DayStart and IncidentDate <= Cycle7DayEnd then "7-Day"
                    else if IncidentDate >= Cycle28DayStart and IncidentDate <= Cycle28DayEnd then "28-Day"
                    else if Date.Year(IncidentDate) = Date.Year(DateTime.LocalNow()) then "YTD"
                    else "Historical"
                else if Date.Year(IncidentDate) = Date.Year(DateTime.LocalNow()) then "YTD"
                else "Historical"
        in Period,
    type text
),
```

  - Case 25-113076: Inc 12/20, Rep 12/28, Lag 8 days

## 🔧 **ROOT CAUSE**

Your M Code calculates "Period" using **Report_Date** proximity to "Today" instead of checking if **Incident_Date** falls within cycle boundaries (12/23-12/29).

**Result:** Backfill cases incorrectly appear in 7-Day charts when they should **only** be in lagday table.

   ```

   - Lagday table: **2** burglary cases

**Cursor**

Reviewing Claude's analysis and comparing it with our current implementation. There's a distinction between cycle definition (Report Date) and period classification for charts (should be Incident Date). Updating the Period calculation accordingly:


Updating the Period calculation: it should be based on Incident_Date vs cycle boundaries, not Report_Date. The cycle definition (which incidents are in the report) uses Report_Date, but Period (for charts) should use Incident_Date. Applying Claude's fix:


```objective-c
let
    // -----------------------------
    // Helpers
    // -----------------------------
    CoalesceText = (a as nullable text, b as nullable text) as nullable text =>
        if a = null or a = "" then b else a,
    CoalesceAny = (a as any, b as any) as any =>
        if a = null then b else a,

    AsTime =
        (v as any) as nullable time =>
            if v = null or v = "" then null
            else if Value.Is(v, type time) then v
            else if Value.Is(v, type duration) then (try Time.From(v) otherwise null)
            else if Value.Is(v, type datetime) then Time.From(v)
            else if Value.Is(v, type number) then (try Time.From(v) otherwise null)
            else if Value.Is(v, type text) then
                let
                    t = Text.Trim(Text.From(v)),
                    t1 = (try Time.FromText(t) otherwise null),
                    t2 = if t1 = null then (try Time.FromText(t & ":00") otherwise null) else t1
                in
                    t2
            else null,

    AsTimeQuick =
        (v as any) as nullable time =>
            if v = null or v = "" then null
            else if Value.Is(v, type time) then v
            else if Value.Is(v, type datetime) then Time.From(v)
            else if Value.Is(v, type duration) then (try Time.From(v) otherwise null)
            else if Value.Is(v, type number) then (try Time.From(v) otherwise null)
            else if Value.Is(v, type text) then (try Time.FromText(Text.Trim(Text.From(v))) otherwise null)
            else null,

    AsDate =
        (v as any) as nullable date =>
            if v = null or v = "" then null
            else if Value.Is(v, type date) then v
            else if Value.Is(v, type datetime) then Date.From(v)
            else if Value.Is(v, type number) then (try Date.From(v) otherwise null)
            else if Value.Is(v, type text) then (try Date.FromText(Text.From(v)) otherwise null)
            else null,

    // ===========================================
    // STAGED SOURCES (NO File.Contents / Folder.Files HERE)
    // ===========================================
    FirstTable_Staged = Table.Buffer(q_RMS_Source),
    CycleCalendar_Staged = q_CycleCalendar,
    CallTypeCategories_Staged = q_CallTypeCategories,

    // Compute "Today" once
    Today = Date.From(DateTime.LocalNow()),


    // ===========================================
    // ENHANCED TIME PROCESSING WITH CASCADING LOGIC
    // ===========================================
    BestTimeValueAdded = Table.AddColumn(
        FirstTable_Staged,
        "BestTimeValue",
        each
            let
                IT = try [Incident Time] otherwise null,
                ITB = try [Incident Time_Between] otherwise null,
                RT = try [Report Time] otherwise null,

                PIT = AsTime(IT),
                PITB = AsTime(ITB),
                PRT = AsTime(RT)
            in
                if PIT <> null then PIT else if PITB <> null then PITB else PRT,
        type nullable time
    ),

    TimeSourceAdded = Table.AddColumn(
        BestTimeValueAdded,
        "TimeSource",
        each
            let
                PIT = AsTimeQuick(try [Incident Time] otherwise null),
                PITB = AsTimeQuick(try [Incident Time_Between] otherwise null),
                PRT = AsTimeQuick(try [Report Time] otherwise null)
            in
                if PIT <> null then "Incident Time"
                else if PITB <> null then "Incident Time_Between"
                else if PRT <> null then "Report Time"
                else "None",
        type text
    ),

    Incident_Time_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeSourceAdded,
        "Incident_Time",
        each
            let bt = [BestTimeValue]
            in
                if bt <> null then
                    Text.PadStart(Text.From(Time.Hour(bt)), 2, "0")
                        & ":" & Text.PadStart(Text.From(Time.Minute(bt)), 2, "0")
                        & ":" & Text.PadStart(Text.From(Time.Second(bt)), 2, "0")
                else "00:00:00",
        type text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // INCIDENT DATE (TEXT + DATE) WITH CASCADE
    // ===========================================
    Incident_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Time_Added,
        "Incident_Date",
        each
            let
                dIT = AsDate(try [Incident Date] otherwise null),
                dITB = AsDate(try [Incident Date_Between] otherwise null),
                dRT = AsDate(try [Report Date] otherwise null),
                Best = if dIT <> null then dIT else if dITB <> null then dITB else dRT
            in
                if Best <> null then Date.ToText(Best, "MM/dd/yy") else "Unknown",
        type text
    ),

    Incident_Date_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Date_Added,
        "Incident_Date_Date",
        each
            let
                dIT = AsDate(try [Incident Date] otherwise null),
                dITB = AsDate(try [Incident Date_Between] otherwise null),
                dRT = AsDate(try [Report Date] otherwise null)
            in
                if dIT <> null then dIT else if dITB <> null then dITB else dRT,
        type date
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // REPORT DATE (DATE + TEXT)
    // ===========================================
    Report_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Date_Date_Added,
        "Report_Date",
        each
            let
                dRD = AsDate(try [Report Date] otherwise null),
                dED = AsDate(try [EntryDate] otherwise null)
            in
                CoalesceAny(dRD, CoalesceAny(dED, [Incident_Date_Date])),
        type nullable date
    ),

    Report_Date_Text_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Report_Date_Added,
        "Report_Date_Text",
        each if [Report_Date] <> null then Date.ToText([Report_Date], "MM/dd/yy") else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    IncidentToReportDays_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Report_Date_Text_Added,
        "IncidentToReportDays",
        each if [Report_Date] <> null and [Incident_Date_Date] <> null then Duration.Days([Report_Date] - [Incident_Date_Date]) else null,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // CYCLE CALENDAR (from staged query) - MOVED EARLIER FOR PERIOD CALCULATION
    // ===========================================
    CurrentCycleTbl = Table.SelectRows(CycleCalendar_Staged, each Today >= [7_Day_Start] and Today <= [7_Day_End]),
    HasCurrentCycle = not Table.IsEmpty(CurrentCycleTbl),
    CurrentCycleStart = if HasCurrentCycle then CurrentCycleTbl{0}[7_Day_Start] else null,
    CurrentCycleEnd = if HasCurrentCycle then CurrentCycleTbl{0}[7_Day_End] else null,
    CurrentCycleName = if HasCurrentCycle then CurrentCycleTbl{0}[Report_Name] else null,

    // ===========================================
    // PERIOD CALCULATION (Based on Incident_Date vs Cycle Boundaries)
    // ===========================================
    // CRITICAL: Period must be based on Incident_Date, NOT Report_Date
    // This ensures charts show when crimes OCCURRED, not when they were reported
    // Backfill cases (incident before cycle, reported during cycle) should NOT appear in 7-Day charts
    Period_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        IncidentToReportDays_Added,
        "Period",
        each
            let 
                dI = [Incident_Date_Date],
                // Get 28-Day cycle boundaries from calendar (if available)
                Cycle28DayStart = if HasCurrentCycle then CurrentCycleTbl{0}[28_Day_Start] else null,
                Cycle28DayEnd = if HasCurrentCycle then CurrentCycleTbl{0}[28_Day_End] else null
            in
                if dI = null then "Historical"
                // 7-Day period: Incident_Date falls within current 7-day cycle boundaries
                else if HasCurrentCycle and dI >= CurrentCycleStart and dI <= CurrentCycleEnd then "7-Day"
                // 28-Day period: Incident_Date falls within current 28-day cycle boundaries
                else if HasCurrentCycle and Cycle28DayStart <> null and Cycle28DayEnd <> null and dI >= Cycle28DayStart and dI <= Cycle28DayEnd then "28-Day"
                // YTD: incident occurred in current year (based on Incident Date)
                else if Date.Year(dI) = Date.Year(Today) then "YTD"
                else "Historical",
        type text
    ),

    Period_SortKey_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Period_Added,
        "Period_SortKey",
        each if [Period] = "7-Day" then 1 else if [Period] = "28-Day" then 2 else if [Period] = "YTD" then 3 else if [Period] = "Historical" then 4 else 99,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    CycleName_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Period_SortKey_Added,
        "cycle_name",
        each
            let d = [Incident_Date_Date]
            in
                if d = null then "Unknown"
                else
                    let m = Table.SelectRows(CycleCalendar_Staged, each d >= [7_Day_Start] and d <= [7_Day_End])
                    in if Table.IsEmpty(m) then "Historical" else m{0}[Report_Name],
        type text
    ),

    Backfill_Flag_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        CycleName_Added,
        "Backfill_7Day",
        each
            let dI = [Incident_Date_Date], dR = [Report_Date]
            in
                HasCurrentCycle and dI <> null and dR <> null and dI < CurrentCycleStart and dR >= CurrentCycleStart and dR <= CurrentCycleEnd,
        type logical
    ),

    Cycle_Name_Adjusted = Table.AddColumn(
        Backfill_Flag_Added,
        "cycle_name_adjusted",
        each if [Backfill_7Day] then CoalesceText(CurrentCycleName, [cycle_name]) else [cycle_name],
        type text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // IS CURRENT 7-DAY CYCLE (for dynamic filtering)
    // ===========================================
    IsCurrent7DayCycle_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Cycle_Name_Adjusted,
        "IsCurrent7DayCycle",
        each
            let dR = [Report_Date]
            in
                if HasCurrentCycle and dR <> null then
                    dR >= CurrentCycleStart and dR <= CurrentCycleEnd
                else false,
        type logical
    ),

    IsLagDay_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        IsCurrent7DayCycle_Added,
        "IsLagDay",
        each
            let dI = [Incident_Date_Date], dR = [Report_Date]
            in
                if dI = null or dR = null then false
                else
                    let
                        ReportCycle = Table.SelectRows(CycleCalendar_Staged, each dR >= [7_Day_Start] and dR <= [7_Day_End]),
                        CycleStartForReport = if Table.IsEmpty(ReportCycle) then null else ReportCycle{0}[7_Day_Start]
                    in
                        CycleStartForReport <> null and dI < CycleStartForReport,
        type logical
    ),

    LagDays_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        IsLagDay_Added,
        "LagDays",
        each
            let dI = [Incident_Date_Date], dR = [Report_Date]
            in
                if dI = null or dR = null then null
                else if not [IsLagDay] then 0
                else
                    let
                        ReportCycle = Table.SelectRows(CycleCalendar_Staged, each dR >= [7_Day_Start] and dR <= [7_Day_End]),
                        CycleStartForReport = if Table.IsEmpty(ReportCycle) then null else ReportCycle{0}[7_Day_Start]
                    in
                        if CycleStartForReport <> null then Duration.Days(CycleStartForReport - dI) else 0,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // TIME OF DAY
    // ===========================================
    StartOfHour_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        LagDays_Added,
        "StartOfHour",
        each
            let bt = [BestTimeValue]
            in if bt <> null then Time.ToText(#time(Time.Hour(bt), 0, 0), "hh:mm:ss") else "00:00:00",
        type text
    ),

    TimeOfDay_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        StartOfHour_Added,
        "TimeOfDay",
        each
            let bt = [BestTimeValue], hr = if bt = null then null else Time.Hour(bt)
            in
                if hr = null then "Unknown Time"
                else if hr >= 4 and hr < 8 then "Early Morning (04:00–07:59)"
                else if hr >= 8 and hr < 12 then "Morning (08:00–11:59)"
                else if hr >= 12 and hr < 16 then "Afternoon (12:00–15:59)"
                else if hr >= 16 and hr < 20 then "Evening Peak (16:00–19:59)"
                else if hr >= 20 and hr < 24 then "Night (20:00–23:59)"
                else "Late Night (00:00–03:59)",
        type text
    ),

    TimeOfDay_SortKey_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeOfDay_Added,
        "TimeOfDay_SortKey",
        each
            let t = [TimeOfDay]
            in
                if t = "Late Night (00:00–03:59)" then 1
                else if t = "Early Morning (04:00–07:59)" then 2
                else if t = "Morning (08:00–11:59)" then 3
                else if t = "Afternoon (12:00–15:59)" then 4
                else if t = "Evening Peak (16:00–19:59)" then 5
                else if t = "Night (20:00–23:59)" then 6
                else if t = "Unknown Time" then 99
                else 0,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // INCIDENT CONSOLIDATION & CATEGORY
    // ===========================================
    AllIncidents_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeOfDay_SortKey_Added,
        "ALL_INCIDENTS",
        each
            let
                i1 = try [Incident Type_1] otherwise null,
                i2 = try [Incident Type_2] otherwise null,
                i3 = try [Incident Type_3] otherwise null
            in
                (if i1 = null then "" else i1)
                    & (if i2 = null or i2 = "" then "" else ", " & i2)
                    & (if i3 = null or i3 = "" then "" else ", " & i3),
        type text
    ),

    CrimeCategory_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        AllIncidents_Added,
        "Crime_Category",
        each
            let
                L = Text.Upper(CoalesceText([ALL_INCIDENTS], "")),
                N = Text.Upper(CoalesceText(try [Narrative] otherwise null, ""))
            in
                if Text.Contains(L, "MOTOR VEHICLE THEFT") and (Text.Contains(N, "THEFT OF HIS PROPERTY") or Text.Contains(N, "THEFT FROM MOTOR VEHICLE"))
                then "Burglary Auto"
                else if Text.Contains(L, "MOTOR VEHICLE THEFT") then "Motor Vehicle Theft"
                else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - AUTO"), Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - AUTO"), Text.Contains(L, "THEFT FROM MOTOR VEHICLE")}) then "Burglary Auto"
                else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - COMMERCIAL"), Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - COMMERCIAL"), Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - RESIDENCE"), Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - RESIDENCE")}) then "Burglary - Comm & Res"
                else if Text.Contains(L, "ROBBERY") then "Robbery"
                else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "SEXUAL"), Text.Contains(L, "RAPE")}) then "Sexual Offenses"
                else "Other",
        type text
    ),

    CleanIncidentTypes_Added = Table.TransformColumns(
        CrimeCategory_Added,
        {
            {"Incident Type_1", each if _ <> null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_, " - 2C") else _, type text},
            {"Incident Type_2", each if _ <> null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_, " - 2C") else _, type text},
            {"Incident Type_3", each if _ <> null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_, " - 2C") else _, type text}
        }
    ),

    Incident_Type_1_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        CleanIncidentTypes_Added,
        "Incident_Type_1_Norm",
        each if [Incident Type_1] <> null then Text.Replace([Incident Type_1], "Attempted Burglary", "Burglary") else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    Incident_Type_2_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Type_1_Norm_Added,
        "Incident_Type_2_Norm",
        each if [Incident Type_2] <> null then Text.Replace([Incident Type_2], "Attempted Burglary", "Burglary") else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    Incident_Type_3_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Type_2_Norm_Added,
        "Incident_Type_3_Norm",
        each if [Incident Type_3] <> null then Text.Replace([Incident Type_3], "Attempted Burglary", "Burglary") else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    Narrative_Cleaned = Table.TransformColumns(
        Incident_Type_3_Norm_Added,
        {
            {
                "Narrative",
                each
                    let
                        t = _,
                        step1 =
                            if t = null or t = "" then null
                            else Text.Replace(Text.Replace(Text.Replace(t, "#(cr)#(lf)", " "), "#(lf)", " "), "#(cr)", " "),
                        step2 =
                            if step1 = null then null
                            else Text.Replace(Text.Replace(Text.Replace(step1, "    ", " "), "   ", " "), "  ", " "),
                        step3 = if step2 = null then null else Text.Clean(step2),
                        step4 = if step3 = null then null else Text.Trim(step3)
                    in
                        if step4 = null or step4 = "" then null else step4,
                type text
            }
        }
    ),

    Vehicle_1_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Narrative_Cleaned,
        "Vehicle_1",
        each
            let
                regState = CoalesceText(try Text.From([#"Reg State 1"]) otherwise null, ""),
                registration = CoalesceText(try Text.From([#"Registration 1"]) otherwise null, ""),
                make = CoalesceText(try Text.From([Make1]) otherwise null, ""),
                model = CoalesceText(try Text.From([Model1]) otherwise null, ""),
                stateReg =
                    if regState <> "" and registration <> "" then regState & " - " & registration
                    else if registration <> "" then registration
                    else regState,
                makeModel =
                    if make <> "" and model <> "" then make & "/" & model
                    else if make <> "" then make
                    else model,
                result =
                    if stateReg <> "" and makeModel <> "" then stateReg & ", " & makeModel
                    else if stateReg <> "" then stateReg
                    else makeModel
            in
                if result = null or result = "" then null else Text.Upper(result),
        type nullable text
    ),

    Vehicle_2_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_1_Added,
        "Vehicle_2",
        each
            let
                regState = CoalesceText(try Text.From([#"Reg State 2"]) otherwise null, ""),
                registration = CoalesceText(try Text.From([#"Registration 2"]) otherwise null, ""),
                make = CoalesceText(try Text.From([Make2]) otherwise null, ""),
                model = CoalesceText(try Text.From([Model2]) otherwise null, ""),
                stateReg =
                    if regState <> "" and registration <> "" then regState & " - " & registration
                    else if registration <> "" then registration
                    else regState,
                makeModel =
                    if make <> "" and model <> "" then make & "/" & model
                    else if make <> "" then make
                    else model,
                result =
                    if stateReg <> "" and makeModel <> "" then stateReg & ", " & makeModel
                    else if stateReg <> "" then stateReg
                    else makeModel
            in
                if result = null or result = "" then null else Text.Upper(result),
        type nullable text
    ),

    Vehicle_Combined_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_2_Added,
        "Vehicle_1_and_Vehicle_2",
        each if [Vehicle_1] <> null and [Vehicle_2] <> null then [Vehicle_1] & " | " & [Vehicle_2] else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    Clean_Address_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_Combined_Added,
        "Clean_Address",
        each
            let addr = CoalesceText(Text.Trim(CoalesceText(try Text.From([FullAddress]) otherwise null, "")), "")
            in
                if addr = "" then null
                else
                    let cleaned = Text.BeforeDelimiter(addr, ", Hackensack, NJ", {0, RelativePosition.FromStart})
                    in if cleaned <> "" then cleaned else addr,
        type nullable text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // FAST CATEGORY/RESPONSE MAPPING VIA JOINS (from staged CallTypeCategories)
    // ===========================================
    WithIncidentKey = Table.AddColumn(
        Clean_Address_Added,
        "IncidentKey",
        each CoalesceText([ALL_INCIDENTS], try [Incident Type_1] otherwise null),
        type text
    ),

    Join_Exact_Incident = Table.NestedJoin(WithIncidentKey, {"IncidentKey"}, CallTypeCategories_Staged, {"Incident"}, "CT_Exact", JoinKind.LeftOuter),
    Join_Exact_IncidentNorm = Table.NestedJoin(Join_Exact_Incident, {"IncidentKey"}, CallTypeCategories_Staged, {"Incident_Norm"}, "CT_ExactNorm", JoinKind.LeftOuter),

    NeedFuzzyFlag = Table.AddColumn(
        Join_Exact_IncidentNorm,
        "_NeedFuzzy",
        each (try Table.IsEmpty([CT_Exact]) otherwise true) and (try Table.IsEmpty([CT_ExactNorm]) otherwise true),
        type logical
    ),

    OnlyNeedFuzzy = Table.SelectRows(NeedFuzzyFlag, each [_NeedFuzzy] = true),

    FuzzyJoined = Table.FuzzyNestedJoin(
        OnlyNeedFuzzy,
        {"IncidentKey"},
        CallTypeCategories_Staged,
        {"Incident"},
        "CT_Fuzzy",
        JoinKind.LeftOuter,
        [IgnoreCase = true, IgnoreSpace = true, Threshold = 0.8]
    ),

    FuzzyMap = Table.SelectColumns(FuzzyJoined, {"IncidentKey", "CT_Fuzzy"}),

    Recombined = Table.NestedJoin(NeedFuzzyFlag, {"IncidentKey"}, FuzzyMap, {"IncidentKey"}, "CT_FuzzyMap", JoinKind.LeftOuter),

    Expanded = Table.TransformColumns(
        Recombined,
        {
            {"CT_Exact", each if _ is table and not Table.IsEmpty(_) then _ else null},
            {"CT_ExactNorm", each if _ is table and not Table.IsEmpty(_) then _ else null},
            {"CT_FuzzyMap", each if _ is table and not Table.IsEmpty(_) and _{0}[CT_Fuzzy] is table and not Table.IsEmpty(_{0}[CT_Fuzzy]) then _{0}[CT_Fuzzy] else null}
        }
    ),

    TakeCategory = Table.AddColumn(
        Expanded,
        "Category_Type",
        each
            let
                a = try [CT_Exact]{0}[Category_Type] otherwise null,
                b = if a = null then (try [CT_ExactNorm]{0}[Category_Type] otherwise null) else null,
                c = if a = null and b = null then (try [CT_FuzzyMap]{0}[Category_Type] otherwise null) else null
            in
                CoalesceText(a, CoalesceText(b, CoalesceText(c, "Unknown"))),
        type text
    ),

    TakeResponse = Table.AddColumn(
        TakeCategory,
        "Response_Type",
        each
            let
                a = try [CT_Exact]{0}[Response_Type] otherwise null,
                b = if a = null then (try [CT_ExactNorm]{0}[Response_Type] otherwise null) else null,
                c = if a = null and b = null then (try [CT_FuzzyMap]{0}[Response_Type] otherwise null) else null
            in
                CoalesceText(a, CoalesceText(b, CoalesceText(c, "Unknown"))),
        type text
    ),

    Category_Response_Added = Table.RemoveColumns(TakeResponse, {"CT_Exact", "CT_ExactNorm", "CT_FuzzyMap", "_NeedFuzzy"}),

    TimeValidation_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Category_Response_Added,
        "Time_Validation",
        each
            "Source: " & [TimeSource]
                & " | Original IT: " & (if [Incident Time] <> null then Text.From([Incident Time]) else "null")
                & " | Original ITB: " & (if [Incident Time_Between] <> null then Text.From([Incident Time_Between]) else "null")
                & " | Original RT: " & (if [Report Time] <> null then Text.From([Report Time]) else "null")
                & " | Cascaded: " & (if [BestTimeValue] <> null then Time.ToText([BestTimeValue]) else "null"),
        type text
    ),

    FinalResult = TimeValidation_Added,

#"Sorted Rows" = Table.Sort(
        FinalResult,
        {{"Incident Date", Order.Ascending}, {"Period", Order.Descending}, {"Report Date", Order.Ascending}, {"Report_Date", Order.Ascending}}
    ),

#"Changed Type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(
#"Sorted Rows",
        {{"Incident Time_Between", type time}, {"Incident Time", type time}, {"Report Time", type time}}
    )
in
#"Changed Type"
```

Checking the cycle calendar structure to ensure we're accessing the 28-day columns correctly:


Checking if the cycle calendar includes 28-day columns and updating the query if needed:


Updating the cycle calendar query to include 28-day columns, then fixing the Period calculation:


```objective-c
// ===========================================
// STAGING QUERY: Cycle Calendar
// Purpose: Load and buffer cycle calendar CSV
// Disable Load: Yes (referenced by Updated_All_Crimes)
// ===========================================
let CycleCalendarRaw = Csv.Document(
        File.Contents("C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of "
                      "Hackensack\09_Reference\Temporal\SCRPA_Cycle\7Day_28Day_"
                      "Cycle_20250414.csv"),
        [ Encoding = 65001, Delimiter = ",", QuoteStyle = QuoteStyle.Csv ]),
    CycleCalendarTable0 =
        Table.PromoteHeaders(CycleCalendarRaw, [PromoteAllScalars = true]),
    CycleCalendarTyped = Table.TransformColumnTypes(
        CycleCalendarTable0, {{"7_Day_Start", type date},
                              {"7_Day_End", type date},
                              {"28_Day_Start", type date},
                              {"28_Day_End", type date},
                              {"Report_Name", type text}}),
    CycleCalendar = Table.Buffer(CycleCalendarTyped) in CycleCalendar
```

```objective-c
let
    // -----------------------------
    // Helpers
    // -----------------------------
    CoalesceText = (a as nullable text, b as nullable text) as nullable text =>
        if a = null or a = "" then b else a,
    CoalesceAny = (a as any, b as any) as any =>
        if a = null then b else a,

    AsTime =
        (v as any) as nullable time =>
            if v = null or v = "" then null
            else if Value.Is(v, type time) then v
            else if Value.Is(v, type duration) then (try Time.From(v) otherwise null)
            else if Value.Is(v, type datetime) then Time.From(v)
            else if Value.Is(v, type number) then (try Time.From(v) otherwise null)
            else if Value.Is(v, type text) then
                let
                    t = Text.Trim(Text.From(v)),
                    t1 = (try Time.FromText(t) otherwise null),
                    t2 = if t1 = null then (try Time.FromText(t & ":00") otherwise null) else t1
                in
                    t2
            else null,

    AsTimeQuick =
        (v as any) as nullable time =>
            if v = null or v = "" then null
            else if Value.Is(v, type time) then v
            else if Value.Is(v, type datetime) then Time.From(v)
            else if Value.Is(v, type duration) then (try Time.From(v) otherwise null)
            else if Value.Is(v, type number) then (try Time.From(v) otherwise null)
            else if Value.Is(v, type text) then (try Time.FromText(Text.Trim(Text.From(v))) otherwise null)
            else null,

    AsDate =
        (v as any) as nullable date =>
            if v = null or v = "" then null
            else if Value.Is(v, type date) then v
            else if Value.Is(v, type datetime) then Date.From(v)
            else if Value.Is(v, type number) then (try Date.From(v) otherwise null)
            else if Value.Is(v, type text) then (try Date.FromText(Text.From(v)) otherwise null)
            else null,

    // ===========================================
    // STAGED SOURCES (NO File.Contents / Folder.Files HERE)
    // ===========================================
    FirstTable_Staged = Table.Buffer(q_RMS_Source),
    CycleCalendar_Staged = q_CycleCalendar,
    CallTypeCategories_Staged = q_CallTypeCategories,

    // Compute "Today" once
    Today = Date.From(DateTime.LocalNow()),


    // ===========================================
    // ENHANCED TIME PROCESSING WITH CASCADING LOGIC
    // ===========================================
    BestTimeValueAdded = Table.AddColumn(
        FirstTable_Staged,
        "BestTimeValue",
        each
            let
                IT = try [Incident Time] otherwise null,
                ITB = try [Incident Time_Between] otherwise null,
                RT = try [Report Time] otherwise null,

                PIT = AsTime(IT),
                PITB = AsTime(ITB),
                PRT = AsTime(RT)
            in
                if PIT <> null then PIT else if PITB <> null then PITB else PRT,
        type nullable time
    ),

    TimeSourceAdded = Table.AddColumn(
        BestTimeValueAdded,
        "TimeSource",
        each
            let
                PIT = AsTimeQuick(try [Incident Time] otherwise null),
                PITB = AsTimeQuick(try [Incident Time_Between] otherwise null),
                PRT = AsTimeQuick(try [Report Time] otherwise null)
            in
                if PIT <> null then "Incident Time"
                else if PITB <> null then "Incident Time_Between"
                else if PRT <> null then "Report Time"
                else "None",
        type text
    ),

    Incident_Time_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeSourceAdded,
        "Incident_Time",
        each
            let bt = [BestTimeValue]
            in
                if bt <> null then
                    Text.PadStart(Text.From(Time.Hour(bt)), 2, "0")
                        & ":" & Text.PadStart(Text.From(Time.Minute(bt)), 2, "0")
                        & ":" & Text.PadStart(Text.From(Time.Second(bt)), 2, "0")
                else "00:00:00",
        type text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // INCIDENT DATE (TEXT + DATE) WITH CASCADE
    // ===========================================
    Incident_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Time_Added,
        "Incident_Date",
        each
            let
                dIT = AsDate(try [Incident Date] otherwise null),
                dITB = AsDate(try [Incident Date_Between] otherwise null),
                dRT = AsDate(try [Report Date] otherwise null),
                Best = if dIT <> null then dIT else if dITB <> null then dITB else dRT
            in
                if Best <> null then Date.ToText(Best, "MM/dd/yy") else "Unknown",
        type text
    ),

    Incident_Date_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Date_Added,
        "Incident_Date_Date",
        each
            let
                dIT = AsDate(try [Incident Date] otherwise null),
                dITB = AsDate(try [Incident Date_Between] otherwise null),
                dRT = AsDate(try [Report Date] otherwise null)
            in
                if dIT <> null then dIT else if dITB <> null then dITB else dRT,
        type date
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // REPORT DATE (DATE + TEXT)
    // ===========================================
    Report_Date_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Date_Date_Added,
        "Report_Date",
        each
            let
                dRD = AsDate(try [Report Date] otherwise null),
                dED = AsDate(try [EntryDate] otherwise null)
            in
                CoalesceAny(dRD, CoalesceAny(dED, [Incident_Date_Date])),
        type nullable date
    ),

    Report_Date_Text_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Report_Date_Added,
        "Report_Date_Text",
        each if [Report_Date] <> null then Date.ToText([Report_Date], "MM/dd/yy") else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    IncidentToReportDays_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Report_Date_Text_Added,
        "IncidentToReportDays",
        each if [Report_Date] <> null and [Incident_Date_Date] <> null then Duration.Days([Report_Date] - [Incident_Date_Date]) else null,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // CYCLE CALENDAR (from staged query) - MOVED EARLIER FOR PERIOD CALCULATION
    // ===========================================
    CurrentCycleTbl = Table.SelectRows(CycleCalendar_Staged, each Today >= [7_Day_Start] and Today <= [7_Day_End]),
    HasCurrentCycle = not Table.IsEmpty(CurrentCycleTbl),
    CurrentCycleStart = if HasCurrentCycle then CurrentCycleTbl{0}[7_Day_Start] else null,
    CurrentCycleEnd = if HasCurrentCycle then CurrentCycleTbl{0}[7_Day_End] else null,
    CurrentCycle28DayStart = if HasCurrentCycle then CurrentCycleTbl{0}[28_Day_Start] else null,
    CurrentCycle28DayEnd = if HasCurrentCycle then CurrentCycleTbl{0}[28_Day_End] else null,
    CurrentCycleName = if HasCurrentCycle then CurrentCycleTbl{0}[Report_Name] else null,

    // ===========================================
    // PERIOD CALCULATION (Based on Incident_Date vs Cycle Boundaries)
    // ===========================================
    // CRITICAL: Period must be based on Incident_Date, NOT Report_Date
    // This ensures charts show when crimes OCCURRED, not when they were reported
    // Backfill cases (incident before cycle, reported during cycle) should NOT appear in 7-Day charts
    Period_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        IncidentToReportDays_Added,
        "Period",
        each
            let 
                dI = [Incident_Date_Date],
                // Get 28-Day cycle boundaries from calendar (if available)
                Cycle28DayStart = if HasCurrentCycle then CurrentCycleTbl{0}[28_Day_Start] else null,
                Cycle28DayEnd = if HasCurrentCycle then CurrentCycleTbl{0}[28_Day_End] else null
            in
                if dI = null then "Historical"
                // 7-Day period: Incident_Date falls within current 7-day cycle boundaries
                else if HasCurrentCycle and dI >= CurrentCycleStart and dI <= CurrentCycleEnd then "7-Day"
                // 28-Day period: Incident_Date falls within current 28-day cycle boundaries
                else if HasCurrentCycle and Cycle28DayStart <> null and Cycle28DayEnd <> null and dI >= Cycle28DayStart and dI <= Cycle28DayEnd then "28-Day"
                // YTD: incident occurred in current year (based on Incident Date)
                else if Date.Year(dI) = Date.Year(Today) then "YTD"
                else "Historical",
        type text
    ),

    Period_SortKey_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Period_Added,
        "Period_SortKey",
        each if [Period] = "7-Day" then 1 else if [Period] = "28-Day" then 2 else if [Period] = "YTD" then 3 else if [Period] = "Historical" then 4 else 99,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    CycleName_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Period_SortKey_Added,
        "cycle_name",
        each
            let d = [Incident_Date_Date]
            in
                if d = null then "Unknown"
                else
                    let m = Table.SelectRows(CycleCalendar_Staged, each d >= [7_Day_Start] and d <= [7_Day_End])
                    in if Table.IsEmpty(m) then "Historical" else m{0}[Report_Name],
        type text
    ),

    Backfill_Flag_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        CycleName_Added,
        "Backfill_7Day",
        each
            let dI = [Incident_Date_Date], dR = [Report_Date]
            in
                HasCurrentCycle and dI <> null and dR <> null and dI < CurrentCycleStart and dR >= CurrentCycleStart and dR <= CurrentCycleEnd,
        type logical
    ),

    Cycle_Name_Adjusted = Table.AddColumn(
        Backfill_Flag_Added,
        "cycle_name_adjusted",
        each if [Backfill_7Day] then CoalesceText(CurrentCycleName, [cycle_name]) else [cycle_name],
        type text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // IS CURRENT 7-DAY CYCLE (for dynamic filtering)
    // ===========================================
    IsCurrent7DayCycle_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Cycle_Name_Adjusted,
        "IsCurrent7DayCycle",
        each
            let dR = [Report_Date]
            in
                if HasCurrentCycle and dR <> null then
                    dR >= CurrentCycleStart and dR <= CurrentCycleEnd
                else false,
        type logical
    ),

    IsLagDay_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        IsCurrent7DayCycle_Added,
        "IsLagDay",
        each
            let dI = [Incident_Date_Date], dR = [Report_Date]
            in
                if dI = null or dR = null then false
                else
                    let
                        ReportCycle = Table.SelectRows(CycleCalendar_Staged, each dR >= [7_Day_Start] and dR <= [7_Day_End]),
                        CycleStartForReport = if Table.IsEmpty(ReportCycle) then null else ReportCycle{0}[7_Day_Start]
                    in
                        CycleStartForReport <> null and dI < CycleStartForReport,
        type logical
    ),

    LagDays_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        IsLagDay_Added,
        "LagDays",
        each
            let dI = [Incident_Date_Date], dR = [Report_Date]
            in
                if dI = null or dR = null then null
                else if not [IsLagDay] then 0
                else
                    let
                        ReportCycle = Table.SelectRows(CycleCalendar_Staged, each dR >= [7_Day_Start] and dR <= [7_Day_End]),
                        CycleStartForReport = if Table.IsEmpty(ReportCycle) then null else ReportCycle{0}[7_Day_Start]
                    in
                        if CycleStartForReport <> null then Duration.Days(CycleStartForReport - dI) else 0,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // TIME OF DAY
    // ===========================================
    StartOfHour_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        LagDays_Added,
        "StartOfHour",
        each
            let bt = [BestTimeValue]
            in if bt <> null then Time.ToText(#time(Time.Hour(bt), 0, 0), "hh:mm:ss") else "00:00:00",
        type text
    ),

    TimeOfDay_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        StartOfHour_Added,
        "TimeOfDay",
        each
            let bt = [BestTimeValue], hr = if bt = null then null else Time.Hour(bt)
            in
                if hr = null then "Unknown Time"
                else if hr >= 4 and hr < 8 then "Early Morning (04:00–07:59)"
                else if hr >= 8 and hr < 12 then "Morning (08:00–11:59)"
                else if hr >= 12 and hr < 16 then "Afternoon (12:00–15:59)"
                else if hr >= 16 and hr < 20 then "Evening Peak (16:00–19:59)"
                else if hr >= 20 and hr < 24 then "Night (20:00–23:59)"
                else "Late Night (00:00–03:59)",
        type text
    ),

    TimeOfDay_SortKey_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeOfDay_Added,
        "TimeOfDay_SortKey",
        each
            let t = [TimeOfDay]
            in
                if t = "Late Night (00:00–03:59)" then 1
                else if t = "Early Morning (04:00–07:59)" then 2
                else if t = "Morning (08:00–11:59)" then 3
                else if t = "Afternoon (12:00–15:59)" then 4
                else if t = "Evening Peak (16:00–19:59)" then 5
                else if t = "Night (20:00–23:59)" then 6
                else if t = "Unknown Time" then 99
                else 0,
        Int64.Type
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // INCIDENT CONSOLIDATION & CATEGORY
    // ===========================================
    AllIncidents_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        TimeOfDay_SortKey_Added,
        "ALL_INCIDENTS",
        each
            let
                i1 = try [Incident Type_1] otherwise null,
                i2 = try [Incident Type_2] otherwise null,
                i3 = try [Incident Type_3] otherwise null
            in
                (if i1 = null then "" else i1)
                    & (if i2 = null or i2 = "" then "" else ", " & i2)
                    & (if i3 = null or i3 = "" then "" else ", " & i3),
        type text
    ),

    CrimeCategory_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        AllIncidents_Added,
        "Crime_Category",
        each
            let
                L = Text.Upper(CoalesceText([ALL_INCIDENTS], "")),
                N = Text.Upper(CoalesceText(try [Narrative] otherwise null, ""))
            in
                if Text.Contains(L, "MOTOR VEHICLE THEFT") and (Text.Contains(N, "THEFT OF HIS PROPERTY") or Text.Contains(N, "THEFT FROM MOTOR VEHICLE"))
                then "Burglary Auto"
                else if Text.Contains(L, "MOTOR VEHICLE THEFT") then "Motor Vehicle Theft"
                else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - AUTO"), Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - AUTO"), Text.Contains(L, "THEFT FROM MOTOR VEHICLE")}) then "Burglary Auto"
                else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - COMMERCIAL"), Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - COMMERCIAL"), Text.Contains(L, "BURGLARY - RESIDENCE"), Text.Contains(L, "ATTEMPTED BURGLARY - RESIDENCE")}) then "Burglary - Comm & Res"
                else if Text.Contains(L, "ROBBERY") then "Robbery"
                else if List.AnyTrue({Text.Contains(L, "SEXUAL"), Text.Contains(L, "RAPE")}) then "Sexual Offenses"
                else "Other",
        type text
    ),

    CleanIncidentTypes_Added = Table.TransformColumns(
        CrimeCategory_Added,
        {
            {"Incident Type_1", each if _ <> null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_, " - 2C") else _, type text},
            {"Incident Type_2", each if _ <> null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_, " - 2C") else _, type text},
            {"Incident Type_3", each if _ <> null then Text.BeforeDelimiter(_, " - 2C") else _, type text}
        }
    ),

    Incident_Type_1_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        CleanIncidentTypes_Added,
        "Incident_Type_1_Norm",
        each if [Incident Type_1] <> null then Text.Replace([Incident Type_1], "Attempted Burglary", "Burglary") else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    Incident_Type_2_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Type_1_Norm_Added,
        "Incident_Type_2_Norm",
        each if [Incident Type_2] <> null then Text.Replace([Incident Type_2], "Attempted Burglary", "Burglary") else null,
        type nullable text
    ),
    Incident_Type_3_Norm_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Incident_Type_2_Norm_Added,
        "Incident_Type_3_Norm",
        each if [Incident Type_3] <> null then Text.Replace([Incident Type_3], "Attempted Burglary", "Burglary") else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    Narrative_Cleaned = Table.TransformColumns(
        Incident_Type_3_Norm_Added,
        {
            {
                "Narrative",
                each
                    let
                        t = _,
                        step1 =
                            if t = null or t = "" then null
                            else Text.Replace(Text.Replace(Text.Replace(t, "#(cr)#(lf)", " "), "#(lf)", " "), "#(cr)", " "),
                        step2 =
                            if step1 = null then null
                            else Text.Replace(Text.Replace(Text.Replace(step1, "    ", " "), "   ", " "), "  ", " "),
                        step3 = if step2 = null then null else Text.Clean(step2),
                        step4 = if step3 = null then null else Text.Trim(step3)
                    in
                        if step4 = null or step4 = "" then null else step4,
                type text
            }
        }
    ),

    Vehicle_1_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Narrative_Cleaned,
        "Vehicle_1",
        each
            let
                regState = CoalesceText(try Text.From([#"Reg State 1"]) otherwise null, ""),
                registration = CoalesceText(try Text.From([#"Registration 1"]) otherwise null, ""),
                make = CoalesceText(try Text.From([Make1]) otherwise null, ""),
                model = CoalesceText(try Text.From([Model1]) otherwise null, ""),
                stateReg =
                    if regState <> "" and registration <> "" then regState & " - " & registration
                    else if registration <> "" then registration
                    else regState,
                makeModel =
                    if make <> "" and model <> "" then make & "/" & model
                    else if make <> "" then make
                    else model,
                result =
                    if stateReg <> "" and makeModel <> "" then stateReg & ", " & makeModel
                    else if stateReg <> "" then stateReg
                    else makeModel
            in
                if result = null or result = "" then null else Text.Upper(result),
        type nullable text
    ),

    Vehicle_2_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_1_Added,
        "Vehicle_2",
        each
            let
                regState = CoalesceText(try Text.From([#"Reg State 2"]) otherwise null, ""),
                registration = CoalesceText(try Text.From([#"Registration 2"]) otherwise null, ""),
                make = CoalesceText(try Text.From([Make2]) otherwise null, ""),
                model = CoalesceText(try Text.From([Model2]) otherwise null, ""),
                stateReg =
                    if regState <> "" and registration <> "" then regState & " - " & registration
                    else if registration <> "" then registration
                    else regState,
                makeModel =
                    if make <> "" and model <> "" then make & "/" & model
                    else if make <> "" then make
                    else model,
                result =
                    if stateReg <> "" and makeModel <> "" then stateReg & ", " & makeModel
                    else if stateReg <> "" then stateReg
                    else makeModel
            in
                if result = null or result = "" then null else Text.Upper(result),
        type nullable text
    ),

    Vehicle_Combined_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_2_Added,
        "Vehicle_1_and_Vehicle_2",
        each if [Vehicle_1] <> null and [Vehicle_2] <> null then [Vehicle_1] & " | " & [Vehicle_2] else null,
        type nullable text
    ),

    Clean_Address_Added = Table.AddColumn(
        Vehicle_Combined_Added,
        "Clean_Address",
        each
            let addr = CoalesceText(Text.Trim(CoalesceText(try Text.From([FullAddress]) otherwise null, "")), "")
            in
                if addr = "" then null
                else
                    let cleaned = Text.BeforeDelimiter(addr, ", Hackensack, NJ", {0, RelativePosition.FromStart})
                    in if cleaned <> "" then cleaned else addr,
        type nullable text
    ),

    // ===========================================
    // FAST CATEGORY/RESPONSE MAPPING VIA JOINS (from staged CallTypeCategories)
    // ===========================================
    WithIncidentKey = Table.AddColumn(
        Clean_Address_Added,
        "IncidentKey",
        each CoalesceText([ALL_INCIDENTS], try [Incident Type_1] otherwise null),
        type text
    ),

    Join_Exact_Incident = Table.NestedJoin(WithIncidentKey, {"IncidentKey"}, CallTypeCategories_Staged, {"Incident"}, "CT_Exact", JoinKind.LeftOuter),
    Join_Exact_IncidentNorm = Table.NestedJoin(Join_Exact_Incident, {"IncidentKey"}, CallTypeCategories_Staged, {"Incident_Norm"}, "CT_ExactNorm", JoinKind.LeftOuter),

    NeedFuzzyFlag = Table.AddColumn(
        Join_Exact_IncidentNorm,
        "_NeedFuzzy",
        each (try Table.IsEmpty([CT_Exact]) otherwise true) and (try Table.IsEmpty([CT_ExactNorm]) otherwise true),
        type logical
    ),

    OnlyNeedFuzzy = Table.SelectRows(NeedFuzzyFlag, each [_NeedFuzzy] = true),

    FuzzyJoined = Table.FuzzyNestedJoin(
        OnlyNeedFuzzy,
        {"IncidentKey"},
        CallTypeCategories_Staged,
        {"Incident"},
        "CT_Fuzzy",
        JoinKind.LeftOuter,
        [IgnoreCase = true, IgnoreSpace = true, Threshold = 0.8]
    ),
