Fixing table width, page breaks, and spacing issues in the HTML report:


Fixing table width, page breaks, and spacing:


```html
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
<title>SCRPA - Combined Executive Summary (Print-safe)</title>
<style>
:root {
    --primary: #0c233d;
    --text: #1a1a1a;
    --muted: #6b7280;
    --border: #e5e7eb;
    --bg: #ffffff;
    --callout: #f5f7fb;
    --danger: #b91c1c;
}

html, body {
    font-family: "DIN", "Bahnschrift", "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    line-height: 1.38;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}

@page {
    size: Letter landscape;
    margin: 0.4in;
}

.wrap {
    max-width: 8.5in;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0.6in;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

h1, h2, h3 {
    color: var(--primary);
    margin: 0 0 6px 0;
    font-weight: 800;
}

h1 {
    font-size: 22px;
}

h2 {
    font-size: 15.5px;
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--primary);
    padding-bottom: 2px;
    margin: 14px 0 8px;
}

.small {
    font-size: 12.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
}

.pill {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--bg);
    padding: 8px 12px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(12,35,61,.08);
    font-size: 12.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin: 4px 8px 4px 0;
}

.overview, .report-card {
    background: var(--bg);
    padding: 16px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(12,35,61,.06);
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    margin: 8px 0 10px;
}

.metrics {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    gap: 12px;
    margin-top: 12px;
}

.metric {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--callout), #fff);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.metric .label {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.metric .value {
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 20px;
    color: var(--primary);
}

.table-wrapper {
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: 8px;
    overflow: visible !important;
    max-width: 100%;
}

table {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 12.5px;
    margin: 0;
    table-layout: fixed;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

thead th {
    background: #f8fafc;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--primary);
    font-size: 12.25px;
    padding: 8px 10px;
    text-align: left;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

th, td {
    padding: 8px 10px;
    text-align: left;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    vertical-align: top;
    white-space: normal;
    overflow-wrap: anywhere;
    word-break: break-word;
}

td.money {
    text-align: right;
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
}

.tag {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 4px 8px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: rgba(12,35,61,.08);
    color: var(--primary);
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 12px;
}

.grid-3 {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
    gap: 10px;
}

.dist-card {
    background: #fff;
    padding: 10px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.incidents ul {
    margin: 8px 0 0 16px;
    padding: 0;
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 12.75px;
}

.incidents li {
    margin: 6px 0;
    white-space: normal;
    overflow-wrap: anywhere;
    word-break: break-word;
}

.badge-incomplete {
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--danger);
    font-weight: 600;
}

footer {
    margin-top: 12px;
    padding-top: 8px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 11.5px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
}
/* print optimizations for landscape */
@media print {
    .wrap{max-width:none;padding:0;}
    .report-card{margin-bottom:20px;page-break-inside:avoid;}
    .grid-3{gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px;}
    .dist-card{padding:8px;margin-bottom:8px;}
    .dist-card th,.dist-card td{padding:4px 3px;font-size:11px;}
    .summary{margin-bottom:12px;font-size:12px;}
    .report-header{margin-bottom:8px;}
    .report-header h2{font-size:16px;margin:0;}
    .report-header .sub{font-size:11px;}
    .tag{font-size:10px;padding:2px 6px;}
    .meta{font-size:10px;}
    .small{font-size:10px;}
    footer{margin-top:8px;font-size:9px;}
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
    .wrap {
        padding: 16px;
    }
    h1 {
        font-size: 20px;
    }
    .metric .value {
        font-size: 18px;
    }
}

@media print {
    html, body {
        background: #fff;
        color: #000;
    }
    .wrap {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 12mm;
    }
    .report-card, .overview, tr {
        page-break-inside: avoid;
    }
    table {
        -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
    }
    thead {
        display: table-header-group;
    }
    tfoot {
        display: table-footer-group;
    }
    .table-wrapper {
        overflow: visible !important;
    }
}

  /* Legacy styles below */
  :root{
    margin:0;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f4f7fb 0%, var(--bg) 100%);
    font-family: var(--font-sans);
    color:#0f172a;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
    -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
    line-height:1.38;
  }

  .wrap{
    max-width:var(--max-w);
    margin:28px auto;
    padding:28px;
    box-sizing:border-box;
    background:transparent;
  }

  header.top {
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:18px;
    margin-bottom:18px;
  }

  .logo{
    width:74px;
    height:74px;
    border-radius:12px;
    background:#0c233d;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    color:white;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:22px;
    box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(12,35,61,0.12);
    flex-shrink:0;
  }

  .title-block h1{
    margin:0;
    font-size:20px;
    letter-spacing:0.2px;
  }
  .title-block p{
    margin:4px 0 0 0;
    color:var(--muted);
    font-size:13px;
  }

  .meta {
    margin-top:14px;
    display:flex;
    gap:12px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .pill{
    background:var(--card);
    padding:8px 12px;
    border-radius:999px;
    box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(15,23,42,0.04);
    font-size:13px;
    color:var(--muted);
  }

  main{
    margin-top:18px;
    display:grid;
    gap:18px;
  }

  .overview {
    background:var(--card);
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    padding:18px;
    box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(15,23,42,0.04);
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    break-inside: avoid;
  }

  .metrics {
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));
    gap:12px;
    margin-top:12px;
  }

  .metric {
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--metric-bg),#ffffff);
    border-radius:10px;
    padding:12px;
    box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  }
  .metric .label{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px;}
  .metric .value{font-weight:700;font-size:20px;color:#0f172a;}

  section.report {
    display:grid;
    gap:12px;
  }

  .report-card{
    background:var(--card);
    padding:16px;
    border-radius:10px;
    box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(12,20,40,0.04);
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    break-inside: avoid;
  }

  .report-header{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
    gap:12px;
    margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  .report-header h2{margin:0;font-size:16px;}
  .report-header .sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;}

  .summary { color:var(--muted); font-size:14px; margin-bottom:8px; }

  /* tables and wrappers */
  .table-wrapper{
    width:100%;
    overflow:auto;            /* horizontal scroll on narrow screens */
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
    margin-top:8px;
  }

  table{
    width:100%;
    max-width:100%;
    border-collapse:collapse;
    font-size:14px;
    margin:0;
    table-layout:auto;        /* allow flexible column widths */
    min-width:480px;         /* prevent extreme squishing on tiny screens */
    box-sizing:border-box;
  }
  .table-wrapper{
    width:100%;
    max-width:100%;
    overflow-x:visible;
    box-sizing:border-box;
  }
  thead th{
    background:linear-gradient(90deg, #fafcff, #ffffff);
    font-weight:700;
    color:#111827;
    top:0;
    z-index:2;
  }
  th,td{
    padding:8px 10px;
    text-align:left;
    border-bottom:1px solid #eef1f6;
    vertical-align:top;
    white-space:normal;               /* allow wrapping */
    overflow-wrap:anywhere;           /* break long strings */
    word-break:break-word;
    hyphens:auto;
  }
  .small{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);}
  .muted{color:var(--muted)}
  .tag{display:inline-block;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(11,92,255,0.08);color:var(--accent);font-weight:600;font-size:12px}

  /* prevent rows/cards splitting awkwardly when printing */
  tr, .report-card, .overview {
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    break-inside: avoid;
  }

  /* distributions (compact) */
  .grid-3 {
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:10px;
  }
  .dist-card{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff,#fbfdff);padding:10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #f1f6ff}

  /* incident list - allow long entries to wrap */
  .incidents ul{margin:8px 0 0 16px;padding:0;color:#0f172a}
  .incidents li{margin:6px 0; white-space:normal; overflow-wrap:anywhere; word-break:break-word; hyphens:auto;}

  footer{
    margin-top:14px;
    font-size:12px;
    color:var(--muted);
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    gap:12px;
    align-items:center;
  }

  /* keep header from overlapping content on print */
  thead th.sticky {
    position:sticky;
  }

  /* responsive tweaks */
  @media (max-width:640px){
    .title-block h1{font-size:17px}
    .metric .value{font-size:18px}
    .wrap{padding:16px}
    table{min-width:520px}
  }

  /* Print-focused rules */
  @media print {
    html,body{background: #fff; color:#000;}
    .wrap{max-width:100%; margin:0; padding:12mm;}
    header.top{position:static; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px;}
    .logo{display:none}               /* remove decorative logo for print */
    .report-card, .overview { page-break-inside: avoid; break-inside: avoid; }
    table { page-break-inside: auto; -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; }
    thead { display: table-header-group; }  /* repeat headers on each printed page */
    tfoot { display: table-footer-group; }
    thead th.sticky { position:static; }    /* disable sticky in print */
    .table-wrapper{ overflow:visible !important; } /* allow normal flow for printing */
    .metric .value{color:#000}
    footer{position:relative; bottom:0}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="wrap" role="main" aria-labelledby="reportTitle">
    <header class="top" role="banner">
      <div class="logo" aria-hidden="true">SCRPA</div>
      <div class="title-block">
        <h1 id="reportTitle">SCRPA Combined Executive Summary</h1>
        <p class="small">Generated: <strong>2025-12-30 00:34:15</strong> - Report Periods: <strong>7-Day, 28-Day, Year-to-Date</strong></p>
        <div class="meta">
          <div class="pill">Cycle: 25C13W52</div>
          <div class="pill">Range: 12/23/2025 - 12/29/2025</div>
          <div class="pill">Prepared by: P.O. R. A. Carucci</div>
          <div class="pill">Submitted to: Captain Smith</div>
          <div class="pill">Version: v1.1</div>
        </div>
        <div class="meta">
          <div class="pill">Auto-Detection: SCRPA Statistical Export System</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </header>

    <main>
      <!-- Executive overview -->
      <section class="overview" aria-labelledby="overviewHeading">
        <h2 id="overviewHeading" style="margin:0 0 6px 0;">Executive Overview</h2>
        <p class="summary">This combined report provides a concise, cross-period view of crime statistics to support operational decisions and resource allocation. It highlights short-term trends (7-day), monthly perspective (28-day), and longer-term strategic patterns (YTD).</p>

        <div class="metrics" aria-hidden="false">
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">Primary Focus (YTD)</div>
            <div class="value">Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2 - 58 (25.1%)</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">YTD Total Incidents</div>
            <div class="value">231</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">28-Day Incidents</div>
            <div class="value">21</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">7-Day Incidents</div>
            <div class="value">2</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">YTD Clearance Rate</div>
            <div class="value">67.5%</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Report sections -->
      <section class="report" aria-labelledby="r7">
        <div class="report-card" id="r7" role="region" aria-label="7-Day Executive Summary">
          <div class="report-header">
            <div>
              <h2>7-Day Executive Summary</h2>
              <div class="sub small">Period snapshot and key metrics (most recent 7 days)</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tag">Short-term</div>
            
            
          </div>

          <p class="summary"><strong>2 incidents</strong> across <strong>2 zones</strong>. Primary incident: <strong>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3 - 2 occurrences (100.0%)</strong>. Clearance rate: <strong>0.0%</strong>.</p>

          <div class="grid-3" aria-hidden="false">
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Incident Type Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Item</th><th class="small">Count</th><th class="small">%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3</td><td>2</td><td>100.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Zone Activity</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Zone</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>8</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>7</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Hourly Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Hour</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody><tr><td>21</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr><tr><td>23</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
          </div>

          <div style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Day of Week</strong>
            <div class="table-wrapper">
              <table>
                <thead><tr><th>Day</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody>
                  <tr><td>Monday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Tuesday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Wednesday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Thursday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Friday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Saturday</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Sunday</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="incidents" style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Recent Significant Incidents</strong>
            <ul>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="report-card" id="r28" role="region" aria-label="28-Day Executive Summary">
          <div class="report-header">
            <div>
              <h2>28-Day Executive Summary</h2>
              <div class="sub small">Monthly perspective for operational planning</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tag">28-Day</div>
            
            
          </div>

          <p class="summary"><strong>21 incidents</strong> across <strong>6 zones</strong>. Primary incident: <strong>Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2 - 5 occurrences (23.8%)</strong>. Clearance rate: <strong>23.8%</strong>.</p>

          <div class="grid-3" aria-hidden="false">
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Incident Type Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Item</th><th class="small">Count</th><th class="small">%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2</td><td>5</td><td>23.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2</td><td>5</td><td>23.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Robbery - 2C:15-1</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Simple Assault - 2C:12-1a</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Welfare Check</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Criminal Sexual Contact - 2C:14-3a</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Zone Activity</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Zone</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>8</td><td>7</td><td>33.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>9</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>7</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>5</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>6</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Hourly Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Hour</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody><tr><td>1</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>3</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>9</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>10</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>14</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>15</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>18</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr><tr><td>19</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>20</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>21</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>22</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>23</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
          </div>

          <div style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Day of Week</strong>
            <div class="table-wrapper">
              <table>
                <thead><tr><th>Day</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody>
                  <tr><td>Monday</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Tuesday</td><td>6</td><td>28.6%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Wednesday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Thursday</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Friday</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Saturday</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Sunday</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="incidents" style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Recent Significant Incidents</strong>
            <ul>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="report-card" id="rytd" role="region" aria-label="YTD Executive Summary">
          <div class="report-header">
            <div>
              <h2>YTD Executive Summary</h2>
              <div class="sub small">Strategic view for allocation and trend analysis</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tag">YTD</div>
            
            
          </div>

          <p class="summary"><strong>231 incidents</strong> across <strong>6 zones</strong>. Primary incident: <strong>Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2 - 58 occurrences (25.1%)</strong>. Clearance rate: <strong>67.5%</strong>.</p>

          <div class="grid-3" aria-hidden="false">
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Incident Type Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Item</th><th class="small">Count</th><th class="small">%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2</td><td>58</td><td>25.1%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3</td><td>53</td><td>22.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2</td><td>43</td><td>18.6%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Robbery - 2C:15-1</td><td>21</td><td>9.1%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>16</td><td>6.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Sexual Assault - 2C:14-2b</td><td>14</td><td>6.1%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Criminal Sexual Contact - 2C:14-3a</td><td>10</td><td>4.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Exceptionally Cleared/Closed</td><td>3</td><td>1.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Suspicious Incident</td><td>2</td><td>0.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Simple Assault - 2C:12-1a</td><td>2</td><td>0.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Dispute</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Mental Health Incident</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Warrant Arrest</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Recovered Stolen Vehicle</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Fraud</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Welfare Check</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Zone Activity</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Zone</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>8</td><td>61</td><td>26.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>7</td><td>49</td><td>21.2%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>9</td><td>42</td><td>18.2%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>5</td><td>34</td><td>14.7%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>6</td><td>24</td><td>10.4%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Hourly Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Hour</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody><tr><td>0</td><td>6</td><td>2.6%</td></tr><tr><td>1</td><td>10</td><td>4.3%</td></tr><tr><td>2</td><td>7</td><td>3.0%</td></tr><tr><td>3</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>4</td><td>6</td><td>2.6%</td></tr><tr><td>5</td><td>3</td><td>1.3%</td></tr><tr><td>6</td><td>10</td><td>4.3%</td></tr><tr><td>7</td><td>3</td><td>1.3%</td></tr><tr><td>8</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>9</td><td>8</td><td>3.5%</td></tr><tr><td>10</td><td>8</td><td>3.5%</td></tr><tr><td>11</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>12</td><td>18</td><td>7.8%</td></tr><tr><td>13</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>14</td><td>14</td><td>6.1%</td></tr><tr><td>15</td><td>11</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>16</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>17</td><td>5</td><td>2.2%</td></tr><tr><td>18</td><td>15</td><td>6.5%</td></tr><tr><td>19</td><td>12</td><td>5.2%</td></tr><tr><td>20</td><td>12</td><td>5.2%</td></tr><tr><td>21</td><td>8</td><td>3.5%</td></tr><tr><td>22</td><td>14</td><td>6.1%</td></tr><tr><td>23</td><td>16</td><td>6.9%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
          </div>

          <div style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Day of Week</strong>
            <div class="table-wrapper">
              <table>
                <thead><tr><th>Day</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody>
                  <tr><td>Monday</td><td>42</td><td>18.2%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Tuesday</td><td>42</td><td>18.2%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Wednesday</td><td>25</td><td>10.8%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Thursday</td><td>34</td><td>14.7%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Friday</td><td>26</td><td>11.3%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Saturday</td><td>23</td><td>10.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Sunday</td><td>39</td><td>16.9%</td></tr>
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="incidents" style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Recent Significant Incidents</strong>
            <ul>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Combined analysis notes -->
      <section class="report-card" role="region" aria-label="Combined Analysis Notes">
        <h2 style="margin:0 0 6px 0;">Combined Analysis Notes</h2>
        <div style="margin:8px 0 0 0;color:var(--muted);">
          <p><strong>Key Insights Across All Periods:</strong></p>
          <ul style="margin:8px 0 0 18px;">
            <li><strong>7-Day Analysis:</strong> 2 incidents recorded in the most recent week with Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3 being the most frequent. This provides immediate trend identification for tactical adjustments.</li>
            <li><strong>28-Day Analysis:</strong> 21 incidents over the past month across 6 zones. This monthly perspective supports operational planning and patrol allocation.</li>
            <li><strong>Year-to-Date:</strong> 231 total incidents with a 67.5% clearance rate. This enables strategic assessment for longer-term resourcing and investigative focus areas.</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </section>

    </main>

    <footer>
      <div>Hackensack Police Department - Safe Streets Operations Control Center | Cycle: 25C13W52</div>
      <div>Page 1 of 1</div>
    </footer>
  </div>
</body>
</html>
```

```html
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
<title>SCRPA - Combined Executive Summary (Print-safe)</title>
<style>
:root {
    --primary: #0c233d;
    --text: #1a1a1a;
    --muted: #6b7280;
    --border: #e5e7eb;
    --bg: #ffffff;
    --callout: #f5f7fb;
    --danger: #b91c1c;
}

html, body {
    font-family: "DIN", "Bahnschrift", "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    line-height: 1.38;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}

@page {
    size: Letter landscape;
    margin: 0.4in;
}

.wrap {
    max-width: 8.5in;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0.6in;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

h1, h2, h3 {
    color: var(--primary);
    margin: 0 0 6px 0;
    font-weight: 800;
}

h1 {
    font-size: 22px;
}

h2 {
    font-size: 15.5px;
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--primary);
    padding-bottom: 2px;
    margin: 14px 0 8px;
}

.small {
    font-size: 12.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
}

.pill {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--bg);
    padding: 8px 12px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(12,35,61,.08);
    font-size: 12.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin: 4px 8px 4px 0;
}

.overview, .report-card {
    background: var(--bg);
    padding: 16px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(12,35,61,.06);
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    margin: 8px 0 10px;
}

.metrics {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    gap: 12px;
    margin-top: 12px;
}

.metric {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--callout), #fff);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.metric .label {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.metric .value {
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 20px;
    color: var(--primary);
}

.table-wrapper {
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: 8px;
    overflow: visible !important;
    max-width: 100%;
}

table {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 12.5px;
    margin: 0;
    table-layout: fixed;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

thead th {
    background: #f8fafc;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--primary);
    font-size: 12.25px;
    padding: 8px 10px;
    text-align: left;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

th, td {
    padding: 6px 8px;
    text-align: left;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    vertical-align: top;
    white-space: normal;
    overflow-wrap: break-word;
    word-break: break-word;
    font-size: 11.5px;
}

td.money {
    text-align: right;
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
}

.tag {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 4px 8px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: rgba(12,35,61,.08);
    color: var(--primary);
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 12px;
}

.grid-3 {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
    gap: 10px;
}

.dist-card {
    background: #fff;
    padding: 10px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.incidents ul {
    margin: 8px 0 0 16px;
    padding: 0;
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 12.75px;
}

.incidents li {
    margin: 6px 0;
    white-space: normal;
    overflow-wrap: anywhere;
    word-break: break-word;
}

.badge-incomplete {
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--danger);
    font-weight: 600;
}

footer {
    margin-top: 12px;
    padding-top: 8px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 11.5px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
}
/* print optimizations for landscape */
@media print {
    .wrap{max-width:none;padding:0;}
    .report-card{margin-bottom:20px;page-break-inside:avoid;}
    .grid-3{gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px;}
    .dist-card{padding:8px;margin-bottom:8px;}
    .dist-card th,.dist-card td{padding:4px 3px;font-size:11px;}
    .summary{margin-bottom:12px;font-size:12px;}
    .report-header{margin-bottom:8px;}
    .report-header h2{font-size:16px;margin:0;}
    .report-header .sub{font-size:11px;}
    .tag{font-size:10px;padding:2px 6px;}
    .meta{font-size:10px;}
    .small{font-size:10px;}
    footer{margin-top:8px;font-size:9px;}
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
    .wrap {
        padding: 16px;
    }
    h1 {
        font-size: 20px;
    }
    .metric .value {
        font-size: 18px;
    }
}

@media print {
    html, body {
        background: #fff;
        color: #000;
    }
    .wrap {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 12mm;
    }
    .report-card, .overview, tr {
        page-break-inside: avoid;
    }
    table {
        -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
    }
    thead {
        display: table-header-group;
    }
    tfoot {
        display: table-footer-group;
    }
    .table-wrapper {
        overflow: visible !important;
    }
}

  /* Legacy styles below */
  :root{
    margin:0;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f4f7fb 0%, var(--bg) 100%);
    font-family: var(--font-sans);
    color:#0f172a;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
    -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
    line-height:1.38;
  }

  .wrap{
    max-width:var(--max-w);
    margin:28px auto;
    padding:28px;
    box-sizing:border-box;
    background:transparent;
  }

  header.top {
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:18px;
    margin-bottom:18px;
  }

  .logo{
    width:74px;
    height:74px;
    border-radius:12px;
    background:#0c233d;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    color:white;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:22px;
    box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(12,35,61,0.12);
    flex-shrink:0;
  }

  .title-block h1{
    margin:0;
    font-size:20px;
    letter-spacing:0.2px;
  }
  .title-block p{
    margin:4px 0 0 0;
    color:var(--muted);
    font-size:13px;
  }

  .meta {
    margin-top:14px;
    display:flex;
    gap:12px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .pill{
    background:var(--card);
    padding:8px 12px;
    border-radius:999px;
    box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(15,23,42,0.04);
    font-size:13px;
    color:var(--muted);
  }

  main{
    margin-top:18px;
    display:grid;
    gap:18px;
  }

  .overview {
    background:var(--card);
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    padding:18px;
    box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(15,23,42,0.04);
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    break-inside: avoid;
  }

  .metrics {
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));
    gap:12px;
    margin-top:12px;
  }

  .metric {
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--metric-bg),#ffffff);
    border-radius:10px;
    padding:12px;
    box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  }
  .metric .label{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px;}
  .metric .value{font-weight:700;font-size:20px;color:#0f172a;}

  section.report {
    display:grid;
    gap:12px;
  }

  .report-card{
    background:var(--card);
    padding:16px;
    border-radius:10px;
    box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(12,20,40,0.04);
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    break-inside: avoid;
  }

  .report-header{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
    gap:12px;
    margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  .report-header h2{margin:0;font-size:16px;}
  .report-header .sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;}

  .summary { color:var(--muted); font-size:14px; margin-bottom:8px; }

  /* tables and wrappers */
  .table-wrapper{
    width:100%;
    overflow:auto;            /* horizontal scroll on narrow screens */
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
    margin-top:8px;
  }

  table{
    width:100%;
    max-width:100%;
    border-collapse:collapse;
    font-size:14px;
    margin:0;
    table-layout:auto;        /* allow flexible column widths */
    min-width:480px;         /* prevent extreme squishing on tiny screens */
    box-sizing:border-box;
  }
  .table-wrapper{
    width:100%;
    max-width:100%;
    overflow-x:visible;
    box-sizing:border-box;
  }
  thead th{
    background:linear-gradient(90deg, #fafcff, #ffffff);
    font-weight:700;
    color:#111827;
    top:0;
    z-index:2;
  }
  th,td{
    padding:8px 10px;
    text-align:left;
    border-bottom:1px solid #eef1f6;
    vertical-align:top;
    white-space:normal;               /* allow wrapping */
    overflow-wrap:anywhere;           /* break long strings */
    word-break:break-word;
    hyphens:auto;
  }
  .small{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);}
  .muted{color:var(--muted)}
  .tag{display:inline-block;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(11,92,255,0.08);color:var(--accent);font-weight:600;font-size:12px}

  /* prevent rows/cards splitting awkwardly when printing */
  tr, .report-card, .overview {
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    break-inside: avoid;
  }

  /* distributions (compact) */
  .grid-3 {
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:10px;
  }
  .dist-card{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff,#fbfdff);padding:10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #f1f6ff}

  /* incident list - allow long entries to wrap */
  .incidents ul{margin:8px 0 0 16px;padding:0;color:#0f172a}
  .incidents li{margin:6px 0; white-space:normal; overflow-wrap:anywhere; word-break:break-word; hyphens:auto;}

  footer{
    margin-top:14px;
    font-size:12px;
    color:var(--muted);
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    gap:12px;
    align-items:center;
  }

  /* keep header from overlapping content on print */
  thead th.sticky {
    position:sticky;
  }

  /* responsive tweaks */
  @media (max-width:640px){
    .title-block h1{font-size:17px}
    .metric .value{font-size:18px}
    .wrap{padding:16px}
    table{min-width:520px}
  }

  /* Print-focused rules */
  @media print {
    html,body{background: #fff; color:#000;}
    .wrap{max-width:100%; margin:0; padding:12mm;}
    header.top{position:static; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px;}
    .logo{display:none}               /* remove decorative logo for print */
    .report-card, .overview { page-break-inside: avoid; break-inside: avoid; }
    table { page-break-inside: auto; -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; }
    thead { display: table-header-group; }  /* repeat headers on each printed page */
    tfoot { display: table-footer-group; }
    thead th.sticky { position:static; }    /* disable sticky in print */
    .table-wrapper{ overflow:visible !important; } /* allow normal flow for printing */
    .metric .value{color:#000}
    footer{position:relative; bottom:0}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="wrap" role="main" aria-labelledby="reportTitle">
    <header class="top" role="banner">
      <div class="logo" aria-hidden="true">SCRPA</div>
      <div class="title-block">
        <h1 id="reportTitle">SCRPA Combined Executive Summary</h1>
        <p class="small">Generated: <strong>2025-12-30 00:34:15</strong> - Report Periods: <strong>7-Day, 28-Day, Year-to-Date</strong></p>
        <div class="meta">
          <div class="pill">Cycle: 25C13W52</div>
          <div class="pill">Range: 12/23/2025 - 12/29/2025</div>
          <div class="pill">Prepared by: P.O. R. A. Carucci</div>
          <div class="pill">Submitted to: Captain Smith</div>
          <div class="pill">Version: v1.1</div>
        </div>
        <div class="meta">
          <div class="pill">Auto-Detection: SCRPA Statistical Export System</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </header>

    <main>
      <!-- Executive overview -->
      <section class="overview" aria-labelledby="overviewHeading">
        <h2 id="overviewHeading" style="margin:0 0 6px 0;">Executive Overview</h2>
        <p class="summary">This combined report provides a concise, cross-period view of crime statistics to support operational decisions and resource allocation. It highlights short-term trends (7-day), monthly perspective (28-day), and longer-term strategic patterns (YTD).</p>

        <div class="metrics" aria-hidden="false">
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">Primary Focus (YTD)</div>
            <div class="value">Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2 - 58 (25.1%)</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">YTD Total Incidents</div>
            <div class="value">231</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">28-Day Incidents</div>
            <div class="value">21</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">7-Day Incidents</div>
            <div class="value">2</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">YTD Clearance Rate</div>
            <div class="value">67.5%</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Report sections -->
      <section class="report" aria-labelledby="r7">
        <div class="report-card" id="r7" role="region" aria-label="7-Day Executive Summary">
          <div class="report-header">
            <div>
              <h2>7-Day Executive Summary</h2>
              <div class="sub small">Period snapshot and key metrics (most recent 7 days)</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tag">Short-term</div>
            
            
          </div>

          <p class="summary"><strong>2 incidents</strong> across <strong>2 zones</strong>. Primary incident: <strong>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3 - 2 occurrences (100.0%)</strong>. Clearance rate: <strong>0.0%</strong>.</p>

          <div class="grid-3" aria-hidden="false">
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Incident Type Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Item</th><th class="small">Count</th><th class="small">%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3</td><td>2</td><td>100.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Zone Activity</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Zone</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>8</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>7</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Hourly Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Hour</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody><tr><td>21</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr><tr><td>23</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
          </div>

          <div style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Day of Week</strong>
            <div class="table-wrapper">
              <table>
                <thead><tr><th>Day</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody>
                  <tr><td>Monday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Tuesday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Wednesday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Thursday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Friday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Saturday</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Sunday</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="incidents" style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Recent Significant Incidents</strong>
            <ul>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="report-card" id="r28" role="region" aria-label="28-Day Executive Summary">
          <div class="report-header">
            <div>
              <h2>28-Day Executive Summary</h2>
              <div class="sub small">Monthly perspective for operational planning</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tag">28-Day</div>
            
            
          </div>

          <p class="summary"><strong>21 incidents</strong> across <strong>6 zones</strong>. Primary incident: <strong>Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2 - 5 occurrences (23.8%)</strong>. Clearance rate: <strong>23.8%</strong>.</p>

          <div class="grid-3" aria-hidden="false">
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Incident Type Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Item</th><th class="small">Count</th><th class="small">%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2</td><td>5</td><td>23.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2</td><td>5</td><td>23.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Robbery - 2C:15-1</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Simple Assault - 2C:12-1a</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Welfare Check</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Criminal Sexual Contact - 2C:14-3a</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Zone Activity</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Zone</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>8</td><td>7</td><td>33.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>9</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>7</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>5</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>6</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Hourly Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Hour</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody><tr><td>1</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>3</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>9</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>10</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>14</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>15</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>18</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr><tr><td>19</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>20</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>21</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>22</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>23</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
          </div>

          <div style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Day of Week</strong>
            <div class="table-wrapper">
              <table>
                <thead><tr><th>Day</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody>
                  <tr><td>Monday</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Tuesday</td><td>6</td><td>28.6%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Wednesday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Thursday</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Friday</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Saturday</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Sunday</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="incidents" style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Recent Significant Incidents</strong>
            <ul>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="report-card" id="rytd" role="region" aria-label="YTD Executive Summary">
          <div class="report-header">
            <div>
              <h2>YTD Executive Summary</h2>
              <div class="sub small">Strategic view for allocation and trend analysis</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tag">YTD</div>
            
            
          </div>

          <p class="summary"><strong>231 incidents</strong> across <strong>6 zones</strong>. Primary incident: <strong>Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2 - 58 occurrences (25.1%)</strong>. Clearance rate: <strong>67.5%</strong>.</p>

          <div class="grid-3" aria-hidden="false">
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Incident Type Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Item</th><th class="small">Count</th><th class="small">%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2</td><td>58</td><td>25.1%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3</td><td>53</td><td>22.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2</td><td>43</td><td>18.6%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Robbery - 2C:15-1</td><td>21</td><td>9.1%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>16</td><td>6.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Sexual Assault - 2C:14-2b</td><td>14</td><td>6.1%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Criminal Sexual Contact - 2C:14-3a</td><td>10</td><td>4.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Exceptionally Cleared/Closed</td><td>3</td><td>1.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Suspicious Incident</td><td>2</td><td>0.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Simple Assault - 2C:12-1a</td><td>2</td><td>0.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Dispute</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Mental Health Incident</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Warrant Arrest</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Recovered Stolen Vehicle</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Fraud</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Welfare Check</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Zone Activity</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Zone</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>8</td><td>61</td><td>26.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>7</td><td>49</td><td>21.2%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>9</td><td>42</td><td>18.2%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>5</td><td>34</td><td>14.7%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>6</td><td>24</td><td>10.4%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Hourly Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Hour</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody><tr><td>0</td><td>6</td><td>2.6%</td></tr><tr><td>1</td><td>10</td><td>4.3%</td></tr><tr><td>2</td><td>7</td><td>3.0%</td></tr><tr><td>3</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>4</td><td>6</td><td>2.6%</td></tr><tr><td>5</td><td>3</td><td>1.3%</td></tr><tr><td>6</td><td>10</td><td>4.3%</td></tr><tr><td>7</td><td>3</td><td>1.3%</td></tr><tr><td>8</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>9</td><td>8</td><td>3.5%</td></tr><tr><td>10</td><td>8</td><td>3.5%</td></tr><tr><td>11</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>12</td><td>18</td><td>7.8%</td></tr><tr><td>13</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>14</td><td>14</td><td>6.1%</td></tr><tr><td>15</td><td>11</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>16</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>17</td><td>5</td><td>2.2%</td></tr><tr><td>18</td><td>15</td><td>6.5%</td></tr><tr><td>19</td><td>12</td><td>5.2%</td></tr><tr><td>20</td><td>12</td><td>5.2%</td></tr><tr><td>21</td><td>8</td><td>3.5%</td></tr><tr><td>22</td><td>14</td><td>6.1%</td></tr><tr><td>23</td><td>16</td><td>6.9%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
          </div>

          <div style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Day of Week</strong>
            <div class="table-wrapper">
              <table>
                <thead><tr><th>Day</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody>
                  <tr><td>Monday</td><td>42</td><td>18.2%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Tuesday</td><td>42</td><td>18.2%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Wednesday</td><td>25</td><td>10.8%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Thursday</td><td>34</td><td>14.7%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Friday</td><td>26</td><td>11.3%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Saturday</td><td>23</td><td>10.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Sunday</td><td>39</td><td>16.9%</td></tr>
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="incidents" style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Recent Significant Incidents</strong>
            <ul>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Combined analysis notes -->
      <section class="report-card" role="region" aria-label="Combined Analysis Notes">
        <h2 style="margin:0 0 6px 0;">Combined Analysis Notes</h2>
        <div style="margin:8px 0 0 0;color:var(--muted);">
          <p><strong>Key Insights Across All Periods:</strong></p>
          <ul style="margin:8px 0 0 18px;">
            <li><strong>7-Day Analysis:</strong> 2 incidents recorded in the most recent week with Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3 being the most frequent. This provides immediate trend identification for tactical adjustments.</li>
            <li><strong>28-Day Analysis:</strong> 21 incidents over the past month across 6 zones. This monthly perspective supports operational planning and patrol allocation.</li>
            <li><strong>Year-to-Date:</strong> 231 total incidents with a 67.5% clearance rate. This enables strategic assessment for longer-term resourcing and investigative focus areas.</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </section>

    </main>

    <footer>
      <div>Hackensack Police Department - Safe Streets Operations Control Center | Cycle: 25C13W52</div>
      <div>Page 1 of 1</div>
    </footer>
  </div>
</body>
</html>
```

```html
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
<title>SCRPA - Combined Executive Summary (Print-safe)</title>
<style>
:root {
    --primary: #0c233d;
    --text: #1a1a1a;
    --muted: #6b7280;
    --border: #e5e7eb;
    --bg: #ffffff;
    --callout: #f5f7fb;
    --danger: #b91c1c;
}

html, body {
    font-family: "DIN", "Bahnschrift", "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    line-height: 1.38;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}

@page {
    size: Letter landscape;
    margin: 0.4in;
}

.wrap {
    max-width: 8.5in;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0.6in;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

h1, h2, h3 {
    color: var(--primary);
    margin: 0 0 6px 0;
    font-weight: 800;
}

h1 {
    font-size: 22px;
}

h2 {
    font-size: 15.5px;
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--primary);
    padding-bottom: 2px;
    margin: 14px 0 8px;
}

.small {
    font-size: 12.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
}

.pill {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--bg);
    padding: 8px 12px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(12,35,61,.08);
    font-size: 12.5px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin: 4px 8px 4px 0;
}

.overview, .report-card {
    background: var(--bg);
    padding: 16px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(12,35,61,.06);
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    margin: 8px 0 10px;
}

.metrics {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    gap: 12px;
    margin-top: 12px;
}

.metric {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--callout), #fff);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.metric .label {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.metric .value {
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 20px;
    color: var(--primary);
}

.table-wrapper {
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: 8px;
    overflow: visible !important;
    max-width: 100%;
}

table {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: 12.5px;
    margin: 0;
    table-layout: fixed;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

thead th {
    background: #f8fafc;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--primary);
    font-size: 12.25px;
    padding: 8px 10px;
    text-align: left;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

th, td {
    padding: 6px 8px;
    text-align: left;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    vertical-align: top;
    white-space: normal;
    overflow-wrap: break-word;
    word-break: break-word;
    font-size: 11.5px;
}

td.money {
    text-align: right;
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
}

.tag {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 4px 8px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: rgba(12,35,61,.08);
    color: var(--primary);
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 12px;
}

.grid-3 {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 8px;
    width: 100%;
}

.dist-card {
    background: #fff;
    padding: 10px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.incidents ul {
    margin: 8px 0 0 16px;
    padding: 0;
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 12.75px;
}

.incidents li {
    margin: 6px 0;
    white-space: normal;
    overflow-wrap: anywhere;
    word-break: break-word;
}

.badge-incomplete {
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--danger);
    font-weight: 600;
}

footer {
    margin-top: 12px;
    padding-top: 8px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 11.5px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
}
/* print optimizations for landscape */
@media print {
    .wrap{max-width:none;padding:0;}
    .report-card{margin-bottom:20px;page-break-inside:avoid;}
    .grid-3{gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px;}
    .dist-card{padding:8px;margin-bottom:8px;}
    .dist-card th,.dist-card td{padding:4px 3px;font-size:11px;}
    .summary{margin-bottom:12px;font-size:12px;}
    .report-header{margin-bottom:8px;}
    .report-header h2{font-size:16px;margin:0;}
    .report-header .sub{font-size:11px;}
    .tag{font-size:10px;padding:2px 6px;}
    .meta{font-size:10px;}
    .small{font-size:10px;}
    footer{margin-top:8px;font-size:9px;}
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
    .wrap {
        padding: 16px;
    }
    h1 {
        font-size: 20px;
    }
    .metric .value {
        font-size: 18px;
    }
}

@media print {
    html, body {
        background: #fff;
        color: #000;
    }
    .wrap {
        max-width: 100%;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 12mm;
    }
    .report-card, .overview, tr {
        page-break-inside: avoid;
    }
    table {
        -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
    }
    thead {
        display: table-header-group;
    }
    tfoot {
        display: table-footer-group;
    }
    .table-wrapper {
        overflow: visible !important;
    }
}

  /* Legacy styles below */
  :root{
    margin:0;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #f4f7fb 0%, var(--bg) 100%);
    font-family: var(--font-sans);
    color:#0f172a;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
    -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
    line-height:1.38;
  }

  .wrap{
    max-width:var(--max-w);
    margin:28px auto;
    padding:28px;
    box-sizing:border-box;
    background:transparent;
  }

  header.top {
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:18px;
    margin-bottom:18px;
  }

  .logo{
    width:74px;
    height:74px;
    border-radius:12px;
    background:#0c233d;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    color:white;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:22px;
    box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(12,35,61,0.12);
    flex-shrink:0;
  }

  .title-block h1{
    margin:0;
    font-size:20px;
    letter-spacing:0.2px;
  }
  .title-block p{
    margin:4px 0 0 0;
    color:var(--muted);
    font-size:13px;
  }

  .meta {
    margin-top:14px;
    display:flex;
    gap:12px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .pill{
    background:var(--card);
    padding:8px 12px;
    border-radius:999px;
    box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(15,23,42,0.04);
    font-size:13px;
    color:var(--muted);
  }

  main{
    margin-top:18px;
    display:grid;
    gap:18px;
  }

  .overview {
    background:var(--card);
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    padding:18px;
    box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(15,23,42,0.04);
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    break-inside: avoid;
  }

  .metrics {
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));
    gap:12px;
    margin-top:12px;
  }

  .metric {
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--metric-bg),#ffffff);
    border-radius:10px;
    padding:12px;
    box-shadow:inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  }
  .metric .label{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px;}
  .metric .value{font-weight:700;font-size:20px;color:#0f172a;}

  section.report {
    display:grid;
    gap:12px;
  }

  .report-card{
    background:var(--card);
    padding:16px;
    border-radius:10px;
    box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(12,20,40,0.04);
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    break-inside: avoid;
  }

  .report-header{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
    gap:12px;
    margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  .report-header h2{margin:0;font-size:16px;}
  .report-header .sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;}

  .summary { color:var(--muted); font-size:14px; margin-bottom:8px; }

  /* tables and wrappers */
  .table-wrapper{
    width:100%;
    overflow:auto;            /* horizontal scroll on narrow screens */
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
    margin-top:8px;
  }

  table{
    width:100%;
    max-width:100%;
    border-collapse:collapse;
    font-size:14px;
    margin:0;
    table-layout:auto;        /* allow flexible column widths */
    min-width:480px;         /* prevent extreme squishing on tiny screens */
    box-sizing:border-box;
  }
  .table-wrapper{
    width:100%;
    max-width:100%;
    overflow-x:visible;
    box-sizing:border-box;
  }
  thead th{
    background:linear-gradient(90deg, #fafcff, #ffffff);
    font-weight:700;
    color:#111827;
    top:0;
    z-index:2;
  }
  th,td{
    padding:8px 10px;
    text-align:left;
    border-bottom:1px solid #eef1f6;
    vertical-align:top;
    white-space:normal;               /* allow wrapping */
    overflow-wrap:anywhere;           /* break long strings */
    word-break:break-word;
    hyphens:auto;
  }
  .small{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);}
  .muted{color:var(--muted)}
  .tag{display:inline-block;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(11,92,255,0.08);color:var(--accent);font-weight:600;font-size:12px}

  /* prevent rows/cards splitting awkwardly when printing */
  tr, .report-card, .overview {
    page-break-inside: avoid;
    break-inside: avoid;
  }

  /* distributions (compact) */
  .grid-3 {
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:10px;
  }
  .dist-card{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff,#fbfdff);padding:10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #f1f6ff}

  /* incident list - allow long entries to wrap */
  .incidents ul{margin:8px 0 0 16px;padding:0;color:#0f172a}
  .incidents li{margin:6px 0; white-space:normal; overflow-wrap:anywhere; word-break:break-word; hyphens:auto;}

  footer{
    margin-top:14px;
    font-size:12px;
    color:var(--muted);
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    gap:12px;
    align-items:center;
  }

  /* keep header from overlapping content on print */
  thead th.sticky {
    position:sticky;
  }

  /* responsive tweaks */
  @media (max-width:640px){
    .title-block h1{font-size:17px}
    .metric .value{font-size:18px}
    .wrap{padding:16px}
    table{min-width:520px}
  }

  /* Print-focused rules */
  @media print {
    html,body{background: #fff; color:#000;}
    .wrap{max-width:100%; margin:0; padding:12mm;}
    header.top{position:static; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px;}
    .logo{display:none}               /* remove decorative logo for print */
    .report-card, .overview { page-break-inside: avoid; break-inside: avoid; }
    table { page-break-inside: auto; -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact; }
    thead { display: table-header-group; }  /* repeat headers on each printed page */
    tfoot { display: table-footer-group; }
    thead th.sticky { position:static; }    /* disable sticky in print */
    .table-wrapper{ overflow:visible !important; } /* allow normal flow for printing */
    .metric .value{color:#000}
    footer{position:relative; bottom:0}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="wrap" role="main" aria-labelledby="reportTitle">
    <header class="top" role="banner">
      <div class="logo" aria-hidden="true">SCRPA</div>
      <div class="title-block">
        <h1 id="reportTitle">SCRPA Combined Executive Summary</h1>
        <p class="small">Generated: <strong>2025-12-30 00:34:15</strong> - Report Periods: <strong>7-Day, 28-Day, Year-to-Date</strong></p>
        <div class="meta">
          <div class="pill">Cycle: 25C13W52</div>
          <div class="pill">Range: 12/23/2025 - 12/29/2025</div>
          <div class="pill">Prepared by: P.O. R. A. Carucci</div>
          <div class="pill">Submitted to: Captain Smith</div>
          <div class="pill">Version: v1.1</div>
        </div>
        <div class="meta">
          <div class="pill">Auto-Detection: SCRPA Statistical Export System</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </header>

    <main>
      <!-- Executive overview -->
      <section class="overview" aria-labelledby="overviewHeading">
        <h2 id="overviewHeading" style="margin:0 0 6px 0;">Executive Overview</h2>
        <p class="summary">This combined report provides a concise, cross-period view of crime statistics to support operational decisions and resource allocation. It highlights short-term trends (7-day), monthly perspective (28-day), and longer-term strategic patterns (YTD).</p>

        <div class="metrics" aria-hidden="false">
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">Primary Focus (YTD)</div>
            <div class="value">Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2 - 58 (25.1%)</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">YTD Total Incidents</div>
            <div class="value">231</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">28-Day Incidents</div>
            <div class="value">21</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">7-Day Incidents</div>
            <div class="value">2</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">YTD Clearance Rate</div>
            <div class="value">67.5%</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Report sections -->
      <section class="report" aria-labelledby="r7">
        <div class="report-card" id="r7" role="region" aria-label="7-Day Executive Summary">
          <div class="report-header">
            <div>
              <h2>7-Day Executive Summary</h2>
              <div class="sub small">Period snapshot and key metrics (most recent 7 days)</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tag">Short-term</div>
            
            
          </div>

          <p class="summary"><strong>2 incidents</strong> across <strong>2 zones</strong>. Primary incident: <strong>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3 - 2 occurrences (100.0%)</strong>. Clearance rate: <strong>0.0%</strong>.</p>

          <div class="grid-3" aria-hidden="false">
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Incident Type Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Item</th><th class="small">Count</th><th class="small">%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3</td><td>2</td><td>100.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Zone Activity</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Zone</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>8</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>7</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Hourly Distribution</strong>

                <table>

          </div>

          <div style="margin-top:12px;">

                <thead><tr><th>Day</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>

          <p class="summary"><strong>21 incidents</strong> across <strong>6 zones</strong>. Primary incident: <strong>Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2 - 5 occurrences (23.8%)</strong>. Clearance rate: <strong>23.8%</strong>.</p>

          <div class="grid-3" aria-hidden="false">

                  <tbody><tr><td>1</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>3</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>9</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>10</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>14</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>15</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>18</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr><tr><td>19</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>20</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>21</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>22</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>23</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>

          <div style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Day of Week</strong>

            </div>

          </div>

          <p class="summary"><strong>231 incidents</strong> across <strong>6 zones</strong>. Primary incident: <strong>Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2 - 58 occurrences (25.1%)</strong>. Clearance rate: <strong>67.5%</strong>.</p>

          <div class="grid-3" aria-hidden="false">
            <div class="dist-card">

                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>8</td><td>61</td><td>26.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>7</td><td>49</td><td>21.2%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>9</td><td>42</td><td>18.2%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>5</td><td>34</td><td>14.7%</td></tr>

            </div>
            
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Hourly Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Hour</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody><tr><td>0</td><td>6</td><td>2.6%</td></tr><tr><td>1</td><td>10</td><td>4.3%</td></tr><tr><td>2</td><td>7</td><td>3.0%</td></tr><tr><td>3</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>4</td><td>6</td><td>2.6%</td></tr><tr><td>5</td><td>3</td><td>1.3%</td></tr><tr><td>6</td><td>10</td><td>4.3%</td></tr><tr><td>7</td><td>3</td><td>1.3%</td></tr><tr><td>8</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>9</td><td>8</td><td>3.5%</td></tr><tr><td>10</td><td>8</td><td>3.5%</td></tr><tr><td>11</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>12</td><td>18</td><td>7.8%</td></tr><tr><td>13</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>14</td><td>14</td><td>6.1%</td></tr><tr><td>15</td><td>11</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>16</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>17</td><td>5</td><td>2.2%</td></tr><tr><td>18</td><td>15</td><td>6.5%</td></tr><tr><td>19</td><td>12</td><td>5.2%</td></tr><tr><td>20</td><td>12</td><td>5.2%</td></tr><tr><td>21</td><td>8</td><td>3.5%</td></tr><tr><td>22</td><td>14</td><td>6.1%</td></tr><tr><td>23</td><td>16</td><td>6.9%</td></tr>

                  <tr><td>Tuesday</td><td>42</td><td>18.2%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Wednesday</td><td>25</td><td>10.8%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Thursday</td><td>34</td><td>14.7%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Friday</td><td>26</td><td>11.3%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Saturday</td><td>23</td><td>10.0%</td></tr>
```
