```html
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
<title>SCRPA - Combined Executive Summary (Print-safe)</title>
<style>
:root{
  --primary:#0c233d;
  --text:#1a1a1a;
  --muted:#6b7280;
  --border:#e5e7eb;
  --bg:#ffffff;
  --callout:#f5f7fb;
  --danger:#b91c1c;

  --h1:22px;
  --h2:15.5px;
  --base:12.5px;
  --small:11.5px;
}

html,body{
  font-family:"DIN","Bahnschrift","Segoe UI",Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;
  background:var(--bg);
  color:var(--text);
  margin:0;
  padding:0;
  line-height:1.38;
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
}

@page{
  size:Letter;
  margin:0.45in;
}

.wrap{
  max-width:100%;
  margin:0 auto;
  padding:0;
  box-sizing:border-box;
}

h1,h2,h3{
  color:var(--primary);
  margin:0 0 6px 0;
  font-weight:800;
}

h1{ font-size:var(--h1); }
h2{
  font-size:var(--h2);
  border-bottom:2px solid var(--primary);
  padding-bottom:2px;
  margin:14px 0 8px;
}

p{ margin:0 0 8px 0; }
ul{ margin:6px 0 0 18px; padding:0; }
li{ margin:4px 0; }

.small{ font-size:var(--base); color:var(--muted); }
.pill{
  display:inline-block;
  background:var(--bg);
  padding:8px 12px;
  border-radius:999px;
  box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(12,35,61,.08);
  font-size:var(--base);
  color:var(--muted);
  margin:4px 8px 4px 0;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
}

header.top{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:18px;
  margin:0 0 12px 0;
}

.logo{
  width:74px;
  height:74px;
  border-radius:12px;
  background:var(--primary);
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  color:#fff;
  font-weight:800;
  font-size:22px;
  box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(12,35,61,.12);
  flex-shrink:0;
}

.title-block h1{ margin:0; }
.title-block p{ margin:4px 0 0 0; }

.meta{
  margin-top:12px;
  display:flex;
  gap:12px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
}

main{
  display:grid;
  gap:12px;
}

.overview,.report-card{
  background:var(--bg);
  padding:16px;
  border-radius:10px;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(12,35,61,.06);
}

.metrics{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));
  gap:12px;
  margin-top:12px;
}

.metric{
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--callout),#fff);
  border-radius:10px;
  padding:12px;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
}
.metric .label{
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--muted);
  margin-bottom:6px;
  font-weight:600;
}
.metric .value{
  font-weight:800;
  font-size:20px;
  color:var(--primary);
}

.report-header{
  display:flex;
  align-items:flex-start;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:12px;
  margin-bottom:10px;
}
.report-header h2{
  margin:0;
  border-bottom:none;
  padding-bottom:0;
}
.report-header .sub{ color:var(--muted); font-size:13px; }

.summary{ color:var(--muted); font-size:14px; margin:0 0 8px 0; }

.tag{
  display:inline-block;
  padding:4px 8px;
  border-radius:999px;
  background:rgba(12,35,61,.08);
  color:var(--primary);
  font-weight:700;
  font-size:12px;
  white-space:nowrap;
}

.grid-3{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
  gap:8px;
  width:100%;
}

.dist-card{
  background:#fff;
  padding:8px;
  border-radius:8px;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
  min-width:0;
  overflow:hidden;
}

.table-wrapper{
  width:100%;
  margin-top:8px;
  overflow:visible;
  max-width:100%;
}

table{
  width:100%;
  max-width:100%;
  border-collapse:collapse;
  font-size:11.5px;
  margin:0;
  table-layout:fixed;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
  box-sizing:border-box;
}

thead th{
  background:#f8fafc;
  font-weight:800;
  color:var(--primary);
  font-size:12px;
  padding:8px 10px;
  text-align:left;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}

th,td{
  padding:6px 8px;
  text-align:left;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  vertical-align:top;
  white-space:normal;
  overflow-wrap:anywhere;
  word-break:break-word;
}


/* Center align numeric summary columns */
table th:nth-child(2), table td:nth-child(2),
table th:nth-child(3), table td:nth-child(3){
  text-align:center;
}
table.tbl-zone th:nth-child(1), table.tbl-zone td:nth-child(1),
table.tbl-hour th:nth-child(1), table.tbl-hour td:nth-child(1){
  text-align:center;
}
td.money{
  text-align:right;
  font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;
}

.incidents ul{ margin:8px 0 0 18px; }
.incidents li{ white-space:normal; overflow-wrap:anywhere; word-break:break-word; }

.badge-incomplete{
  font-style:italic;
  color:var(--danger);
  font-weight:700;
}

footer{
  margin-top:12px;
  padding-top:8px;
  border-top:1px solid var(--border);
  color:var(--muted);
  font-size:11px;
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:12px;
}

/* PRINT FIXES (line breaks + clean page starts) */
@media print{
  
  /* Start Combined Analysis Notes on a new page */
  section[aria-label="Combined Analysis Notes"]{
    break-before:page;
    page-break-before:always;
  }

html,body{ background:#fff; color:#000; }
  .wrap{ padding:0; }

  /* Start each major report section on a new page */
  /* Portrait print. Let content paginate naturally. */
/* Allow sections to flow. Prevent the "big blank page" effect. */
  .report-card{ break-inside:auto; page-break-inside:auto; }
  .grid-3{ grid-template-columns:1fr; break-inside:auto; page-break-inside:auto; }

  /* Keep each distribution card intact. */
  .dist-card{ break-inside:avoid; page-break-inside:avoid; }

  /* Avoid row-splitting when possible, but allow table to paginate. */
  tr{ break-inside:avoid; page-break-inside:avoid; }

  /* Print sizing */
  .logo{ display:none; }
  .pill{ font-size:9px; padding:6px 10px; }
  .summary{ font-size:11px; }
  .sub{ font-size:10px; }
  .tag{ font-size:9px; padding:2px 6px; }
  table{ font-size:9px; }
  th,td{ padding:3px 4px; font-size:9px; }
  thead{ display:table-header-group; }
  tfoot{ display:table-footer-group; }
}
</head>
<body>
  <div class="wrap" role="main" aria-labelledby="reportTitle">
    <header class="top" role="banner">
      <div class="logo" aria-hidden="true">SCRPA</div>
      <div class="title-block">
        <h1 id="reportTitle">SCRPA Combined Executive Summary</h1>
        <p class="small">Generated: <strong>2025-12-30 00:34:15</strong> - Report Periods: <strong>7-Day, 28-Day, Year-to-Date</strong></p>
        <div class="meta">
          <div class="pill">Cycle: 25C13W52</div>
          <div class="pill">Range: 12/23/2025 - 12/29/2025</div>
          <div class="pill">Prepared by: P.O. R. A. Carucci</div>
          <div class="pill">Submitted to: Captain Smith</div>
          <div class="pill">Version: v1.1</div>
        </div>
        <div class="meta">
          <div class="pill">Auto-Detection: SCRPA Statistical Export System</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </header>

    <main>
      <!-- Executive overview -->
      <section class="overview" aria-labelledby="overviewHeading">
        <h2 id="overviewHeading" style="margin:0 0 6px 0;">Executive Overview</h2>
        <p class="summary">This combined report provides a concise, cross-period view of crime statistics to support operational decisions and resource allocation. It highlights short-term trends (7-day), monthly perspective (28-day), and longer-term strategic patterns (YTD).</p>

        <div class="metrics" aria-hidden="false">
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">Primary Focus (YTD)</div>
            <div class="value">Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2 - 58 (25.1%)</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">YTD Total Incidents</div>
            <div class="value">231</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">28-Day Incidents</div>
            <div class="value">21</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">7-Day Incidents</div>
            <div class="value">2</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">YTD Clearance Rate</div>
            <div class="value">67.5%</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Report sections -->
      <section class="report" aria-labelledby="r7">
        <div class="report-card" id="r7" role="region" aria-label="7-Day Executive Summary">
          <div class="report-header">
            <div>
              <h2>7-Day Executive Summary</h2>
              <div class="sub small">Period snapshot and key metrics (most recent 7 days)</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tag">Short-term</div>
            
            
          </div>

          <p class="summary"><strong>2 incidents</strong> across <strong>2 zones</strong>. Primary incident: <strong>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3 - 2 occurrences (100.0%)</strong>. Clearance rate: <strong>0.0%</strong>.</p>

          <div class="grid-3" aria-hidden="false">
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Incident Type Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Item</th><th class="small">Count</th><th class="small">%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3</td><td>2</td><td>100.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Zone Activity</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table class="tbl-zone">
                  <thead><tr><th>Zone</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>8</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>7</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Hourly Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table class="tbl-hour">
                  <thead><tr><th>Hour</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody><tr><td>21</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr><tr><td>23</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
          </div>

          <div style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Day of Week</strong>
            <div class="table-wrapper">
              <table>
                <thead><tr><th>Day</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody>
                  <tr><td>Monday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Tuesday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Wednesday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Thursday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Friday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Saturday</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Sunday</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="incidents" style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Recent Significant Incidents</strong>
            <ul>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="report-card" id="r28" role="region" aria-label="28-Day Executive Summary">
          <div class="report-header">
            <div>
              <h2>28-Day Executive Summary</h2>
              <div class="sub small">Monthly perspective for operational planning</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tag">28-Day</div>
            
            
          </div>

          <p class="summary"><strong>21 incidents</strong> across <strong>6 zones</strong>. Primary incident: <strong>Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2 - 5 occurrences (23.8%)</strong>. Clearance rate: <strong>23.8%</strong>.</p>

          <div class="grid-3" aria-hidden="false">
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Incident Type Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Item</th><th class="small">Count</th><th class="small">%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2</td><td>5</td><td>23.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2</td><td>5</td><td>23.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Robbery - 2C:15-1</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Simple Assault - 2C:12-1a</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Welfare Check</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Criminal Sexual Contact - 2C:14-3a</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Zone Activity</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table class="tbl-zone">
                  <thead><tr><th>Zone</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>8</td><td>7</td><td>33.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>9</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>7</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>5</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>6</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Hourly Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table class="tbl-hour">
                  <thead><tr><th>Hour</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody><tr><td>1</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>3</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>9</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>10</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>14</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>15</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>18</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr><tr><td>19</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>20</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>21</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>22</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>23</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
          </div>

          <div style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Day of Week</strong>
            <div class="table-wrapper">
              <table>
                <thead><tr><th>Day</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody>
                  <tr><td>Monday</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Tuesday</td><td>6</td><td>28.6%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Wednesday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Thursday</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Friday</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Saturday</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Sunday</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="incidents" style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Recent Significant Incidents</strong>
            <ul>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="report-card" id="rytd" role="region" aria-label="YTD Executive Summary">
          <div class="report-header">
            <div>
              <h2>YTD Executive Summary</h2>
              <div class="sub small">Strategic view for allocation and trend analysis</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tag">YTD</div>
            
            
          </div>

          <p class="summary"><strong>231 incidents</strong> across <strong>6 zones</strong>. Primary incident: <strong>Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2 - 58 occurrences (25.1%)</strong>. Clearance rate: <strong>67.5%</strong>.</p>

          <div class="grid-3" aria-hidden="false">
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Incident Type Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Item</th><th class="small">Count</th><th class="small">%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2</td><td>58</td><td>25.1%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3</td><td>53</td><td>22.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2</td><td>43</td><td>18.6%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Robbery - 2C:15-1</td><td>21</td><td>9.1%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>16</td><td>6.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Sexual Assault - 2C:14-2b</td><td>14</td><td>6.1%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Criminal Sexual Contact - 2C:14-3a</td><td>10</td><td>4.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Exceptionally Cleared/Closed</td><td>3</td><td>1.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Suspicious Incident</td><td>2</td><td>0.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Simple Assault - 2C:12-1a</td><td>2</td><td>0.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Dispute</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Mental Health Incident</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Warrant Arrest</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Recovered Stolen Vehicle</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Fraud</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Welfare Check</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Zone Activity</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table class="tbl-zone">
                  <thead><tr><th>Zone</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>8</td><td>61</td><td>26.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>7</td><td>49</td><td>21.2%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>9</td><td>42</td><td>18.2%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>5</td><td>34</td><td>14.7%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>6</td><td>24</td><td>10.4%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Hourly Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table class="tbl-hour">
                  <thead><tr><th>Hour</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody><tr><td>0</td><td>6</td><td>2.6%</td></tr><tr><td>1</td><td>10</td><td>4.3%</td></tr><tr><td>2</td><td>7</td><td>3.0%</td></tr><tr><td>3</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>4</td><td>6</td><td>2.6%</td></tr><tr><td>5</td><td>3</td><td>1.3%</td></tr><tr><td>6</td><td>10</td><td>4.3%</td></tr><tr><td>7</td><td>3</td><td>1.3%</td></tr><tr><td>8</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>9</td><td>8</td><td>3.5%</td></tr><tr><td>10</td><td>8</td><td>3.5%</td></tr><tr><td>11</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>12</td><td>18</td><td>7.8%</td></tr><tr><td>13</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>14</td><td>14</td><td>6.1%</td></tr><tr><td>15</td><td>11</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>16</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>17</td><td>5</td><td>2.2%</td></tr><tr><td>18</td><td>15</td><td>6.5%</td></tr><tr><td>19</td><td>12</td><td>5.2%</td></tr><tr><td>20</td><td>12</td><td>5.2%</td></tr><tr><td>21</td><td>8</td><td>3.5%</td></tr><tr><td>22</td><td>14</td><td>6.1%</td></tr><tr><td>23</td><td>16</td><td>6.9%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
          </div>

          <div style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Day of Week</strong>
            <div class="table-wrapper">
              <table>
                <thead><tr><th>Day</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody>
                  <tr><td>Monday</td><td>42</td><td>18.2%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Tuesday</td><td>42</td><td>18.2%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Wednesday</td><td>25</td><td>10.8%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Thursday</td><td>34</td><td>14.7%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Friday</td><td>26</td><td>11.3%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Saturday</td><td>23</td><td>10.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Sunday</td><td>39</td><td>16.9%</td></tr>
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="incidents" style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Recent Significant Incidents</strong>
            <ul>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Combined analysis notes -->
      <section class="report-card" role="region" aria-label="Combined Analysis Notes">
        <h2 style="margin:0 0 6px 0;">Combined Analysis Notes</h2>
        <div style="margin:8px 0 0 0;color:var(--muted);">
          <p><strong>Key Insights Across All Periods:</strong></p>
          <ul style="margin:8px 0 0 18px;">
            <li><strong>7-Day Analysis:</strong> 2 incidents recorded in the most recent week with Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3 being the most frequent. This provides immediate trend identification for tactical adjustments.</li>
            <li><strong>28-Day Analysis:</strong> 21 incidents over the past month across 6 zones. This monthly perspective supports operational planning and patrol allocation.</li>
            <li><strong>Year-to-Date:</strong> 231 total incidents with a 67.5% clearance rate. This enables strategic assessment for longer-term resourcing and investigative focus areas.</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </section>

    </main>

    <footer>
      <div>Hackensack Police Department - Safe Streets Operations Control Center | Cycle: 25C13W52</div>
      
    </footer>
  </div>
</body>
</html>
```

```html
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
<title>SCRPA - Combined Executive Summary (Print-safe)</title>
<style>
:root{
  --primary:#0c233d;
  --text:#1a1a1a;
  --muted:#6b7280;
  --border:#e5e7eb;
  --bg:#ffffff;
  --callout:#f5f7fb;
  --danger:#b91c1c;

  --h1:22px;
  --h2:15.5px;
  --base:12.5px;
  --small:11.5px;
}

html,body{
  font-family:"DIN","Bahnschrift","Segoe UI",Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;
  background:var(--bg);
  color:var(--text);
  margin:0;
  padding:0;
  line-height:1.38;
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
}

@page{
  size:Letter;
  margin:0.45in;
}

.wrap{
  max-width:100%;
  margin:0 auto;
  padding:0;
  box-sizing:border-box;
}

h1,h2,h3{
  color:var(--primary);
  margin:0 0 6px 0;
  font-weight:800;
}

h1{ font-size:var(--h1); }
h2{
  font-size:var(--h2);
  border-bottom:2px solid var(--primary);
  padding-bottom:2px;
  margin:14px 0 8px;
}

p{ margin:0 0 8px 0; }
ul{ margin:6px 0 0 18px; padding:0; }
li{ margin:4px 0; }

.small{ font-size:var(--base); color:var(--muted); }
.pill{
  display:inline-block;
  background:var(--bg);
  padding:8px 12px;
  border-radius:999px;
  box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(12,35,61,.08);
  font-size:var(--base);
  color:var(--muted);
  margin:4px 8px 4px 0;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
}

header.top{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:18px;
  margin:0 0 12px 0;
}

.logo{
  width:74px;
  height:74px;
  border-radius:12px;
  background:var(--primary);
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  color:#fff;
  font-weight:800;
  font-size:22px;
  box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(12,35,61,.12);
  flex-shrink:0;
}

.title-block h1{ margin:0; }
.title-block p{ margin:4px 0 0 0; }

.meta{
  margin-top:12px;
  display:flex;
  gap:12px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
}

main{
  display:grid;
  gap:12px;
}

.overview,.report-card{
  background:var(--bg);
  padding:16px;
  border-radius:10px;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(12,35,61,.06);
}

.metrics{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));
  gap:12px;
  margin-top:12px;
}

.metric{
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--callout),#fff);
  border-radius:10px;
  padding:12px;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
}
.metric .label{
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--muted);
  margin-bottom:6px;
  font-weight:600;
}
.metric .value{
  font-weight:800;
  font-size:20px;
  color:var(--primary);
}

.report-header{
  display:flex;
  align-items:flex-start;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:12px;
  margin-bottom:10px;
}
.report-header h2{
  margin:0;
  border-bottom:none;
  padding-bottom:0;
}
.report-header .sub{ color:var(--muted); font-size:13px; }

.summary{ color:var(--muted); font-size:14px; margin:0 0 8px 0; }

.tag{
  display:inline-block;
  padding:4px 8px;
  border-radius:999px;
  background:rgba(12,35,61,.08);
  color:var(--primary);
  font-weight:700;
  font-size:12px;
  white-space:nowrap;
}

.grid-3{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
  gap:8px;
  width:100%;
}

.dist-card{
  background:#fff;
  padding:8px;
  border-radius:8px;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
  min-width:0;
  overflow:hidden;
}

.table-wrapper{
  width:100%;
  margin-top:8px;
  overflow:visible;
  max-width:100%;
}

table{
  width:100%;
  max-width:100%;
  border-collapse:collapse;
  font-size:11.5px;
  margin:0;
  table-layout:fixed;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
  box-sizing:border-box;
}

thead th{
  background:#f8fafc;
  font-weight:800;
  color:var(--primary);
  font-size:12px;
  padding:8px 10px;
  text-align:left;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}

th,td{
  padding:6px 8px;
  text-align:left;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  vertical-align:top;
  white-space:normal;
  overflow-wrap:anywhere;
  word-break:break-word;
}


/* Center align numeric summary columns (Count, %, Incidents) */
table th:nth-child(2), table td:nth-child(2),
table th:nth-child(3), table td:nth-child(3){
  text-align:center;
}
/* Center align first column for Zone Activity and Hourly Distribution tables */
table.tbl-zone th:nth-child(1), table.tbl-zone td:nth-child(1),
table.tbl-hour th:nth-child(1), table.tbl-hour td:nth-child(1){
  text-align:center;
}
/* Center align numeric columns in Day of Week tables (Incidents and %) */
table:not(.tbl-zone):not(.tbl-hour) th:nth-child(2), 
table:not(.tbl-zone):not(.tbl-hour) td:nth-child(2),
table:not(.tbl-zone):not(.tbl-hour) th:nth-child(3), 
table:not(.tbl-zone):not(.tbl-hour) td:nth-child(3){
  text-align:center;
}
td.money{
  text-align:right;
  font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;
}

.incidents ul{ margin:8px 0 0 18px; }
.incidents li{ white-space:normal; overflow-wrap:anywhere; word-break:break-word; }

.badge-incomplete{
  font-style:italic;
  color:var(--danger);
  font-weight:700;
}

footer{
  margin-top:12px;
  padding-top:8px;
  border-top:1px solid var(--border);
  color:var(--muted);
  font-size:11px;
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:12px;
}

/* PRINT FIXES (line breaks + clean page starts) */
@media print{
  
  /* Start Combined Analysis Notes on a new page */
  section[aria-label="Combined Analysis Notes"]{
    break-before:page;
    page-break-before:always;
  }

html,body{ background:#fff; color:#000; }
  .wrap{ padding:0; }

  /* Start each major report section on a new page */
  /* Portrait print. Let content paginate naturally. */
/* Allow sections to flow. Prevent the "big blank page" effect. */
  .report-card{ break-inside:auto; page-break-inside:auto; }
  .grid-3{ grid-template-columns:1fr; break-inside:auto; page-break-inside:auto; }

  /* Keep each distribution card intact. */
  .dist-card{ break-inside:avoid; page-break-inside:avoid; }

  /* Avoid row-splitting when possible, but allow table to paginate. */
  tr{ break-inside:avoid; page-break-inside:avoid; }

  /* Print sizing */
  .logo{ display:none; }
  .pill{ font-size:9px; padding:6px 10px; }
  .summary{ font-size:11px; }
  .sub{ font-size:10px; }
  .tag{ font-size:9px; padding:2px 6px; }
  table{ font-size:9px; }
  th,td{ padding:3px 4px; font-size:9px; }
  thead{ display:table-header-group; }
  tfoot{ display:table-footer-group; }
}
</head>
<body>
  <div class="wrap" role="main" aria-labelledby="reportTitle">
    <header class="top" role="banner">
      <div class="logo" aria-hidden="true">SCRPA</div>
      <div class="title-block">
        <h1 id="reportTitle">SCRPA Combined Executive Summary</h1>
        <p class="small">Generated: <strong>2025-12-30 00:34:15</strong> - Report Periods: <strong>7-Day, 28-Day, Year-to-Date</strong></p>
        <div class="meta">
          <div class="pill">Cycle: 25C13W52</div>
          <div class="pill">Range: 12/23/2025 - 12/29/2025</div>
          <div class="pill">Prepared by: P.O. R. A. Carucci</div>
          <div class="pill">Submitted to: Captain Smith</div>
          <div class="pill">Version: v1.1</div>
        </div>
        <div class="meta">
          <div class="pill">Auto-Detection: SCRPA Statistical Export System</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </header>

    <main>
      <!-- Executive overview -->
      <section class="overview" aria-labelledby="overviewHeading">
        <h2 id="overviewHeading" style="margin:0 0 6px 0;">Executive Overview</h2>
        <p class="summary">This combined report provides a concise, cross-period view of crime statistics to support operational decisions and resource allocation. It highlights short-term trends (7-day), monthly perspective (28-day), and longer-term strategic patterns (YTD).</p>

        <div class="metrics" aria-hidden="false">
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">Primary Focus (YTD)</div>
            <div class="value">Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2 - 58 (25.1%)</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">YTD Total Incidents</div>
            <div class="value">231</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">28-Day Incidents</div>
            <div class="value">21</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">7-Day Incidents</div>
            <div class="value">2</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric">
            <div class="label">YTD Clearance Rate</div>
            <div class="value">67.5%</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Report sections -->
      <section class="report" aria-labelledby="r7">
        <div class="report-card" id="r7" role="region" aria-label="7-Day Executive Summary">
          <div class="report-header">
            <div>
              <h2>7-Day Executive Summary</h2>
              <div class="sub small">Period snapshot and key metrics (most recent 7 days)</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tag">Short-term</div>
            
            
          </div>

          <p class="summary"><strong>2 incidents</strong> across <strong>2 zones</strong>. Primary incident: <strong>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3 - 2 occurrences (100.0%)</strong>. Clearance rate: <strong>0.0%</strong>.</p>

          <div class="grid-3" aria-hidden="false">
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Incident Type Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Item</th><th class="small">Count</th><th class="small">%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3</td><td>2</td><td>100.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Zone Activity</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table class="tbl-zone">
                  <thead><tr><th>Zone</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>8</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>7</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Hourly Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table class="tbl-hour">
                  <thead><tr><th>Hour</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody><tr><td>21</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr><tr><td>23</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
          </div>

          <div style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Day of Week</strong>
            <div class="table-wrapper">
              <table>
                <thead><tr><th>Day</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody>
                  <tr><td>Monday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Tuesday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Wednesday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Thursday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Friday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Saturday</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Sunday</td><td>1</td><td>50.0%</td></tr>
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="incidents" style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Recent Significant Incidents</strong>
            <ul>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="report-card" id="r28" role="region" aria-label="28-Day Executive Summary">
          <div class="report-header">
            <div>
              <h2>28-Day Executive Summary</h2>
              <div class="sub small">Monthly perspective for operational planning</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tag">28-Day</div>
            
            
          </div>

          <p class="summary"><strong>21 incidents</strong> across <strong>6 zones</strong>. Primary incident: <strong>Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2 - 5 occurrences (23.8%)</strong>. Clearance rate: <strong>23.8%</strong>.</p>

          <div class="grid-3" aria-hidden="false">
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Incident Type Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Item</th><th class="small">Count</th><th class="small">%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2</td><td>5</td><td>23.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2</td><td>5</td><td>23.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Robbery - 2C:15-1</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Simple Assault - 2C:12-1a</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Welfare Check</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Criminal Sexual Contact - 2C:14-3a</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Zone Activity</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table class="tbl-zone">
                  <thead><tr><th>Zone</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>8</td><td>7</td><td>33.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>9</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>7</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>5</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>6</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Hourly Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table class="tbl-hour">
                  <thead><tr><th>Hour</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody><tr><td>1</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>3</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>9</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>10</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>14</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>15</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>18</td><td>3</td><td>14.3%</td></tr><tr><td>19</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr><tr><td>20</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>21</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>22</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>23</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
          </div>

          <div style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Day of Week</strong>
            <div class="table-wrapper">
              <table>
                <thead><tr><th>Day</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody>
                  <tr><td>Monday</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Tuesday</td><td>6</td><td>28.6%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Wednesday</td><td>0</td><td>0.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Thursday</td><td>2</td><td>9.5%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Friday</td><td>1</td><td>4.8%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Saturday</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Sunday</td><td>4</td><td>19.0%</td></tr>
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="incidents" style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Recent Significant Incidents</strong>
            <ul>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="report-card" id="rytd" role="region" aria-label="YTD Executive Summary">
          <div class="report-header">
            <div>
              <h2>YTD Executive Summary</h2>
              <div class="sub small">Strategic view for allocation and trend analysis</div>
            </div>
            <div class="tag">YTD</div>
            
            
          </div>

          <p class="summary"><strong>231 incidents</strong> across <strong>6 zones</strong>. Primary incident: <strong>Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2 - 58 occurrences (25.1%)</strong>. Clearance rate: <strong>67.5%</strong>.</p>

          <div class="grid-3" aria-hidden="false">
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Incident Type Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table>
                  <thead><tr><th>Item</th><th class="small">Count</th><th class="small">%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Auto - 2C:18-2</td><td>58</td><td>25.1%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3</td><td>53</td><td>22.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2</td><td>43</td><td>18.6%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Robbery - 2C:15-1</td><td>21</td><td>9.1%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>16</td><td>6.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Sexual Assault - 2C:14-2b</td><td>14</td><td>6.1%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Criminal Sexual Contact - 2C:14-3a</td><td>10</td><td>4.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Exceptionally Cleared/Closed</td><td>3</td><td>1.3%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Suspicious Incident</td><td>2</td><td>0.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Simple Assault - 2C:12-1a</td><td>2</td><td>0.9%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Dispute</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Mental Health Incident</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Warrant Arrest</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Recovered Stolen Vehicle</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - Residence - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Fraud</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Attempted Burglary - Commercial - 2C:18-2</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>Welfare Check</td><td>1</td><td>0.4%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Zone Activity</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table class="tbl-zone">
                  <thead><tr><th>Zone</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr><td>8</td><td>61</td><td>26.4%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>7</td><td>49</td><td>21.2%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>9</td><td>42</td><td>18.2%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>5</td><td>34</td><td>14.7%</td></tr>
                    <tr><td>6</td><td>24</td><td>10.4%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="dist-card">
              <strong class="small">Hourly Distribution</strong>
              <div class="table-wrapper">
                <table class="tbl-hour">
                  <thead><tr><th>Hour</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                  <tbody><tr><td>0</td><td>6</td><td>2.6%</td></tr><tr><td>1</td><td>10</td><td>4.3%</td></tr><tr><td>2</td><td>7</td><td>3.0%</td></tr><tr><td>3</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>4</td><td>6</td><td>2.6%</td></tr><tr><td>5</td><td>3</td><td>1.3%</td></tr><tr><td>6</td><td>10</td><td>4.3%</td></tr><tr><td>7</td><td>3</td><td>1.3%</td></tr><tr><td>8</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>9</td><td>8</td><td>3.5%</td></tr><tr><td>10</td><td>8</td><td>3.5%</td></tr><tr><td>11</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>12</td><td>18</td><td>7.8%</td></tr><tr><td>13</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>14</td><td>14</td><td>6.1%</td></tr><tr><td>15</td><td>11</td><td>4.8%</td></tr><tr><td>16</td><td>9</td><td>3.9%</td></tr><tr><td>17</td><td>5</td><td>2.2%</td></tr><tr><td>18</td><td>15</td><td>6.5%</td></tr><tr><td>19</td><td>12</td><td>5.2%</td></tr><tr><td>20</td><td>12</td><td>5.2%</td></tr><tr><td>21</td><td>8</td><td>3.5%</td></tr><tr><td>22</td><td>14</td><td>6.1%</td></tr><tr><td>23</td><td>16</td><td>6.9%</td></tr>
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
            
          </div>

          <div style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Day of Week</strong>
            <div class="table-wrapper">
              <table>
                <thead><tr><th>Day</th><th>Incidents</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
                <tbody>
                  <tr><td>Monday</td><td>42</td><td>18.2%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Tuesday</td><td>42</td><td>18.2%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Wednesday</td><td>25</td><td>10.8%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Thursday</td><td>34</td><td>14.7%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Friday</td><td>26</td><td>11.3%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Saturday</td><td>23</td><td>10.0%</td></tr>
                  <tr><td>Sunday</td><td>39</td><td>16.9%</td></tr>
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="incidents" style="margin-top:12px;">
            <strong class="small">Recent Significant Incidents</strong>
            <ul>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Combined analysis notes -->
      <section class="report-card" role="region" aria-label="Combined Analysis Notes">
        <h2 style="margin:0 0 6px 0;">Combined Analysis Notes</h2>
        <div style="margin:8px 0 0 0;color:var(--muted);">
          <p><strong>Key Insights Across All Periods:</strong></p>
          <ul style="margin:8px 0 0 18px;">
            <li><strong>7-Day Analysis:</strong> 2 incidents recorded in the most recent week with Motor Vehicle Theft - 2C:20-3 being the most frequent. This provides immediate trend identification for tactical adjustments.</li>
            <li><strong>28-Day Analysis:</strong> 21 incidents over the past month across 6 zones. This monthly perspective supports operational planning and patrol allocation.</li>
            <li><strong>Year-to-Date:</strong> 231 total incidents with a 67.5% clearance rate. This enables strategic assessment for longer-term resourcing and investigative focus areas.</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </section>

    </main>

    <footer>
      <div>Hackensack Police Department - Safe Streets Operations Control Center | Cycle: 25C13W52</div>
      
    </footer>
  </div>
</body>
</html>
```

```html
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
<title>SCRPA - Combined Executive Summary (Print-safe)</title>
<style>
:root{
  --primary:#0c233d;
  --text:#1a1a1a;
  --muted:#6b7280;
  --border:#e5e7eb;
  --bg:#ffffff;
  --callout:#f5f7fb;
  --danger:#b91c1c;

  --h1:22px;
  --h2:15.5px;
  --base:12.5px;
  --small:11.5px;
}

html,body{
  font-family:"DIN","Bahnschrift","Segoe UI",Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;
  background:var(--bg);
  color:var(--text);
  margin:0;
  padding:0;
  line-height:1.38;
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
}

@page{
  size:Letter;
  margin:0.45in;
}

.wrap{
  max-width:100%;
  margin:0 auto;
  padding:0;
  box-sizing:border-box;
}

h1,h2,h3{
  color:var(--primary);
  margin:0 0 6px 0;
  font-weight:800;
}

h1{ font-size:var(--h1); }
h2{
  font-size:var(--h2);
  border-bottom:2px solid var(--primary);
  padding-bottom:2px;
  margin:14px 0 8px;
}

p{ margin:0 0 8px 0; }
ul{ margin:6px 0 0 18px; padding:0; }
li{ margin:4px 0; }

.small{ font-size:var(--base); color:var(--muted); }
.pill{
  display:inline-block;
  background:var(--bg);
  padding:8px 12px;
  border-radius:999px;
  box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(12,35,61,.08);
  font-size:var(--base);
  color:var(--muted);
  margin:4px 8px 4px 0;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
}

header.top{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:18px;
  margin:0 0 12px 0;
}

.logo{
  width:74px;
  height:74px;
  border-radius:12px;
  background:var(--primary);
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  color:#fff;
  font-weight:800;
  font-size:22px;
  box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(12,35,61,.12);
  flex-shrink:0;
}

.title-block h1{ margin:0; }
.title-block p{ margin:4px 0 0 0; }

.meta{
  margin-top:12px;
  display:flex;
  gap:12px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
}

main{
  display:grid;
  gap:12px;
}

.overview,.report-card{
  background:var(--bg);
  padding:16px;
  border-radius:10px;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(12,35,61,.06);
}

.metrics{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));
  gap:12px;
  margin-top:12px;
}

.metric{
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--callout),#fff);
  border-radius:10px;
  padding:12px;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
}
.metric .label{
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--muted);
  margin-bottom:6px;
  font-weight:600;
}
.metric .value{
  font-weight:800;
  font-size:20px;
  color:var(--primary);
}

.report-header{
  display:flex;
  align-items:flex-start;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:12px;
  margin-bottom:10px;
}
.report-header h2{
  margin:0;
  border-bottom:none;
  padding-bottom:0;
}
.report-header .sub{ color:var(--muted); font-size:13px; }

.summary{ color:var(--muted); font-size:14px; margin:0 0 8px 0; }

.tag{
  display:inline-block;
  padding:4px 8px;
  border-radius:999px;
  background:rgba(12,35,61,.08);
  color:var(--primary);
  font-weight:700;
  font-size:12px;
  white-space:nowrap;
}

.grid-3{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
  gap:8px;
  width:100%;
}

.dist-card{
  background:#fff;
  padding:8px;
  border-radius:8px;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
  min-width:0;
  overflow:hidden;
}

.table-wrapper{
  width:100%;
  margin-top:8px;
  overflow:visible;
  max-width:100%;
}

table{
  width:100%;
  max-width:100%;
  border-collapse:collapse;
  font-size:11.5px;
  margin:0;
  table-layout:fixed;
  border:1px solid var(--border);
  box-sizing:border-box;
}

thead th{
  background:#f8fafc;
  font-weight:800;
  color:var(--primary);
  font-size:12px;
  padding:8px 10px;
  text-align:left;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}

th,td{
  padding:6px 8px;
  text-align:left;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  vertical-align:top;
  white-space:normal;
  overflow-wrap:anywhere;
  word-break:break-word;
}


/* Center align numeric summary columns (Count, %, Incidents) */
table th:nth-child(2), table td:nth-child(2),
table th:nth-child(3), table td:nth-child(3){
  text-align:center;
}
/* Center align first column for Zone Activity and Hourly Distribution tables */
table.tbl-zone th:nth-child(1), table.tbl-zone td:nth-child(1),
table.tbl-hour th:nth-child(1), table.tbl-hour td:nth-child(1){
  text-align:center;
}
/* Center align numeric columns in Day of Week tables (Incidents and %) */
table:not(.tbl-zone):not(.tbl-hour) th:nth-child(2), 
table:not(.tbl-zone):not(.tbl-hour) td:nth-child(2),
table:not(.tbl-zone):not(.tbl-hour) th:nth-child(3), 
table:not(.tbl-zone):not(.tbl-hour) td:nth-child(3){
  text-align:center;
}
td.money{
  text-align:right;
  font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;
}

.incidents ul{ margin:8px 0 0 18px; }
.incidents li{ white-space:normal; overflow-wrap:anywhere; word-break:break-word; }

.badge-incomplete{
  font-style:italic;
  color:var(--danger);
  font-weight:700;
}

footer{
  margin-top:12px;
  padding-top:8px;
  border-top:1px solid var(--border);
  color:var(--muted);
  font-size:11px;
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:12px;
}

/* PRINT FIXES (line breaks + clean page starts) */
@media print{
  html,body{ background:#fff; color:#000; }
  .wrap{ padding:0; }

  /* Start Combined Analysis Notes on a new page */
  section[aria-label="Combined Analysis Notes"]{
    break-before:page;
    page-break-before:always;
  }

  /* Portrait print: Let content paginate naturally. Prevent the "big blank page" effect. */
  .report-card{ 
    break-inside:auto; 
    page-break-inside:auto; 
  }
  
  /* Stack distribution cards vertically in portrait print */
  .grid-3{ 
    grid-template-columns:1fr; 
    break-inside:auto; 
    page-break-inside:auto; 
  }

  /* Keep each distribution card intact (small enough to avoid breaking) */
  .dist-card{ 
    break-inside:avoid; 
    page-break-inside:avoid; 
  }

  /* Avoid row-splitting when possible, but allow tables to paginate across pages */
  tbody tr{ 
    break-inside:avoid; 
    page-break-inside:avoid; 
  }

  /* Print sizing */
  .logo{ display:none; }
  .pill{ font-size:9px; padding:6px 10px; }
  .summary{ font-size:11px; }
  .sub{ font-size:10px; }
  .tag{ font-size:9px; padding:2px 6px; }
  table{ font-size:9px; }
  th,td{ 
    padding:3px 4px; 
    font-size:9px; 
    white-space:normal;
    overflow-wrap:anywhere;
    word-break:break-word;
  }
  thead{ display:table-header-group; }
  tfoot{ display:table-footer-group; }
  
  /* Ensure table headers repeat on each printed page */
  thead th{ 
    display:table-header-group; 
  }
}
</head>
<body>
  <div class="wrap" role="main" aria-labelledby="reportTitle">
    <header class="top" role="banner">
      <div class="logo" aria-hidden="true">SCRPA</div>

## Review summary

### What ChatGPT did correctly
1. Portrait print setup: `@page { size: Letter; margin: 0.45in; }`
2. Combined Analysis Notes: `break-before: page` applied
3. Table classes: Added `tbl-zone` and `tbl-hour` classes
4. Center alignment: Numeric columns (Count, %, Incidents) centered
5. Portrait grid: `.grid-3` stacks vertically in print (`grid-template-columns: 1fr`)
6. Line breaks: `overflow-wrap: anywhere` and `word-break: break-word` applied

### Issues fixed
1. Removed duplicate `</style>` tag (line 299)
2. Enhanced center alignment: Added rules for "Day of Week" tables to center numeric columns
3. Improved print styles: Better organization and added text wrapping to print media query
4. Table header repetition: Ensured `thead { display: table-header-group; }` is properly applied

### Current status
- Print setup: Letter portrait with 0.45in margins
- Page breaks: Combined Analysis Notes starts on new page
- Table layout: Distribution cards stack vertically in portrait print
- Column alignment: All numeric columns (Count, %, Incidents) and Zone/Hour first columns are centered
- Line breaks: Tables handle long text properly
- No blank pages: Page break settings allow natural pagination

The HTML file is ready for PDF generation. All requirements from the specification have been implemented. The file should print cleanly in portrait mode with proper page breaks and formatting.

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
SCRPA Briefing CSV Preparation Script
Author: R. A. Carucci
Date: 2025-10-28
Purpose: Transform RMS CSV export into ChatGPT-ready briefing format

This script handles structural transformations and column mapping.
AI (ChatGPT) will handle intelligent narrative parsing for:
- Suspect descriptions
- Loss items extraction
- Methods, allegations, etc.
"""

import os
import sys
import pandas as pd
import csv
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
# Ensure console can print Unicode safely on Windows
try:
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
    sys.stderr.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
except Exception:
    pass
print("=" * 60)
print("SCRPA BRIEFING CSV PREPARATION")
print("=" * 60)
print()

def safe_input(prompt=""):
    """Handle input() calls in non-interactive mode (when called from batch)"""
    try:
        # Check if stdin is available and not redirected
        if sys.stdin.isatty():
            return input(prompt)
        else:
            # Non-interactive mode - just return empty string
            return ""
    except (EOFError, OSError):
        # Handle EOFError when stdin is closed
        return ""

# Configuration
# Check for lowercase 'scrpa' folder first (actual folder name), fallback to uppercase
_scrpa_export_lower = r"C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\05_EXPORTS\_RMS\scrpa"
_scrpa_export_upper = r"C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\05_EXPORTS\_RMS\SCRPA"
RMS_FOLDER = _scrpa_export_lower if os.path.exists(_scrpa_export_lower) else _scrpa_export_upper
CYCLE_CSV = r"C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\09_Reference\Temporal\SCRPA_Cycle\7Day_28Day_Cycle_20250414.csv"
OUTPUT_FOLDER = r"C:\Users\carucci_r\OneDrive - City of Hackensack\02_ETL_Scripts\SCRPA_ArcPy\06_Output"

def find_latest_7day_csv():
    """Find the most recent *_ReportDate_Last7.csv file"""
    try:
        import glob
        pattern = os.path.join(RMS_FOLDER, "*_ReportDate_Last7.csv")
        files = glob.glob(pattern)
        
        if not files:
            print(f"❌ No 7-day CSV files found matching: *_ReportDate_Last7.csv")
            return None
        
        # Sort by modification time, newest first
        latest_file = max(files, key=os.path.getmtime)
        print(f"✅ Found 7-day CSV: {os.path.basename(latest_file)}")
        return latest_file
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"❌ Error finding CSV: {e}")
        return None

def get_cycle_info_from_calendar(report_due_date=None):
    """
    Get cycle information from cycle calendar based on Report_Due_Date.
    
    Args:
        report_due_date: datetime object or date string (MM/DD/YYYY). 
                        If None, uses today's date.
    
    Returns:
        dict with cycle_id, range_start, range_end, 28_day_start, 28_day_end
        or None if not found
    """
    try:
        if not os.path.exists(CYCLE_CSV):
            print(f"⚠️  Cycle calendar not found: {CYCLE_CSV}")
            return None
        
        cycle_df = pd.read_csv(CYCLE_CSV)
        
        # Determine the date to use for lookup
        is_specific_report_date = report_due_date is not None
        if report_due_date is None:
            lookup_date = datetime.now().date()
            lookup_date_str = datetime.now().strftime("%m/%d/%Y")
        else:
            if isinstance(report_due_date, str):
                lookup_date = pd.to_datetime(report_due_date).date()
                lookup_date_str = report_due_date
            else:
                lookup_date = report_due_date.date() if hasattr(report_due_date, 'date') else report_due_date
                lookup_date_str = lookup_date.strftime("%m/%d/%Y")
        
        # First try to match by Report_Due_Date (exact match) - this is the primary method
        matching_row = cycle_df[cycle_df['Report_Due_Date'] == lookup_date_str]
        
        if not matching_row.empty:
            row = matching_row.iloc[0]
            cycle_info = {
                'cycle_id': row['Report_Name'],
                'range_start': row['7_Day_Start'],
                'range_end': row['7_Day_End'],
                '28_day_start': row['28_Day_Start'],
                '28_day_end': row['28_Day_End']
            }
            print(f"✅ Cycle from Report_Due_Date: {cycle_info['cycle_id']}")
            print(f"   7-Day Range: {cycle_info['range_start']} to {cycle_info['range_end']}")
            print(f"   28-Day Range: {cycle_info['28_day_start']} to {cycle_info['28_day_end']}")
            return cycle_info
        
        # Fallback: Only use if exact match failed AND we're NOT using a specific Report_Due_Date
        # When we have a Report_Due_Date, we MUST match exactly - no fallback to date ranges
        if is_specific_report_date:
            # If we have a specific report date, exact match should always work
            print(f"⚠️  Exact match failed for Report_Due_Date: {lookup_date_str}")
            print("   This may indicate a date format mismatch or missing cycle in calendar")
            print(f"   Attempted lookup: {lookup_date_str}")
            print(f"   Available Report_Due_Dates in calendar: {cycle_df['Report_Due_Date'].head(5).tolist()}")
        else:
            # Only use fallback when using today's date (not a specific Report_Due_Date)
            # Find cycle where today falls within the 7-day range
            for _, row in cycle_df.iterrows():
                try:
                    # Parse dates
                    start_date = pd.to_datetime(row['7_Day_Start']).date()
                    end_date = pd.to_datetime(row['7_Day_End']).date()
                    
                    if start_date <= lookup_date <= end_date:
                        cycle_info = {
                            'cycle_id': row['Report_Name'],
                            'range_start': row['7_Day_Start'],
                            'range_end': row['7_Day_End'],
                            '28_day_start': row['28_Day_Start'],
                            '28_day_end': row['28_Day_End']
                        }
                        print(f"✅ Cycle from date range: {cycle_info['cycle_id']}")
                        print(f"   7-Day Range: {cycle_info['range_start']} to {cycle_info['range_end']}")
                        print(f"   28-Day Range: {cycle_info['28_day_start']} to {cycle_info['28_day_end']}")
                        return cycle_info
                except:
                    continue
        
        print(f"⚠️  No matching cycle found for date: {lookup_date_str}")
        return None
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"⚠️  Error loading cycle calendar: {e}")
        import traceback
        traceback.print_exc()
        return None

def get_current_cycle_info():
    """Get current cycle information from cycle calendar (uses today's date)"""
    return get_cycle_info_from_calendar(None)

def parse_statute(incident_type):
    """Extract statute code from incident type string"""
    if pd.isna(incident_type) or not incident_type:
        return ""
    
    # Look for pattern like "2C:18-2" or "2C:20-3"
    import re
    match = re.search(r'(2C:\d+-\d+[A-Za-z]?)', incident_type)
    if match:
        return match.group(1)
    return ""

def clean_incident_type(incident_type):
    """Remove statute from incident type to get clean name"""
    if pd.isna(incident_type) or not incident_type:
        return ""
    
    # Remove " - 2C:XX-X" pattern
    import re
    cleaned = re.sub(r'\s*-\s*2C:\d+-\d+[A-Za-z]?', '', incident_type)
    return cleaned.strip()

def format_datetime(date_val, time_val):
    """Combine date and time into MM/DD/YY HH:mm format"""
    try:
        if pd.isna(date_val) or pd.isna(time_val):
            return "Data Incomplete"
        
        # Parse date
        if isinstance(date_val, str):
            date_obj = pd.to_datetime(date_val).date()
        else:
            date_obj = pd.to_datetime(date_val).date()
        
        # Parse time
        if isinstance(time_val, str):
            time_obj = pd.to_datetime(time_val).time()
        else:
            time_obj = pd.to_datetime(time_val).time()
        
        # Combine
        dt = datetime.combine(date_obj, time_obj)
        return dt.strftime('%m/%d/%y %H:%M')
        
    except Exception as e:
        return "Data Incomplete"

def format_money(value):
    """Format money value with commas and two decimals"""
    try:
        if pd.isna(value) or value == "" or value is None:
            return "$0.00"
        
        # Convert to float
        amount = float(str(value).replace(',', '').replace('$', ''))
        return f"${amount:,.2f}"
        
    except:
        return "$0.00"

def transform_to_briefing_format(csv_path, cycle_info):
    """Transform RMS CSV to ChatGPT briefing format"""
    try:
        print(f"\n📊 Loading CSV: {os.path.basename(csv_path)}")
        df = pd.read_csv(csv_path)
        print(f"✅ Loaded {len(df)} records")
        
        # Filter by Report Date to only include incidents within the cycle range
        if cycle_info:
            try:
                # Parse cycle dates
                cycle_start = pd.to_datetime(cycle_info['range_start']).date()
                cycle_end = pd.to_datetime(cycle_info['range_end']).date()
                
                # Convert Report Date column to date type
                df['Report Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Report Date']).dt.date
                
                # Filter: only include incidents where Report Date is within cycle range
                initial_count = len(df)
                df = df[(df['Report Date'] >= cycle_start) & (df['Report Date'] <= cycle_end)]
                filtered_count = len(df)
                
                if initial_count != filtered_count:
                    excluded = initial_count - filtered_count
                    print(f"   ⚠️  Filtered out {excluded} incident(s) with Report Date outside cycle range")
                    print(f"   📅 Cycle range: {cycle_start} to {cycle_end}")
                    print(f"   ✅ {filtered_count} incident(s) remain after filtering")
                else:
                    print(f"   ✅ All {filtered_count} incident(s) are within cycle range")
                    
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"   ⚠️  Warning: Could not filter by Report Date: {e}")
                print(f"   📋 Proceeding with all {len(df)} records (no filtering applied)")
        
        # Create new dataframe with briefing columns
        briefing_df = pd.DataFrame()
        
        # Direct mappings
        briefing_df['CaseNumber'] = df['Case Number']
        briefing_df['FullAddress'] = df['FullAddress']
        briefing_df['Grid'] = df['Grid']
        # Convert Zone to integer (handle decimal values like 8.0 -> 8)
        briefing_df['Zone'] = df['Zone'].apply(
            lambda x: int(x) if pd.notna(x) and str(x).replace('.', '', 1).isdigit() else x
        )
        briefing_df['Narrative'] = df['Narrative']
        
        # Date/Time combination
        briefing_df['IncidentDateTime'] = df.apply(
            lambda row: format_datetime(row['Incident Date'], row['Incident Time']), 
            axis=1
        )
        
        # Incident type parsing
        briefing_df['IncidentType'] = df['Incident Type_1'].apply(clean_incident_type)
        briefing_df['Subtype'] = df['Incident Type_2'].fillna('')
        briefing_df['Statute'] = df['Incident Type_1'].apply(parse_statute)
        
        # Vehicle information
        briefing_df['VictimVehicleMake'] = df['Make1'].fillna('')
        briefing_df['VictimVehicleModel'] = df['Model1'].fillna('')
        briefing_df['Plate'] = df['Registration 1'].fillna('')
        briefing_df['PlateState'] = df['Reg State 1'].fillna('')
        
        # Additional vehicle (if needed)
        briefing_df['VictimVehicle2Make'] = df['Make2'].fillna('')
        briefing_df['VictimVehicle2Model'] = df['Model2'].fillna('')
        briefing_df['Plate2'] = df['Registration 2'].fillna('')
        briefing_df['PlateState2'] = df['Reg State 2'].fillna('')
        
        # Loss information
        briefing_df['LossTotal'] = df['Total Value Stolen'].apply(format_money)
        briefing_df['RecoveredTotal'] = df['Total Value Recover'].apply(format_money)
        
        # Case information
        briefing_df['Status'] = df['Case_Status'].fillna('Unknown')
        briefing_df['Officer'] = df['Officer of Record'].fillna('')
        briefing_df['Squad'] = df['Squad'].fillna('')
        briefing_df['Detective'] = df['Det_Assigned'].fillna('')
        
        # Add cycle information
        if cycle_info:
            briefing_df['CycleID'] = cycle_info['cycle_id']
            briefing_df['RangeStart'] = cycle_info['range_start']
            briefing_df['RangeEnd'] = cycle_info['range_end']
        else:
            # Fallback to auto-detection
            briefing_df['CycleID'] = 'Auto-Detected'
            today = datetime.now()
            week_ago = today - timedelta(days=7)
            briefing_df['RangeStart'] = week_ago.strftime('%m/%d/%y')
            briefing_df['RangeEnd'] = today.strftime('%m/%d/%y')
        
        # Placeholder fields for AI to extract from narrative
        briefing_df['SuspectDesc'] = 'Extract from Narrative'
        briefing_df['SuspectVehicle'] = 'Extract from Narrative'
        briefing_df['Method'] = 'Extract from Narrative'
        briefing_df['PointOfEntry'] = 'Extract from Narrative'
        briefing_df['MeansOfEntry'] = 'Extract from Narrative'
        briefing_df['LossItems'] = 'Extract from Narrative (semicolon separated Item:$Amount)'
        briefing_df['VictimSex'] = ''
        briefing_df['VictimAdultJuvenile'] = ''
        briefing_df['Allegation'] = ''
        briefing_df['ParkingLocation'] = ''
        briefing_df['Context'] = ''
        
        print(f"✅ Transformed to briefing format: {len(briefing_df)} records")
        return briefing_df
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"❌ Error transforming CSV: {e}")
        import traceback
        traceback.print_exc()
        return None

def save_briefing_csv(df, output_folder):
    """Save briefing CSV with timestamp"""
    try:
        os.makedirs(output_folder, exist_ok=True)
        
        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y_%m_%d_%H_%M_%S')
        output_file = os.path.join(output_folder, f"SCRPA_Briefing_Ready_{timestamp}.csv")
        
        # Save with proper quoting for narrative fields
        df.to_csv(output_file, index=False, quoting=csv.QUOTE_ALL, encoding='utf-8')
        
        print(f"\n✅ Briefing CSV saved: {os.path.basename(output_file)}")
        print(f"📁 Location: {output_file}")
        print(f"\n📋 Records by Crime Type:")
        
        # Show breakdown by crime type
        crime_counts = df['IncidentType'].value_counts()
        for crime_type, count in crime_counts.items():
            print(f"   • {crime_type}: {count} cases")
        
        return output_file
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"❌ Error saving CSV: {e}")
        return None

def find_raw_7day_csv(rms_export_dir=None):
    """
    Find the raw 7-day filtered CSV file.
    
    Args:
        rms_export_dir: Path to RMS export directory. If None, uses default.
    
    Returns:
        Path to the most recent *_ReportDate_Last7.csv file, or None if not found.
    """
    import glob
    if rms_export_dir is None:
        rms_export_dir = RMS_FOLDER
    
    pattern = os.path.join(rms_export_dir, "*_ReportDate_Last7.csv")
    files = glob.glob(pattern)
    
    if not files:
        return None
    
    # Get most recent file by modification time
    latest = max(files, key=os.path.getmtime)
    return latest

def append_raw_7day_csv_section(f, rms_export_dir=None):
    """
    Append the raw 7-day CSV data section to the prompt file.
    
    Args:
        f: Open file handle to write to
        rms_export_dir: Path to RMS export directory
    """
    # Find the raw 7-day CSV file
    raw_7day_csv_path = find_raw_7day_csv(rms_export_dir)
    
    if not raw_7day_csv_path or not os.path.exists(raw_7day_csv_path):
        f.write("\n---\n\n")
        f.write("## Raw 7-Day Filtered CSV Data (Source)\n\n")
        f.write("*Note: Raw 7-day CSV file (`*_ReportDate_Last7.csv`) not found.*\n\n")
        return
    
    f.write("\n---\n\n")
    f.write("## Raw 7-Day Filtered CSV Data (Source)\n\n")
    f.write("**IMPORTANT**: The following is the raw 7-day filtered CSV data with original column names. ")
    f.write("This provides additional context and fields not present in the transformed briefing CSV.\n\n")
    f.write(f"**File**: `{os.path.basename(raw_7day_csv_path)}`\n\n")
    
    # List of additional columns available
    f.write("### Additional Columns Available\n\n")
    f.write("This raw data includes these additional columns not in the briefing CSV:\n\n")
    f.write("- `Incident Date_Between`, `Incident Time_Between` - Range values if applicable\n")
    f.write("- `Report Date`, `Report Time` - When the report was filed\n")
    f.write("- `Incident Type_1`, `Incident Type_2`, `Incident Type_3` - Multiple incident type codes\n")
    f.write("- `Total Value Stolen`, `Total Value Recover` - Property value information\n")
    f.write("- `Registration 1`, `Reg State 1`, `Make1`, `Model1` - First vehicle info\n")
    f.write("- `Registration 2`, `Reg State 2`, `Make2`, `Model2` - Second vehicle info\n")
    f.write("- `Reviewed By` - Reviewer information\n\n")
    
    f.write("### Raw CSV File Content\n\n")
    f.write("```csv\n")
    
    try:
        raw_df = pd.read_csv(raw_7day_csv_path, encoding='utf-8')
        
        # Convert to CSV string
        csv_buffer = raw_df.to_csv(index=False, quoting=csv.QUOTE_MINIMAL)
        f.write(csv_buffer)
        
    except UnicodeDecodeError:
        # Try with different encoding
        try:
            raw_df = pd.read_csv(raw_7day_csv_path, encoding='latin-1')
            csv_buffer = raw_df.to_csv(index=False, quoting=csv.QUOTE_MINIMAL)
            f.write(csv_buffer)
        except Exception as e:
            f.write(f"*Could not read raw CSV: {e}*\n")
    except Exception as e:
        f.write(f"*Could not read raw CSV: {e}*\n")
    
    f.write("```\n\n")
    
    f.write("**Usage Note**: Use this raw data to cross-reference details like exact report times, ")
    f.write("vehicle information, property values, and additional incident type codes that may be ")
    f.write("relevant to the tactical briefing.\n\n")

def create_chatgpt_prompt_file(output_folder, csv_filename, briefing_df, cycle_info):
    """Create comprehensive ChatGPT prompt file with CSV data and HTML template"""
    try:
        prompt_file = os.path.join(output_folder, "CHATGPT_BRIEFING_PROMPT.md")
        
        # Get CSV summary stats
        total_cases = len(briefing_df)
        crime_counts = briefing_df['IncidentType'].value_counts().to_dict()
        
        # Get cycle info
        cycle_id = cycle_info.get('cycle_id', 'Auto-Detected') if cycle_info else 'Auto-Detected'
        range_start = cycle_info.get('range_start', '') if cycle_info else ''
        range_end = cycle_info.get('range_end', '') if cycle_info else ''
        
        with open(prompt_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write("# SCRPA Strategic Crime Reduction Briefing - ChatGPT Prompt\n\n")
            f.write(f"**Generated**: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}\n\n")
            f.write("---\n\n")
            
            # CSV Data Summary
            f.write("## CSV Data Summary\n\n")
            f.write(f"**CSV File**: `{os.path.basename(csv_filename)}`\n\n")
            f.write(f"**Total Cases**: {total_cases}\n\n")
            f.write("**Cases by Type**:\n")
            for crime_type, count in sorted(crime_counts.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True):
                f.write(f"- {crime_type}: {count}\n")
            f.write("\n")
            f.write(f"**Cycle**: {cycle_id}\n")
            f.write(f"**Date Range**: {range_start} to {range_end}\n\n")
            f.write("---\n\n")
            
            # Reporting Parameters Section (ChatGPT recommendation)
            # Convert date format from MM/DD/YYYY to YYYY-MM-DD for Reporting Parameters
            def convert_date_format(date_str):
                """Convert MM/DD/YYYY to YYYY-MM-DD"""
                try:
                    if not date_str:
                        return ""
                    # Parse MM/DD/YYYY format
                    date_obj = pd.to_datetime(date_str, format='%m/%d/%Y')
                    return date_obj.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
                except:
                    # If conversion fails, return original
                    return date_str
            
            range_start_iso = convert_date_format(range_start)
            range_end_iso = convert_date_format(range_end)
            
            f.write("## Reporting Parameters For This Run\n\n")
            f.write("- Cycle ID: {}\n".format(cycle_id))
            f.write("- Date Range Start: {}\n".format(range_start_iso))
            f.write("- Date Range End: {}\n".format(range_end_iso))
            f.write("- Version: 1.5.0\n")
            f.write("- Prepared By: P.O. R. A. Carucci\n")
            f.write("- Submitted To: Captain Smith\n\n")
            f.write("---\n\n")
            
            # Include Full CSV Data
            f.write("## Complete CSV Data\n\n")
            f.write("**IMPORTANT**: The complete CSV data is included below. ")
            f.write("Use this data to extract all details from the Narrative column and other fields.\n\n")
            f.write("### CSV File Content\n\n")
            f.write("```csv\n")
            # Use pandas to_csv with proper CSV formatting
            csv_buffer = briefing_df.to_csv(index=False, quoting=csv.QUOTE_MINIMAL, escapechar='\\')
            f.write(csv_buffer)
            f.write("```\n\n")
            f.write("**Note**: All column headers and data rows are included above. ")
            f.write("Pay special attention to the **Narrative** column which contains detailed information ")
            f.write("about suspects, vehicles, loss items, methods of entry, and other case details.\n\n")
            
            # Add raw 7-day CSV section
            append_raw_7day_csv_section(f, rms_export_dir=RMS_FOLDER)
            
            f.write("---\n\n")
            
            # Instructions
            f.write("## Instructions for ChatGPT\n\n")
            f.write("**Option 1 (Recommended)**: Copy this ENTIRE file and paste it into ChatGPT. The CSV data is already embedded below.\n\n")
            f.write("**Option 2 (Alternative)**: Upload the CSV file (`{}`) separately, then copy and paste the prompt section below (starting from '## Strategic Crime Reduction Briefing Prompt').\n\n".format(os.path.basename(csv_filename)))
            f.write("**Note**: The CSV data is included in this prompt file, so uploading separately is optional.\n\n")
            f.write("---\n\n")
            
            # Main Prompt
            f.write("## Strategic Crime Reduction Briefing Prompt\n\n")
            f.write("I'm preparing a strategic-crime-reduction briefing for the Patrol Captain. ")
            f.write("You'll receive a list of RMS incident records with these key fields for each case:\n\n")
            f.write("* Case Number\n")
            f.write("* Incident Date & Time\n")
            f.write("* Incident Type(s)\n")
            f.write("* Full Address\n")
            f.write("* Narrative\n")
            f.write("* Vehicle Registration(s), Make(s) & Model(s) (if applicable)\n")
            f.write("* Suspect Description(s)\n")
            f.write("* Victim Details (gender, adult/juvenile, relationship to suspect for sexual offenses)\n")
            f.write("* Loss Details (specific items with values AND total loss amount)\n")
            f.write("  **IMPORTANT**: Loss Total is calculated by adding the sum of all individual loss items.\n")
            f.write("* Scene/Entry Details (point of entry, tools used, signs of force)\n")
            f.write("* Parking/Location Context (driveway, street, lot, garage, business, etc.)\n")
            f.write("* Grid / Zone (if available)\n")
            f.write("* Status (Active Investigation, Cleared/Closed)\n\n")
            f.write("---\n\n")
            
            # Global Instructions
            f.write("### Global Instructions\n\n")
            f.write("* **Sort** every section **chronologically** (oldest → newest).\n\n")
            f.write("* **Flag** any missing or ambiguous fields as **Data Incomplete**.\n\n")
            f.write("* Use `##` for section headers and `-` for bullets.\n\n")
            f.write("* **Standardize** all monetary values with commas and two decimals (e.g. `$1,024.00`).\n\n")
            f.write("* At the end include a **Key Takeaways** block with totals and hotspots.\n\n")
            f.write("* Also provide a **summary table** formatted as:\n\n")
            f.write("```\n")
